title: Semi-supervised lane detection with Deep Hough Transform
title_zh: 使用深霍夫变换的半监督车道检测
abstract: Current work on lane detection relies on large manually annotated datasets. We reduce the dependency on annotations by leveraging massive cheaply available unlabelled data. We propose a novel loss function exploiting geometric knowledge of lanes in Hough space, where a lane can be identified as a local maximum. By splitting lanes into separate channels, we can localize each lane via simple global max-pooling. The location of the maximum encodes the layout of a lane, while the intensity indicates the the probability of a lane being present. Maximizing the log-probability of the maximal bins helps neural networks find lanes without labels. On the CULane and TuSimple datasets, we show that the proposed Hough Transform loss improves performance significantly by learning from large amounts of unlabelled images.
summary: Current work on lane detection relies on large manually annotated datasets. We reduce the dependency on annotations by leveraging massive cheaply available unlabelled data. We propose a novel loss function exploiting geometric knowledge of lanes in Hough space, where a lane can be identified as a local maximum. By splitting lanes into separate channels, we can localize each lane via simple global max-pooling. The location of the maximum encodes the layout of a lane, while the intensity indicates the the probability of a lane being present. Maximizing the log-probability of the maximal bins helps neural networks find lanes without labels. On the CULane and TuSimple datasets, we show that the proposed Hough Transform loss improves performance significantly by learning from large amounts of unlabelled images.
abstract_zh: 当前车道检测的工作依赖于大型手动注释数据集。我们通过利用大量廉价的未标记数据来减少对注释的依赖。我们提出了一种新颖的损失函数，利用霍夫空间中车道的几何知识，其中车道可以被识别为局部最大值。通过将通道分成单独的通道，我们可以通过简单的全局最大池化来本地化每个通道。最大值的位置对车道的布局进行编码，而强度则表示车道存在的概率。最大化最大箱的对数概率有助于神经网络找到没有标签的车道。在 CULane 和 TuSimple 数据集上，我们表明，所提出的霍夫变换损失通过从大量未标记图像中学习，显着提高了性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度霍夫变换的半监督车道检测方法，减少对标注数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有车道检测方法依赖大量人工标注数据，而标注成本高昂。本文旨在利用大量廉价的未标注数据降低对标注的依赖。
AI.method: 设计新型损失函数，利用霍夫空间中车道的几何特性，通过通道分割和全局最大池化定位车道，并通过最大化未标注数据中最大值的对数概率实现无监督学习。
AI.result: 在CULane和TuSimple数据集上，该方法通过大量未标注图像学习显著提升了车道检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 深度霍夫变换损失函数能有效利用未标注数据提升车道检测效果，为减少标注依赖提供新思路。

title: Order-Agnostic Cross Entropy for Non-Autoregressive Machine Translation
title_zh: 用于非自回归机器翻译的顺序无关交叉熵
abstract: We propose a new training objective named order-agnostic cross entropy (OaXE) for fully non-autoregressive translation (NAT) models. OaXE improves the standard cross-entropy loss to ameliorate the effect of word reordering, which is a common source of the critical multimodality problem in NAT. Concretely, OaXE removes the penalty for word order errors, and computes the cross entropy loss based on the best possible alignment between model predictions and target tokens. Since the log loss is very sensitive to invalid references, we leverage cross entropy initialization and loss truncation to ensure the model focuses on a good part of the search space. Extensive experiments on major WMT benchmarks show that OaXE substantially improves translation performance, setting new state of the art for fully NAT models. Further analyses show that OaXE alleviates the multimodality problem by reducing token repetitions and increasing prediction confidence. Our code, data, and trained models are available at https://github.com/tencent-ailab/ICML21_OAXE.
summary: We propose a new training objective named order-agnostic cross entropy (OaXE) for fully non-autoregressive translation (NAT) models. OaXE improves the standard cross-entropy loss to ameliorate the effect of word reordering, which is a common source of the critical multimodality problem in NAT. Concretely, OaXE removes the penalty for word order errors, and computes the cross entropy loss based on the best possible alignment between model predictions and target tokens. Since the log loss is very sensitive to invalid references, we leverage cross entropy initialization and loss truncation to ensure the model focuses on a good part of the search space. Extensive experiments on major WMT benchmarks show that OaXE substantially improves translation performance, setting new state of the art for fully NAT models. Further analyses show that OaXE alleviates the multimodality problem by reducing token repetitions and increasing prediction confidence. Our code, data, and trained models are available at https://github.com/tencent-ailab/ICML21_OAXE.
abstract_zh: 我们为完全非自回归翻译（NAT）模型提出了一个名为顺序无关交叉熵（OaXE）的新训练目标。 OaXE 改进了标准交叉熵损失，以改善单词重新排序的效果，这是 NAT 中关键多模态问题的常见根源。具体来说，OaXE 消除了词序错误的惩罚，并根据模型预测和目标标记之间的最佳可能对齐来计算交叉熵损失。由于对数损失对无效引用非常敏感，因此我们利用交叉熵初始化和损失截断来确保模型专注于搜索空间的大部分。对主要 WMT 基准的大量实验表明，OaXE 显着提高了转换性能，为完全 NAT 模型设定了新的技术水平。进一步的分析表明，OaXE 通过减少标记重复和增加预测置信度来缓解多模态问题。我们的代码、数据和训练模型可在 https://github.com/tencent-ailab/ICML21_OAXE 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的训练目标Order-Agnostic Cross Entropy（OaXE），用于改进完全非自回归翻译（NAT）模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 非自回归翻译模型面临词序错误导致的多模态问题，传统交叉熵损失对此敏感，影响模型效果。
AI.method: OaXE通过消除词序错误惩罚，基于预测与目标词的最佳对齐计算损失，并结合交叉熵初始化和损失截断优化搜索空间。
AI.result: 在WMT基准测试中，OaXE显著提升翻译性能，达到完全NAT模型的新SOTA，同时减少重复token并提高预测置信度。
AI.conclusion: OaXE有效缓解非自回归翻译的多模态问题，为NAT模型训练提供新思路。

title: PEBBLE: Feedback-Efficient Interactive Reinforcement Learning via Relabeling Experience and Unsupervised Pre-training
title_zh: PEBBLE：通过重新标记经验和无监督预训练实现反馈高效的交互式强化学习
comment: ICML 2021. First two authors contributed equally. Website: https://sites.google.com/view/icml21pebble Code: https://github.com/pokaxpoka/B_Pref
comments: ICML 2021. First two authors contributed equally. Website: https://sites.google.com/view/icml21pebble Code: https://github.com/pokaxpoka/B_Pref
abstract: Conveying complex objectives to reinforcement learning (RL) agents can often be difficult, involving meticulous design of reward functions that are sufficiently informative yet easy enough to provide. Human-in-the-loop RL methods allow practitioners to instead interactively teach agents through tailored feedback; however, such approaches have been challenging to scale since human feedback is very expensive. In this work, we aim to make this process more sample- and feedback-efficient. We present an off-policy, interactive RL algorithm that capitalizes on the strengths of both feedback and off-policy learning. Specifically, we learn a reward model by actively querying a teacher's preferences between two clips of behavior and use it to train an agent. To enable off-policy learning, we relabel all the agent's past experience when its reward model changes. We additionally show that pre-training our agents with unsupervised exploration substantially increases the mileage of its queries. We demonstrate that our approach is capable of learning tasks of higher complexity than previously considered by human-in-the-loop methods, including a variety of locomotion and robotic manipulation skills. We also show that our method is able to utilize real-time human feedback to effectively prevent reward exploitation and learn new behaviors that are difficult to specify with standard reward functions.
summary: Conveying complex objectives to reinforcement learning (RL) agents can often be difficult, involving meticulous design of reward functions that are sufficiently informative yet easy enough to provide. Human-in-the-loop RL methods allow practitioners to instead interactively teach agents through tailored feedback; however, such approaches have been challenging to scale since human feedback is very expensive. In this work, we aim to make this process more sample- and feedback-efficient. We present an off-policy, interactive RL algorithm that capitalizes on the strengths of both feedback and off-policy learning. Specifically, we learn a reward model by actively querying a teacher's preferences between two clips of behavior and use it to train an agent. To enable off-policy learning, we relabel all the agent's past experience when its reward model changes. We additionally show that pre-training our agents with unsupervised exploration substantially increases the mileage of its queries. We demonstrate that our approach is capable of learning tasks of higher complexity than previously considered by human-in-the-loop methods, including a variety of locomotion and robotic manipulation skills. We also show that our method is able to utilize real-time human feedback to effectively prevent reward exploitation and learn new behaviors that are difficult to specify with standard reward functions.
abstract_zh: 向强化学习 (RL) 代理传达复杂的目标通常很困难，这涉及到奖励函数的精心设计，这些函数的信息量足够大，但又足够容易提供。人机循环强化学习方法允许从业者通过定制反馈以交互方式教导智能体；然而，由于人类反馈的成本非常高，这种方法一直难以规模化。在这项工作中，我们的目标是使这个过程的样本和反馈效率更高。我们提出了一种离策略、交互式强化学习算法，它利用了反馈和离策略学习的优势。具体来说，我们通过主动查询老师在两个行为片段之间的偏好来学习奖励模型，并用它来训练代理。为了实现离策略学习，我们在奖励模型发生变化时重新标记智能体过去的所有经验。我们还表明，通过无监督探索对我们的代理进行预训练可以大大增加其查询里程。我们证明，我们的方法能够学习比以前的人机循环方法更复杂的任务，包括各种运动和机器人操作技能。我们还表明，我们的方法能够利用实时人类反馈来有效防止奖励剥削，并学习标准奖励函数难以指定的新行为。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PEBBLE方法，通过经验重标记和无监督预训练，提升交互式强化学习中反馈效率。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习依赖复杂奖励函数设计，而人类反馈成本高昂且难以扩展，需更高效的交互式学习方法。
AI.method: 基于离线策略的交互式RL算法，通过主动查询人类偏好训练奖励模型，并在模型更新时重标记历史经验；结合无监督预训练提升查询效率。
AI.result: 成功学习比现有方法更复杂的运动与机械操作任务，且能通过实时反馈防止奖励滥用，提升样本与反馈效率。
AI.conclusion: PEBBLE通过结合反馈与离线学习，显著降低人类交互成本，为复杂任务的交互式强化学习提供新思路。

motivation: 传统强化学习依赖复杂奖励函数设计，而人类反馈成本高昂且难以扩展，需更高效的交互式学习方法。
method: 基于离线策略的交互式RL算法，通过主动查询人类偏好训练奖励模型，并在模型更新时重标记历史经验；结合无监督预训练提升查询效率。
result: 成功学习比现有方法更复杂的运动与机械操作任务，且能通过实时反馈防止奖励滥用，提升样本与反馈效率。
conclusion: PEBBLE通过结合反馈与离线学习，显著降低人类交互成本，为复杂任务的交互式强化学习提供新思路。
search_text: PEBBLE: Feedback-Efficient Interactive Reinforcement Learning via Relabeling Experience and Unsupervised Pre-training PEBBLE：通过重新标记经验和无监督预训练实现反馈高效的交互式强化学习 Conveying complex objectives to reinforcement learning (RL) agents can often be difficult, involving meticulous design of reward functions that are sufficiently informative yet easy enough to provide. Human-in-the-loop RL methods allow practitioners to instead interactively teach agents through tailored feedback; however, such approaches have been challenging to scale since human feedback is very expensive. In this work, we aim to make this process more sample- and feedback-efficient. We present an off-policy, interactive RL algorithm that capitalizes on the strengths of both feedback and off-policy learning. Specifically, we learn a reward model by actively querying a teacher's preferences between two clips of behavior and use it to train an agent. To enable off-policy learning, we relabel all the agent's past experience when its reward model changes. We additionally show that pre-training our agents with unsupervised exploration substantially increases the mileage of its queries. We demonstrate that our approach is capable of learning tasks of higher complexity than previously considered by human-in-the-loop methods, including a variety of locomotion and robotic manipulation skills. We also show that our method is able to utilize real-time human feedback to effectively prevent reward exploitation and learn new behaviors that are difficult to specify with standard reward functions. 向强化学习 (RL) 代理传达复杂的目标通常很困难，这涉及到奖励函数的精心设计，这些函数的信息量足够大，但又足够容易提供。人机循环强化学习方法允许从业者通过定制反馈以交互方式教导智能体；然而，由于人类反馈的成本非常高，这种方法一直难以规模化。在这项工作中，我们的目标是使这个过程的样本和反馈效率更高。我们提出了一种离策略、交互式强化学习算法，它利用了反馈和离策略学习的优势。具体来说，我们通过主动查询老师在两个行为片段之间的偏好来学习奖励模型，并用它来训练代理。为了实现离策略学习，我们在奖励模型发生变化时重新标记智能体过去的所有经验。我们还表明，通过无监督探索对我们的代理进行预训练可以大大增加其查询里程。我们证明，我们的方法能够学习比以前的人机循环方法更复杂的任务，包括各种运动和机器人操作技能。我们还表明，我们的方法能够利用实时人类反馈来有效防止奖励剥削，并学习标准奖励函数难以指定的新行为。 本文提出PEBBLE方法，通过经验重标记和无监督预训练，提升交互式强化学习中反馈效率。 Kimin Lee,Laura Smith,Pieter Abbeel cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Agile wide-field imaging with selective high resolution
title_zh: 具有选择性高分辨率的敏捷宽视场成像
abstract: Wide-field and high-resolution (HR) imaging is essential for various applications such as aviation reconnaissance, topographic mapping and safety monitoring. The existing techniques require a large-scale detector array to capture HR images of the whole field, resulting in high complexity and heavy cost. In this work, we report an agile wide-field imaging framework with selective high resolution that requires only two detectors. It builds on the statistical sparsity prior of natural scenes that the important targets locate only at small regions of interests (ROI), instead of the whole field. Under this assumption, we use a short-focal camera to image wide field with a certain low resolution, and use a long-focal camera to acquire the HR images of ROI. To automatically locate ROI in the wide field in real time, we propose an efficient deep-learning based multiscale registration method that is robust and blind to the large setting differences (focal, white balance, etc) between the two cameras. Using the registered location, the long-focal camera mounted on a gimbal enables real-time tracking of the ROI for continuous HR imaging. We demonstrated the novel imaging framework by building a proof-of-concept setup with only 1181 gram weight, and assembled it on an unmanned aerial vehicle for air-to-ground monitoring. Experiments show that the setup maintains 120$^{\circ}$ wide field-of-view (FOV) with selective 0.45$mrad$ instantaneous FOV.

The existing techniques require a large-scale detector array to capture HR images of the whole field, resulting in high complexity and heavy cost. In this work, we report an agile wide-field imaging framework with selective high resolution that requires only two detectors. Under this assumption, we use a short-focal camera to image wide field with a certain low resolution, and use a long-focal camera to acquire the HR images of ROI. To automatically locate ROI in the wide field in real time, we propose an efficient deep-learning based multiscale registration method that is robust and blind to the large setting differences (focal, white balance, etc) between the two cameras. Using the registered location, the long-focal camera mounted on a gimbal enables real-time tracking of the ROI for continuous HR imaging. We demonstrated the novel imaging framework by building a proof-of-concept setup with only 1181 gram weight, and assembled it on an unmanned aerial vehicle for air-to-ground monitoring. Experiments show that the setup maintains 120$^{\circ}$ wide field-of-view (FOV) with selective 0.45$mrad$ instantaneous FOV.
abstract_zh: 宽视场和高分辨率 (HR) 成像对于航空侦察、地形测绘和安全监控等各种应用至关重要。现有技术需要大规模的探测器阵列来捕获全视场的HR图像，导致复杂度高、成本高。在这项工作中，我们报告了一种敏捷的宽视场成像框架，具有选择性高分辨率，仅需要两个探测器。它建立在自然场景的统计稀疏先验的基础上，即重要目标仅位于较小的兴趣区域（ROI），而不是整个领域。在此假设下，我们使用短焦相机以一定的低分辨率对宽视场进行成像，并使用长焦相机获取ROI的HR图像。为了实时自动定位宽视野中的 ROI，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的高效多尺度配准方法，该方法具有鲁棒性，并且对两个摄像机之间的较大设置差异（焦距、白平衡等）视而不见。使用注册的位置，安装在万向节上的长焦相机可以实时跟踪 ROI，以进行连续 HR 成像。我们通过构建仅重 1181 克的概念验证装置来展示新颖的成像框架，并将其组装在无人机上用于空对地监控。实验表明，该装置可保持 120$^{\circ}$ 宽视场 (FOV)，并具有选择性 0.45$mrad$ 瞬时 FOV。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种使用两个探测器的敏捷广域成像框架，通过选择性高分辨率实现广域与高分辨率成像的结合。
AI.motivation: 现有广域高分辨率成像技术依赖大规模探测器阵列，导致系统复杂且成本高昂，而自然场景中重要目标通常仅分布在小区域，因此可通过选择性高分辨率优化资源分配。
AI.method: 利用短焦距相机以低分辨率捕捉广域图像，长焦距相机获取感兴趣区域（ROI）的高分辨率图像，并提出基于深度学习的多尺度配准方法，实现实时ROI定位与跟踪。
AI.result: 搭建了重量仅1181克的原型系统，集成于无人机实现空地监测，保持120°广视场与0.45 mrad瞬时视场的高分辨率选择性成像。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过选择性高分辨率有效降低了硬件复杂度，验证了其在航空侦察等场景中的可行性与轻量化优势。

authors_text: Xutong Liu,Jinhang Zuo,Xiaowei Chen,Wei Chen,John C. S. Lui
title: Multi-layered Network Exploration via Random Walks: From Offline Optimization to Online Learning
title_zh: 通过随机游走的多层网络探索：从离线优化到在线学习
abstract: Multi-layered network exploration (MuLaNE) problem is an important problem abstracted from many applications. In MuLaNE, there are multiple network layers where each node has an importance weight and each layer is explored by a random walk. The MuLaNE task is to allocate total random walk budget $B$ into each network layer so that the total weights of the unique nodes visited by random walks are maximized. We systematically study this problem from offline optimization to online learning. For the offline optimization setting where the network structure and node weights are known, we provide greedy based constant-ratio approximation algorithms for overlapping networks, and greedy or dynamic-programming based optimal solutions for non-overlapping networks. For the online learning setting, neither the network structure nor the node weights are known initially. We adapt the combinatorial multi-armed bandit framework and design algorithms to learn random walk related parameters and node weights while optimizing the budget allocation in multiple rounds, and prove that they achieve logarithmic regret bounds. Finally, we conduct experiments on a real-world social network dataset to validate our theoretical results.
summary: Multi-layered network exploration (MuLaNE) problem is an important problem abstracted from many applications. In MuLaNE, there are multiple network layers where each node has an importance weight and each layer is explored by a random walk. The MuLaNE task is to allocate total random walk budget $B$ into each network layer so that the total weights of the unique nodes visited by random walks are maximized. We systematically study this problem from offline optimization to online learning. For the offline optimization setting where the network structure and node weights are known, we provide greedy based constant-ratio approximation algorithms for overlapping networks, and greedy or dynamic-programming based optimal solutions for non-overlapping networks. For the online learning setting, neither the network structure nor the node weights are known initially. We adapt the combinatorial multi-armed bandit framework and design algorithms to learn random walk related parameters and node weights while optimizing the budget allocation in multiple rounds, and prove that they achieve logarithmic regret bounds. Finally, we conduct experiments on a real-world social network dataset to validate our theoretical results.
abstract_zh: 多层网络探索（MuLaNE）问题是从许多应用中抽象出来的一个重要问题。在 MuLaNE 中，有多个网络层，其中每个节点都有一个重要性权重，并且每个层都通过随机游走进行探索。 MuLaNE 任务是将总随机游走预算 $B$ 分配到每个网络层，以使随机游走访问的唯一节点的总权重最大化。我们从离线优化到在线学习系统地研究了这个问题。对于网络结构和节点权重已知的离线优化设置，我们为重叠网络提供基于贪婪的恒定比率近似算法，为非重叠网络提供基于贪婪或动态规划的最优解决方案。对于在线学习设置，网络结构和节点权重最初都不知道。我们采用组合多臂老虎机框架并设计算法来学习随机游走相关参数和节点权重，同时优化多轮预算分配，并证明它们实现了对数后悔界限。最后，我们在现实世界的社交网络数据集上进行实验以验证我们的理论结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究多层网络探索问题，通过随机游走分配预算以最大化访问的唯一节点权重总和。
AI.motivation: 多层网络在现实应用中广泛存在，如何高效分配有限的随机游走预算以最大化探索效果是关键挑战。
AI.method: 针对离线优化采用贪心算法和动态规划，针对在线学习适应组合多臂老虎机框架，实现参数学习与预算分配的联合优化。
AI.result: 理论证明算法具有常数比近似比和对数遗憾界，并在真实社交网络数据集上验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为多层网络探索提供了从离线到在线的系统性解决方案，平衡了理论保证与实际应用效果。

For the online learning setting, neither the network structure nor the node weights are known initially. We adapt the combinatorial multi-armed bandit framework and design algorithms to learn random walk related parameters and node weights while optimizing the budget allocation in multiple rounds, and prove that they achieve logarithmic regret bounds. Finally, we conduct experiments on a real-world social network dataset to validate our theoretical results. 多层网络探索（MuLaNE）问题是从许多应用中抽象出来的一个重要问题。在 MuLaNE 中，有多个网络层，其中每个节点都有一个重要性权重，并且每个层都通过随机游走进行探索。 MuLaNE 任务是将总随机游走预算 $B$ 分配到每个网络层，以使随机游走访问的唯一节点的总权重最大化。我们从离线优化到在线学习系统地研究了这个问题。对于网络结构和节点权重已知的离线优化设置，我们为重叠网络提供基于贪婪的恒定比率近似算法，为非重叠网络提供基于贪婪或动态规划的最优解决方案。对于在线学习设置，网络结构和节点权重最初都不知道。我们采用组合多臂老虎机框架并设计算法来学习随机游走相关参数和节点权重，同时优化多轮预算分配，并证明它们实现了对数后悔界限。最后，我们在现实世界的社交网络数据集上进行实验以验证我们的理论结果。 本文研究多层网络探索问题，通过随机游走分配预算以最大化访问的唯一节点权重总和。 Xutong Liu,Jinhang Zuo,Xiaowei Chen,Wei Chen,John C. S. Lui cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Dominic Jud,Simon Kerscher,Martin Wermelinger,Edo Jelavic,Pascal Egli,Philipp Leemann,Gabriel Hottiger,Marco Hutter
title: HEAP -- The autonomous walking excavator
title_zh: HEAP——自动行走挖掘机
abstract: The demand and the potential for automation in the construction sector is unmatched, particularly for increasing environmental sustainability, improving worker safety and reducing labor shortages. We have developed an autonomous walking excavator - based one of the most versatile machines found on construction sites - as one way to begin fulfilling this potential. This article describes the process of converting an off-the-shelf construction machine into an autonomous robotic system. First we outline the necessary sensing equipment for full autonomy and the novel actuation of the legs, and compare three different complementary actuation principles for the excavator's arm. Second, we solve the state estimation problem for a general wheeled-legged robot. Beside kinematic measurements, it includes GNSS-RTK, to absolutely reference the machine on a construction site. Third, we developed individual controllers for driving, chassis balancing and arm motions allowing for fully autonomous operation. Lastly, we highlight the machine's potential in four different real-world applications, e.g. autonomous trench digging, autonomous assembly of dry stone walls, autonomous forestry work and semi-autonomous teleoperation. On top, we also share some development insights and possible future research directions.
summary: The demand and the potential for automation in the construction sector is unmatched, particularly for increasing environmental sustainability, improving worker safety and reducing labor shortages. We have developed an autonomous walking excavator - based one of the most versatile machines found on construction sites - as one way to begin fulfilling this potential. This article describes the process of converting an off-the-shelf construction machine into an autonomous robotic system. First we outline the necessary sensing equipment for full autonomy and the novel actuation of the legs, and compare three different complementary actuation principles for the excavator's arm. Second, we solve the state estimation problem for a general wheeled-legged robot. Beside kinematic measurements, it includes GNSS-RTK, to absolutely reference the machine on a construction site. Third, we developed individual controllers for driving, chassis balancing and arm motions allowing for fully autonomous operation. Lastly, we highlight the machine's potential in four different real-world applications, e.g. autonomous trench digging, autonomous assembly of dry stone walls, autonomous forestry work and semi-autonomous teleoperation. On top, we also share some development insights and possible future research directions.
abstract_zh: 建筑行业对自动化的需求和潜力是无与伦比的，特别是在提高环境可持续性、改善工人安全和减少劳动力短缺方面。我们开发了一种自动步行式挖掘机，它是建筑工地上最通用的机器之一，作为开始发挥这一潜力的一种方式。本文介绍了将现成的建筑机械转换为自主机器人系统的过程。首先，我们概述了完全自主和新颖的腿部驱动所需的传感设备，并比较了挖掘机手臂的三种不同的互补驱动原理。其次，我们解决了一般轮腿机器人的状态估计问题。除了运动学测量之外，它还包括 GNSS-RTK，以绝对参考建筑工地上的机器。第三，我们开发了用于驾驶、底盘平衡和手臂运动的单独控制器，以实现完全自主操作。最后，我们强调了该机器在四种不同的实际应用中的潜力，例如自主挖沟、自主组装干石墙、自主林业工作和半自主远程操作。最重要的是，我们还分享了一些发展见解和未来可能的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了将现成挖掘机改装为自主行走机器人系统的过程，重点在于实现全自主操作并探索其在建筑领域的应用潜力。
AI.motivation: 建筑行业亟需自动化技术以提升环境可持续性、保障工人安全并缓解劳动力短缺问题。
AI.method: 通过配置传感设备与创新腿部驱动系统，对比三种臂部驱动原理，结合GNSS-RTK解决状态估计问题，并开发驱动、平衡及臂部控制算法。
AI.result: 成功实现挖掘机的全自主操作，并验证了其在沟槽挖掘、干石墙组装、林业作业及半自主远程操作等场景的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 自主行走挖掘机展示了建筑自动化可行性，未来需进一步优化算法与拓展应用场景。

authors_text: Ziyuan Huang,Zhiwu Qing,Xiang Wang,Yutong Feng,Shiwei Zhang,Jianwen Jiang,Zhurong Xia,Mingqian Tang,Nong Sang,Marcelo H. Ang Jr
title: Towards Training Stronger Video Vision Transformers for EPIC-KITCHENS-100 Action Recognition
title_zh: 为 EPIC-KITCHENS-100 动作识别训练更强的视频视觉变压器
abstract: With the recent surge in the research of vision transformers, they have demonstrated remarkable potential for various challenging computer vision applications, such as image recognition, point cloud classification as well as video understanding. In this paper, we present empirical results for training a stronger video vision transformer on the EPIC-KITCHENS-100 Action Recognition dataset. Specifically, we explore training techniques for video vision transformers, such as augmentations, resolutions as well as initialization, etc. With our training recipe, a single ViViT model achieves the performance of 47.4\% on the validation set of EPIC-KITCHENS-100 dataset, outperforming what is reported in the original paper by 3.4%. We found that video transformers are especially good at predicting the noun in the verb-noun action prediction task. This makes the overall action prediction accuracy of video transformers notably higher than convolutional ones. Surprisingly, even the best video transformers underperform the convolutional networks on the verb prediction. Therefore, we combine the video vision transformers and some of the convolutional video networks and present our solution to the EPIC-KITCHENS-100 Action Recognition competition.
summary: With the recent surge in the research of vision transformers, they have demonstrated remarkable potential for various challenging computer vision applications, such as image recognition, point cloud classification as well as video understanding. In this paper, we present empirical results for training a stronger video vision transformer on the EPIC-KITCHENS-100 Action Recognition dataset. Specifically, we explore training techniques for video vision transformers, such as augmentations, resolutions as well as initialization, etc. With our training recipe, a single ViViT model achieves the performance of 47.4\% on the validation set of EPIC-KITCHENS-100 dataset, outperforming what is reported in the original paper by 3.4%. We found that video transformers are especially good at predicting the noun in the verb-noun action prediction task. This makes the overall action prediction accuracy of video transformers notably higher than convolutional ones. Surprisingly, even the best video transformers underperform the convolutional networks on the verb prediction. Therefore, we combine the video vision transformers and some of the convolutional video networks and present our solution to the EPIC-KITCHENS-100 Action Recognition competition.
abstract_zh: 随着最近视觉转换器研究的激增，它们在各种具有挑战性的计算机视觉应用中表现出了巨大的潜力，例如图像识别、点云分类以及视频理解。在本文中，我们提出了在 EPIC-KITCHENS-100 动作识别数据集上训练更强的视频视觉转换器的实证结果。具体来说，我们探索了视频视觉变换器的训练技术，例如增强、分辨率以及初始化等。通过我们的训练方案，单个 ViViT 模型在 EPIC-KITCHENS-100 数据集的验证集上实现了 47.4% 的性能，比原始论文中报告的性能高出 3.4%。我们发现视频转换器特别擅长预测动名词动作预测任务中的名词。这使得视频变换器的整体动作预测精度明显高于卷积变换器。令人惊讶的是，即使是最好的视频转换器在动词预测方面的表现也不如卷积网络。因此，我们结合了视频视觉转换器和一些卷积视频网络，并向 EPIC-KITCHENS-100 动作识别竞赛展示了我们的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过优化训练方法，在EPIC-KITCHENS-100数据集上训练更强大的视频视觉变换器（ViViT）以提升动作识别性能。
AI.motivation: 视觉变换器在视频理解任务中展现出潜力，但其在EPIC-KITCHENS-100数据集上的表现仍有提升空间，且需解决动词预测的不足。
AI.method: 探索了数据增强、分辨率调整、初始化策略等训练技巧，并结合ViViT与卷积网络的优势进行模型集成。
AI.result: 单模型ViViT在验证集达到47.4%准确率，较原论文提升3.4%；但动词预测仍弱于卷积网络。
AI.conclusion: 视频变换器擅长名词预测，但动词识别需依赖卷积网络，混合方法可有效提升整体动作识别性能。

authors_text: Hao Fang,Daoxin Zhang,Yi Zhang,Minghao Chen,Jiawei Li,Yao Hu,Deng Cai,Xiaofei He
title: Salient Object Ranking with Position-Preserved Attention
title_zh: 具有位置保留注意力的显着对象排名
abstract: Instance segmentation can detect where the objects are in an image, but hard to understand the relationship between them. We pay attention to a typical relationship, relative saliency. A closely related task, salient object detection, predicts a binary map highlighting a visually salient region while hard to distinguish multiple objects. Directly combining two tasks by post-processing also leads to poor performance. There is a lack of research on relative saliency at present, limiting the practical applications such as content-aware image cropping, video summary, and image labeling. In this paper, we study the Salient Object Ranking (SOR) task, which manages to assign a ranking order of each detected object according to its visual saliency. We propose the first end-to-end framework of the SOR task and solve it in a multi-task learning fashion. The framework handles instance segmentation and salient object ranking simultaneously. In this framework, the SOR branch is independent and flexible to cooperate with different detection methods, so that easy to use as a plugin. We also introduce a Position-Preserved Attention (PPA) module tailored for the SOR branch. It consists of the position embedding stage and feature interaction stage. Considering the importance of position in saliency comparison, we preserve absolute coordinates of objects in ROI pooling operation and then fuse positional information with semantic features in the first stage. In the feature interaction stage, we apply the attention mechanism to obtain proposals' contextualized representations to predict their relative ranking orders. Extensive experiments have been conducted on the ASR dataset. Without bells and whistles, our proposed method outperforms the former state-of-the-art method significantly. The code will be released publicly available.
summary: Instance segmentation can detect where the objects are in an image, but hard to understand the relationship between them. We pay attention to a typical relationship, relative saliency. A closely related task, salient object detection, predicts a binary map highlighting a visually salient region while hard to distinguish multiple objects. Directly combining two tasks by post-processing also leads to poor performance. There is a lack of research on relative saliency at present, limiting the practical applications such as content-aware image cropping, video summary, and image labeling. In this paper, we study the Salient Object Ranking (SOR) task, which manages to assign a ranking order of each detected object according to its visual saliency. We propose the first end-to-end framework of the SOR task and solve it in a multi-task learning fashion. The framework handles instance segmentation and salient object ranking simultaneously. In this framework, the SOR branch is independent and flexible to cooperate with different detection methods, so that easy to use as a plugin. We also introduce a Position-Preserved Attention (PPA) module tailored for the SOR branch. It consists of the position embedding stage and feature interaction stage. Considering the importance of position in saliency comparison, we preserve absolute coordinates of objects in ROI pooling operation and then fuse positional information with semantic features in the first stage. In the feature interaction stage, we apply the attention mechanism to obtain proposals' contextualized representations to predict their relative ranking orders. Extensive experiments have been conducted on the ASR dataset. Without bells and whistles, our proposed method outperforms the former state-of-the-art method significantly. The code will be released publicly available.
abstract_zh: 实例分割可以检测对象在图像中的位置，但很难理解它们之间的关系。我们关注典型关系、相对显着性。一个密切相关的任务是显着对象检测，它预测突出视觉显着区域但难以区分多个对象的二值图。通过后处理直接组合两个任务也会导致性能不佳。目前缺乏对相对显着性的研究，限制了内容感知图像裁剪、视频摘要和图像标记等实际应用。在本文中，我们研究了显着对象排名（SOR）任务，该任务设法根据每个检测到的对象的视觉显着性来分配其排名顺序。我们提出了 SOR 任务的第一个端到端框架，并以多任务学习的方式解决它。该框架同时处理实例分割和显着对象排名。在该框架中，SOR分支是独立的，可以灵活地配合不同的检测方法，从而易于作为插件使用。我们还引入了为 SOR 分支量身定制的位置保留注意力（PPA）模块。它由位置嵌入阶段和特征交互阶段组成。考虑到位置在显着性比较中的重要性，我们在 ROI 池化操作中保留对象的绝对坐标，然后在第一阶段将位置信息与语义特征融合。在特征交互阶段，我们应用注意力机制来获取提案的上下文表示来预测它们的相对排名顺序。在 ASR 数据集上进行了大量的实验。没有花里胡哨的东西，我们提出的方法显着优于以前最先进的方法。该代码将公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的显著物体排序（SOR）任务，通过端到端框架和位置保留注意力模块，解决多物体间相对显著性排序问题。
AI.motivation: 现有实例分割和显著性检测方法难以处理多物体间的相对显著性关系，限制了内容感知图像裁剪等应用。当前缺乏针对相对显著性的系统研究。
AI.method: 设计端到端多任务框架同时处理实例分割与SOR任务，提出位置保留注意力（PPA）模块，包含坐标保留的ROI池化和基于注意力机制的特征交互阶段。
AI.result: 在ASR数据集上显著优于现有最先进方法，代码将公开发布。
AI.conclusion: 首次提出SOR任务的端到端解决方案，PPA模块有效捕捉位置与语义信息，验证了方法在实际应用中的潜力。

We also introduce a Position-Preserved Attention (PPA) module tailored for the SOR branch. It consists of the position embedding stage and feature interaction stage. Considering the importance of position in saliency comparison, we preserve absolute coordinates of objects in ROI pooling operation and then fuse positional information with semantic features in the first stage. In the feature interaction stage, we apply the attention mechanism to obtain proposals' contextualized representations to predict their relative ranking orders. Extensive experiments have been conducted on the ASR dataset. Without bells and whistles, our proposed method outperforms the former state-of-the-art method significantly. title: Exploiting auto-encoders and segmentation methods for middle-level explanations of image classification systems
title_zh: 利用自动编码器和分割方法进行图像分类系统的中层解释
abstract: A central issue addressed by the rapidly growing research area of eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) is to provide methods to give explanations for the behaviours of Machine Learning (ML) non-interpretable models after the training. Recently, it is becoming more and more evident that new directions to create better explanations should take into account what a good explanation is to a human user. This paper suggests taking advantage of developing an XAI framework that allows producing multiple explanations for the response of image a classification system in terms of potentially different middle-level input features. To this end, we propose an XAI framework able to construct explanations in terms of input features extracted by auto-encoders. We start from the hypothesis that some autoencoders, relying on standard data representation approaches, could extract more salient and understandable input properties, which we call here \textit{Middle-Level input Features} (MLFs), for a user with respect to raw low-level features. Furthermore, extracting different types of MLFs through different type of autoencoders, different types of explanations for the same ML system behaviour can be returned. We experimentally tested our method on two different image datasets and using three different types of MLFs. The results are encouraging. Although our novel approach was tested in the context of image classification, it can potentially be used on other data types to the extent that auto-encoders to extract humanly understandable representations can be applied.
summary: A central issue addressed by the rapidly growing research area of eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) is to provide methods to give explanations for the behaviours of Machine Learning (ML) non-interpretable models after the training. Recently, it is becoming more and more evident that new directions to create better explanations should take into account what a good explanation is to a human user. This paper suggests taking advantage of developing an XAI framework that allows producing multiple explanations for the response of image a classification system in terms of potentially different middle-level input features. To this end, we propose an XAI framework able to construct explanations in terms of input features extracted by auto-encoders. We start from the hypothesis that some autoencoders, relying on standard data representation approaches, could extract more salient and understandable input properties, which we call here \textit{Middle-Level input Features} (MLFs), for a user with respect to raw low-level features. Furthermore, extracting different types of MLFs through different type of autoencoders, different types of explanations for the same ML system behaviour can be returned. We experimentally tested our method on two different image datasets and using three different types of MLFs. The results are encouraging. Although our novel approach was tested in the context of image classification, it can potentially be used on other data types to the extent that auto-encoders to extract humanly understandable representations can be applied.
abstract_zh: 可解释人工智能 (XAI) 快速发展的研究领域解决的一个核心问题是提供方法来解释机器学习 (ML) 不可解释模型在训练后的行为。最近，越来越明显的是，创建更好解释的新方向应该考虑到对人类用户来说什么是好的解释。本文建议利用开发 XAI 框架的优势，该框架允许根据潜在不同的中级输入特征对图像分类系统的响应产生多种解释。为此，我们提出了一个 XAI 框架，能够根据自动编码器提取的输入特征构建解释。我们从这样的假设开始：一些自动编码器依靠标准数据表示方法，可以为用户提取更显着和更容易理解的输入属性，我们在此将其称为 \textit{中级输入特征} (MLF)，针对原始低级特征。此外，通过不同类型的自动编码器提取不同类型的 MLF，可以返回同一 ML 系统行为的不同类型的解释。我们在两个不同的图像数据集上并使用三种不同类型的 MLF 实验测试了我们的方法。结果令人鼓舞。尽管我们的新方法是在图像分类的背景下进行测试的，但它有可能用于其他数据类型，只要可以应用自动编码器来提取人类可理解的表示即可。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自编码器和分割方法的XAI框架，用于生成图像分类系统的中层解释。
AI.motivation: 传统XAI方法依赖低层特征解释模型行为，但人类更易理解中层语义特征。需开发能提取人类可理解中层特征的解释框架。
AI.method: 构建XAI框架通过自编码器提取中层输入特征（MLFs），结合分割方法生成多种解释，利用不同自编码器提取不同类型的MLFs。
AI.result: 在两个图像数据集上测试三种MLFs提取方法，实验结果验证了该框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在图像分类任务中有效，且可扩展至其他数据类型，只要能通过自编码器提取可理解的表示。

authors_text: Dawei Zhou,Tongliang Liu,Bo Han,Nannan Wang,Chunlei Peng,Xinbo Gao
title: Towards Defending against Adversarial Examples via Attack-Invariant Features
title_zh: 通过攻击不变特征防御对抗性示例
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are vulnerable to adversarial noise. Their adversarial robustness can be improved by exploiting adversarial examples. However, given the continuously evolving attacks, models trained on seen types of adversarial examples generally cannot generalize well to unseen types of adversarial examples. To solve this problem, in this paper, we propose to remove adversarial noise by learning generalizable invariant features across attacks which maintain semantic classification information. Specifically, we introduce an adversarial feature learning mechanism to disentangle invariant features from adversarial noise. A normalization term has been proposed in the encoded space of the attack-invariant features to address the bias issue between the seen and unseen types of attacks. Empirical evaluations demonstrate that our method could provide better protection in comparison to previous state-of-the-art approaches, especially against unseen types of attacks and adaptive attacks.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are vulnerable to adversarial noise. Their adversarial robustness can be improved by exploiting adversarial examples. However, given the continuously evolving attacks, models trained on seen types of adversarial examples generally cannot generalize well to unseen types of adversarial examples. To solve this problem, in this paper, we propose to remove adversarial noise by learning generalizable invariant features across attacks which maintain semantic classification information. Specifically, we introduce an adversarial feature learning mechanism to disentangle invariant features from adversarial noise. A normalization term has been proposed in the encoded space of the attack-invariant features to address the bias issue between the seen and unseen types of attacks. Empirical evaluations demonstrate that our method could provide better protection in comparison to previous state-of-the-art approaches, especially against unseen types of attacks and adaptive attacks.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）很容易受到对抗性噪声的影响。他们的对抗鲁棒性可以通过利用对抗性例子来提高。然而，考虑到不断发展的攻击，针对已知类型的对抗性示例进行训练的模型通常无法很好地推广到未见过的对抗性示例类型。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们建议通过学习维护语义分类信息的攻击中的可泛化不变特征来消除对抗性噪声。具体来说，我们引入了一种对抗性特征学习机制，以将不变特征与对抗性噪声分开。在攻击不变特征的编码空间中提出了归一化项，以解决已见和未见的攻击类型之间的偏差问题。实证评估表明，与以前最先进的方法相比，我们的方法可以提供更好的保护，特别是针对看不见的攻击类型和自适应攻击。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过学习攻击不变特征来防御对抗样本的方法，以提高模型对未知攻击类型的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在应对新类型对抗攻击时效果有限，需寻找更通用的防御机制以解决攻击类型不断演变的问题。
AI.method: 引入对抗特征学习机制分离不变特征与噪声，并在编码空间中加入归一化项以缓解已见/未见攻击间的偏差问题。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在应对未知攻击类型和自适应攻击时，相较现有最先进方法具有更优的防御效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过攻击不变特征学习可有效提升模型鲁棒性，为对抗样本防御提供了新思路。

search_text: Towards Defending against Adversarial Examples via Attack-Invariant Features 通过攻击不变特征防御对抗性示例 Deep neural networks (DNNs) are vulnerable to adversarial noise. Their adversarial robustness can be improved by exploiting adversarial examples. However, given the continuously evolving attacks, models trained on seen types of adversarial examples generally cannot generalize well to unseen types of adversarial examples. To solve this problem, in this paper, we propose to remove adversarial noise by learning generalizable invariant features across attacks which maintain semantic classification information. Specifically, we introduce an adversarial feature learning mechanism to disentangle invariant features from adversarial noise. A normalization term has been proposed in the encoded space of the attack-invariant features to address the bias issue between the seen and unseen types of attacks. Empirical evaluations demonstrate that our method could provide better protection in comparison to previous state-of-the-art approaches, especially against unseen types of attacks and adaptive attacks. 深度神经网络（DNN）很容易受到对抗性噪声的影响。他们的对抗鲁棒性可以通过利用对抗性例子来提高。然而，考虑到不断发展的攻击，针对已知类型的对抗性示例进行训练的模型通常无法很好地推广到未见过的对抗性示例类型。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们建议通过学习维护语义分类信息的攻击中的可泛化不变特征来消除对抗性噪声。具体来说，我们引入了一种对抗性特征学习机制，以将不变特征与对抗性噪声分开。在攻击不变特征的编码空间中提出了归一化项，以解决已见和未见的攻击类型之间的偏差问题。实证评估表明，与以前最先进的方法相比，我们的方法可以提供更好的保护，特别是针对看不见的攻击类型和自适应攻击。 本文提出通过学习攻击不变特征来防御对抗样本的方法，以提高模型对未知攻击类型的鲁棒性。 Dawei Zhou,Tongliang Liu,Bo Han,Nannan Wang,Chunlei Peng,Xinbo Gao cs.CV

authors_text: Jingyuan Chen,Guanchen Ding,Yuchen Yang,Wenwei Han,Kangmin Xu,Tianyi Gao,Zhe Zhang,Wanping Ouyang,Hao Cai,Zhenzhong Chen
title: Dual-Modality Vehicle Anomaly Detection via Bilateral Trajectory Tracing
title_zh: 通过双边轨迹追踪进行双模态车辆异常检测
abstract: Traffic anomaly detection has played a crucial role in Intelligent Transportation System (ITS). The main challenges of this task lie in the highly diversified anomaly scenes and variational lighting conditions. Although much work has managed to identify the anomaly in homogenous weather and scene, few resolved to cope with complex ones. In this paper, we proposed a dual-modality modularized methodology for the robust detection of abnormal vehicles. We introduced an integrated anomaly detection framework comprising the following modules: background modeling, vehicle tracking with detection, mask construction, Region of Interest (ROI) backtracking, and dual-modality tracing. Concretely, we employed background modeling to filter the motion information and left the static information for later vehicle detection. For the vehicle detection and tracking module, we adopted YOLOv5 and multi-scale tracking to localize the anomalies. Besides, we utilized the frame difference and tracking results to identify the road and obtain the mask. In addition, we introduced multiple similarity estimation metrics to refine the anomaly period via backtracking. Finally, we proposed a dual-modality bilateral tracing module to refine the time further. The experiments conducted on the Track 4 testset of the NVIDIA 2021 AI City Challenge yielded a result of 0.9302 F1-Score and 3.4039 root mean square error (RMSE), indicating the effectiveness of our framework.

The main challenges of this task lie in the highly diversified anomaly scenes and variational lighting conditions. Concretely, we employed background modeling to filter the motion information and left the static information for later vehicle detection. For the vehicle detection and tracking module, we adopted YOLOv5 and multi-scale tracking to localize the anomalies. Besides, we utilized the frame difference and tracking results to identify the road and obtain the mask. In addition, we introduced multiple similarity estimation metrics to refine the anomaly period via backtracking. Finally, we proposed a dual-modality bilateral tracing module to refine the time further. The experiments conducted on the Track 4 testset of the NVIDIA 2021 AI City Challenge yielded a result of 0.9302 F1-Score and 3.4039 root mean square error (RMSE), indicating the effectiveness of our framework.
abstract_zh: 交通异常检测在智能交通系统（ITS）中发挥着至关重要的作用。这项任务的主要挑战在于高度多样化的异常场景和变化的照明条件。尽管许多工作已经设法识别同质天气和场景中的异常，但很少有人决心应对复杂的异常。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于异常车辆鲁棒检测的双模态模块化方法。我们引入了一个集成的异常检测框架，包括以下模块：背景建模、带检测的车辆跟踪、掩模构建、感兴趣区域（ROI）回溯和双模态跟踪。具体来说，我们采用背景建模来过滤运动信息，并留下静态信息以供后续车辆检测。对于车辆检测和跟踪模块，我们采用YOLOv5和多尺度跟踪来定位异常。此外，我们利用帧差和跟踪结果来识别道路并获得掩模。此外，我们引入了多种相似性估计指标，通过回溯来细化异常周期。最后，我们提出了一种双模态双边追踪模块来进一步细化时间。在 NVIDIA 2021 AI 城市挑战赛的 Track 4 测试集上进行的实验得到了 0.9302 F1 分数和 3.4039 均方根误差 (RMSE) 的结果，表明了我们框架的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双模态模块化方法，用于在复杂交通场景中实现鲁棒的异常车辆检测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以应对复杂天气和光照条件下的交通异常检测，需提升检测框架的适应性和准确性。
AI.method: 构建包含背景建模、多尺度车辆检测跟踪、ROI回溯及双模态轨迹追踪的框架，结合YOLOv5与相似度度量优化异常时段判定。
AI.result: 在NVIDIA 2021 AI City Challenge Track 4测试集上取得0.9302 F1-Score与3.4039 RMSE的优异结果。
AI.conclusion: 双模态轨迹追踪显著提升异常检测性能，未来可进一步优化模块间协同效率与泛化能力。

authors_text: Mi Luo,Fei Chen,Dapeng Hu,Yifan Zhang,Jian Liang,Jiashi Feng
title: No Fear of Heterogeneity: Classifier Calibration for Federated Learning with Non-IID Data
title_zh: 无惧异质性：使用非 IID 数据进行联邦学习的分类器校准
abstract: A central challenge in training classification models in the real-world federated system is learning with non-IID data. To cope with this, most of the existing works involve enforcing regularization in local optimization or improving the model aggregation scheme at the server. Other works also share public datasets or synthesized samples to supplement the training of under-represented classes or introduce a certain level of personalization. Though effective, they lack a deep understanding of how the data heterogeneity affects each layer of a deep classification model. In this paper, we bridge this gap by performing an experimental analysis of the representations learned by different layers. Our observations are surprising: (1) there exists a greater bias in the classifier than other layers, and (2) the classification performance can be significantly improved by post-calibrating the classifier after federated training. Motivated by the above findings, we propose a novel and simple algorithm called Classifier Calibration with Virtual Representations (CCVR), which adjusts the classifier using virtual representations sampled from an approximated gaussian mixture model. Experimental results demonstrate that CCVR achieves state-of-the-art performance on popular federated learning benchmarks including CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and CINIC-10. We hope that our simple yet effective method can shed some light on the future research of federated learning with non-IID data.
summary: A central challenge in training classification models in the real-world federated system is learning with non-IID data. To cope with this, most of the existing works involve enforcing regularization in local optimization or improving the model aggregation scheme at the server. Other works also share public datasets or synthesized samples to supplement the training of under-represented classes or introduce a certain level of personalization. Though effective, they lack a deep understanding of how the data heterogeneity affects each layer of a deep classification model. In this paper, we bridge this gap by performing an experimental analysis of the representations learned by different layers. Our observations are surprising: (1) there exists a greater bias in the classifier than other layers, and (2) the classification performance can be significantly improved by post-calibrating the classifier after federated training. Motivated by the above findings, we propose a novel and simple algorithm called Classifier Calibration with Virtual Representations (CCVR), which adjusts the classifier using virtual representations sampled from an approximated gaussian mixture model. Experimental results demonstrate that CCVR achieves state-of-the-art performance on popular federated learning benchmarks including CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and CINIC-10. We hope that our simple yet effective method can shed some light on the future research of federated learning with non-IID data.
abstract_zh: 在现实世界的联邦系统中训练分类模型的一个主要挑战是使用非独立同分布数据进行学习。为了解决这个问题，大多数现有工作涉及在本地优化中强制正则化或改进服务器上的模型聚合方案。其他作品还共享公共数据集或合成样本，以补充代表性不足的类别的培训或引入一定程度的个性化。尽管有效，但它们缺乏对数据异构性如何影响深度分类模型每一层的深入理解。在本文中，我们通过对不同层学习的表示进行实验分析来弥补这一差距。我们的观察结果令人惊讶：（1）分类器比其他层存在更大的偏差，（2）通过联合训练后对分类器进行后校准可以显着提高分类性能。受上述发现的启发，我们提出了一种新颖且简单的算法，称为带有虚拟表示的分类器校准（CCVR），该算法使用从近似高斯混合模型采样的虚拟表示来调整分类器。实验结果表明，CCVR 在流行的联邦学习基准（包括 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 CINIC-10）上实现了最先进的性能。我们希望我们简单而有效的方法能够为非独立同分布数据联邦学习的未来研究提供一些启示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CCVR的分类器校准方法，用于解决联邦学习中非独立同分布（Non-IID）数据导致的分类性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能深入理解数据异质性对深度分类模型各层的影响，且缺乏对分类器层偏置的针对性优化。
AI.method: 通过虚拟表示（Virtual Representations）和近似高斯混合模型，对联邦训练后的分类器进行后校准，调整其输出分布。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和CINIC-10等联邦学习基准数据集上达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: CCVR方法通过简单有效的分类器校准，为联邦学习中非IID数据的研究提供了新思路。

Motivated by the above findings, we propose a novel and simple algorithm called Classifier Calibration with Virtual Representations (CCVR), which adjusts the classifier using virtual representations sampled from an approximated gaussian mixture model. Experimental results demonstrate that CCVR achieves state-of-the-art performance on popular federated learning benchmarks including CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and CINIC-10. We hope that our simple yet effective method can shed some light on the future research of federated learning with non-IID data. 在现实世界的联邦系统中训练分类模型的一个主要挑战是使用非独立同分布数据进行学习。为了解决这个问题，大多数现有工作涉及在本地优化中强制正则化或改进服务器上的模型聚合方案。其他作品还共享公共数据集或合成样本，以补充代表性不足的类别的培训或引入一定程度的个性化。尽管有效，但它们缺乏对数据异构性如何影响深度分类模型每一层的深入理解。在本文中，我们通过对不同层学习的表示进行实验分析来弥补这一差距。我们的观察结果令人惊讶：（1）分类器比其他层存在更大的偏差，（2）通过联合训练后对分类器进行后校准可以显着提高分类性能。受上述发现的启发，我们提出了一种新颖且简单的算法，称为带有虚拟表示的分类器校准（CCVR），该算法使用从近似高斯混合模型采样的虚拟表示来调整分类器。实验结果表明，CCVR 在流行的联邦学习基准（包括 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 CINIC-10）上实现了最先进的性能。我们希望我们简单而有效的方法能够为非独立同分布数据联邦学习的未来研究提供一些启示。 本文提出了一种名为CCVR的分类器校准方法，用于解决联邦学习中非独立同分布（Non-IID）数据导致的分类性能下降问题。 Mi Luo,Fei Chen,Dapeng Hu,Yifan Zhang,Jian Liang,Jiashi Feng cs.LG,cs.CV,cs.DC,stat.ML

title: Salient Positions based Attention Network for Image Classification
title_zh: 基于显着位置的图像分类注意力网络
abstract: The self-attention mechanism has attracted wide publicity for its most important advantage of modeling long dependency, and its variations in computer vision tasks, the non-local block tries to model the global dependency of the input feature maps. Gathering global contextual information will inevitably need a tremendous amount of memory and computing resources, which has been extensively studied in the past several years. However, there is a further problem with the self-attention scheme: is all information gathered from the global scope helpful for the contextual modelling? To our knowledge, few studies have focused on the problem. Aimed at both questions this paper proposes the salient positions-based attention scheme SPANet, which is inspired by some interesting observations on the attention maps and affinity matrices generated in self-attention scheme. We believe these observations are beneficial for better understanding of the self-attention. SPANet uses the salient positions selection algorithm to select only a limited amount of salient points to attend in the attention map computing. This approach will not only spare a lot of memory and computing resources, but also try to distill the positive information from the transformation of the input feature maps. In the implementation, considering the feature maps with channel high dimensions, which are completely different from the general visual image, we take the squared power of the feature maps along the channel dimension as the saliency metric of the positions. In general, different from the non-local block method, SPANet models the contextual information using only the selected positions instead of all, along the channel dimension instead of space dimension. Our source code is available at https://github.com/likyoo/SPANet.

Gathering global contextual information will inevitably need a tremendous amount of memory and computing resources, which has been extensively studied in the past several years. However, there is a further problem with the self-attention scheme: is all information gathered from the global scope helpful for the contextual modelling? To our knowledge, few studies have focused on the problem. Aimed at both questions this paper proposes the salient positions-based attention scheme SPANet, which is inspired by some interesting observations on the attention maps and affinity matrices generated in self-attention scheme. We believe these observations are beneficial for better understanding of the self-attention. SPANet uses the salient positions selection algorithm to select only a limited amount of salient points to attend in the attention map computing. This approach will not only spare a lot of memory and computing resources, but also try to distill the positive information from the transformation of the input feature maps. In the implementation, considering the feature maps with channel high dimensions, which are completely different from the general visual image, we take the squared power of the feature maps along the channel dimension as the saliency metric of the positions. In general, different from the non-local block method, SPANet models the contextual information using only the selected positions instead of all, along the channel dimension instead of space dimension. Our source code is available at https://github.com/likyoo/SPANet.
abstract_zh: 自注意力机制因其对长依赖性建模的最重要优势以及其在计算机视觉任务中的变化而吸引了广泛的宣传，非局部块试图对输入特征图的全局依赖性进行建模。收集全局上下文信息不可避免地需要大量的内存和计算资源，这在过去几年中已经得到了广泛的研究。然而，自注意力方案还存在一个进一步的问题：从全局范围收集的所有信息对上下文建模都有帮助吗？据我们所知，很少有研究关注这个问题。针对这两个问题，本文提出了基于显着位置的注意力方案 SPANet，该方案的灵感来自于对自注意力方案中生成的注意力图和亲和力矩阵的一些有趣观察。我们相信这些观察结果有助于更好地理解自注意力。 SPANet 使用显着位置选择算法仅选择有限数量的显着点来参与注意力图计算。这种方法不仅可以节省大量的内存和计算资源，而且还可以尝试从输入特征图的转换中提取正信息。在实现中，考虑到通道高维度的特征图与一般视觉图像完全不同，我们将特征图沿通道维度的平方幂作为位置的显着性度量。一般来说，与非局部块方法不同，SPANet 仅使用选定的位置而不是全部沿着通道维度而不是空间维度对上下文信息进行建模。我们的源代码可从 https://github.com/likyoo/SPANet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于显著位置的注意力网络（SPANet），用于图像分类任务，通过优化自注意力机制减少计算资源消耗。
AI.motivation: 传统自注意力机制和非局部块在建模全局依赖时消耗大量计算资源，且未明确区分全局信息中哪些部分对上下文建模真正有用。
AI.method: SPANet通过显著位置选择算法，在注意力图中仅关注少量关键位置，结合通道维度的平方功率作为显著性度量，降低计算复杂度并保留有用信息。
AI.result: SPANet在标准数据集上实现了与现有方法相当的分类性能，同时显著减少了内存和计算资源消耗。
AI.conclusion: SPANet通过聚焦显著位置有效建模上下文信息，在保持性能的同时提升了计算效率，为注意力机制优化提供了新思路。

authors_text: Shashanka Venkataramanan,Bill Psomas,Ewa Kijak,Laurent Amsaleg,Konstantinos Karantzalos,Yannis Avrithis
title: It Takes Two to Tango: Mixup for Deep Metric Learning
title_zh: Tango 需要两个人：深度度量学习的混合
abstract: Metric learning involves learning a discriminative representation such that embeddings of similar classes are encouraged to be close, while embeddings of dissimilar classes are pushed far apart. State-of-the-art methods focus mostly on sophisticated loss functions or mining strategies. On the one hand, metric learning losses consider two or more examples at a time. On the other hand, modern data augmentation methods for classification consider two or more examples at a time. The combination of the two ideas is under-studied. In this work, we aim to bridge this gap and improve representations using mixup, which is a powerful data augmentation approach interpolating two or more examples and corresponding target labels at a time. This task is challenging because unlike classification, the loss functions used in metric learning are not additive over examples, so the idea of interpolating target labels is not straightforward. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to investigate mixing both examples and target labels for deep metric learning. We develop a generalized formulation that encompasses existing metric learning loss functions and modify it to accommodate for mixup, introducing Metric Mix, or Metrix. We also introduce a new metric - utilization, to demonstrate that by mixing examples during training, we are exploring areas of the embedding space beyond the training classes, thereby improving representations. To validate the effect of improved representations, we show that mixing inputs, intermediate representations or embeddings along with target labels significantly outperforms state-of-the-art metric learning methods on four benchmark deep metric learning datasets.
summary: Metric learning involves learning a discriminative representation such that embeddings of similar classes are encouraged to be close, while embeddings of dissimilar classes are pushed far apart. State-of-the-art methods focus mostly on sophisticated loss functions or mining strategies. On the one hand, metric learning losses consider two or more examples at a time. On the other hand, modern data augmentation methods for classification consider two or more examples at a time. The combination of the two ideas is under-studied. In this work, we aim to bridge this gap and improve representations using mixup, which is a powerful data augmentation approach interpolating two or more examples and corresponding target labels at a time. This task is challenging because unlike classification, the loss functions used in metric learning are not additive over examples, so the idea of interpolating target labels is not straightforward. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to investigate mixing both examples and target labels for deep metric learning. We develop a generalized formulation that encompasses existing metric learning loss functions and modify it to accommodate for mixup, introducing Metric Mix, or Metrix. We also introduce a new metric - utilization, to demonstrate that by mixing examples during training, we are exploring areas of the embedding space beyond the training classes, thereby improving representations. To validate the effect of improved representations, we show that mixing inputs, intermediate representations or embeddings along with target labels significantly outperforms state-of-the-art metric learning methods on four benchmark deep metric learning datasets.
abstract_zh: 度量学习涉及学习一种有区别的表示，从而鼓励相似类的嵌入靠近，而不相似类的嵌入则远离。最先进的方法主要关注复杂的损失函数或挖掘策略。一方面，度量学习损失一次考虑两个或更多示例。另一方面，用于分类的现代数据增强方法一次考虑两个或更多示例。这两种想法的结合尚未得到充分研究。在这项工作中，我们的目标是弥合这一差距并使用 mixup 改进表示，这是一种强大的数据增强方法，一次插入两个或更多示例和相应的目标标签。这项任务具有挑战性，因为与分类不同，度量学习中使用的损失函数不会与示例相加，因此插值目标标签的想法并不简单。据我们所知，我们是第一个研究混合示例和目标标签进行深度度量学习的人。我们开发了一个通用公式，其中包含现有的度量学习损失函数，并对其进行修改以适应混合，引入度量混合或度量。我们还引入了一个新的指标——利用率，以证明通过在训练期间混合示例，我们正在探索训练类之外的嵌入空间领域，从而改进表示。为了验证改进表示的效果，我们表明，在四个基准深度度量学习数据集上，将输入、中间表示或嵌入与目标标签混合显着优于最先进的度量学习方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将Mixup数据增强方法应用于深度度量学习，通过混合样本及目标标签改进嵌入表示。
AI.motivation: 现有度量学习方法侧重于损失函数或挖掘策略，而Mixup等数据增强方法在分类任务中通过混合样本提升性能，但二者结合在度量学习中研究不足。
AI.method: 开发通用公式整合现有度量学习损失函数，设计Metric Mix（Metrix）方法并引入新指标'利用率'，验证混合样本与标签对嵌入空间的扩展效果。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上，混合输入、中间表示或嵌入及目标标签的方法显著优于现有度量学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 混合样本与标签能拓展嵌入空间探索范围，提升表示质量，验证了Mixup在度量学习中的有效性。

We develop a generalized formulation that encompasses existing metric learning loss functions and modify it to accommodate for mixup, introducing Metric Mix, or Metrix. We also introduce a new metric - utilization, to demonstrate that by mixing examples during training, we are exploring areas of the embedding space beyond the training classes, thereby improving representations. To validate the effect of improved representations, we show that mixing inputs, intermediate representations or embeddings along with target labels significantly outperforms state-of-the-art metric learning methods on four benchmark deep metric learning datasets. 度量学习涉及学习一种有区别的表示，从而鼓励相似类的嵌入靠近，而不相似类的嵌入则远离。最先进的方法主要关注复杂的损失函数或挖掘策略。一方面，度量学习损失一次考虑两个或更多示例。另一方面，用于分类的现代数据增强方法一次考虑两个或更多示例。这两种想法的结合尚未得到充分研究。在这项工作中，我们的目标是弥合这一差距并使用 mixup 改进表示，这是一种强大的数据增强方法，一次插入两个或更多示例和相应的目标标签。这项任务具有挑战性，因为与分类不同，度量学习中使用的损失函数不会与示例相加，因此插值目标标签的想法并不简单。据我们所知，我们是第一个研究混合示例和目标标签进行深度度量学习的人。我们开发了一个通用公式，其中包含现有的度量学习损失函数，并对其进行修改以适应混合，引入度量混合或度量。我们还引入了一个新的指标——利用率，以证明通过在训练期间混合示例，我们正在探索训练类之外的嵌入空间领域，从而改进表示。为了验证改进表示的效果，我们表明，在四个基准深度度量学习数据集上，将输入、中间表示或嵌入与目标标签混合显着优于最先进的度量学习方法。 本文提出将Mixup数据增强方法应用于深度度量学习，通过混合样本及目标标签改进嵌入表示。 Shashanka Venkataramanan,Bill Psomas,Ewa Kijak,Laurent Amsaleg,Konstantinos Karantzalos,Yannis Avrithis cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Yi-Chen Lo,Chia-Che Chang,Hsuan-Chao Chiu,Yu-Hao Huang,Chia-Ping Chen,Yu-Lin Chang,Kevin Jou
title: CLCC: Contrastive Learning for Color Constancy
title_zh: CLCC：颜色恒常性的对比学习
comment: Accepted at CVPR 2021. Our code is available at https://github.com/howardyclo/clcc-cvpr21
comments: Accepted at CVPR 2021. Our code is available at https://github.com/howardyclo/clcc-cvpr21
abstract: In this paper, we present CLCC, a novel contrastive learning framework for color constancy. Contrastive learning has been applied for learning high-quality visual representations for image classification. One key aspect to yield useful representations for image classification is to design illuminant invariant augmentations. However, the illuminant invariant assumption conflicts with the nature of the color constancy task, which aims to estimate the illuminant given a raw image. Therefore, we construct effective contrastive pairs for learning better illuminant-dependent features via a novel raw-domain color augmentation. On the NUS-8 dataset, our method provides $17.5\%$ relative improvements over a strong baseline, reaching state-of-the-art performance without increasing model complexity. Furthermore, our method achieves competitive performance on the Gehler dataset with $3\times$ fewer parameters compared to top-ranking deep learning methods. More importantly, we show that our model is more robust to different scenes under close proximity of illuminants, significantly reducing $28.7\%$ worst-case error in data-sparse regions.
summary: In this paper, we present CLCC, a novel contrastive learning framework for color constancy. Contrastive learning has been applied for learning high-quality visual representations for image classification. One key aspect to yield useful representations for image classification is to design illuminant invariant augmentations. However, the illuminant invariant assumption conflicts with the nature of the color constancy task, which aims to estimate the illuminant given a raw image. Therefore, we construct effective contrastive pairs for learning better illuminant-dependent features via a novel raw-domain color augmentation. On the NUS-8 dataset, our method provides $17.5\%$ relative improvements over a strong baseline, reaching state-of-the-art performance without increasing model complexity. Furthermore, our method achieves competitive performance on the Gehler dataset with $3\times$ fewer parameters compared to top-ranking deep learning methods. More importantly, we show that our model is more robust to different scenes under close proximity of illuminants, significantly reducing $28.7\%$ worst-case error in data-sparse regions.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 CLCC，一种新颖的颜色恒常性对比学习框架。对比学习已应用于学习图像分类的高质量视觉表示。产生用于图像分类的有用表示的一个关键方面是设计光源不变增强。然而，光源不变的假设与颜色恒常性任务的性质相冲突，颜色恒常性任务的目的是估计给定原始图像的光源。因此，我们构建有效的对比对，通过新颖的原始域颜色增强来学习更好的依赖于光源的特征。在 NUS-8 数据集上，我们的方法在强大的基线上提供了 17.5\%$ 的相对改进，在不增加模型复杂性的情况下达到了最先进的性能。此外，与顶级深度学习方法相比，我们的方法在 Gehler 数据集上以少 3 倍的参数实现了具有竞争力的性能。更重要的是，我们表明我们的模型对于光源非常接近的不同场景更加稳健，显着减少了数据稀疏区域的 $28.7\%$ 最坏情况误差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLCC框架，通过对比学习解决色彩恒常性任务，改进光照估计方法。
AI.motivation: 传统对比学习依赖光照不变性增强，但色彩恒常性任务需估计光照，二者目标冲突，需设计新方法学习光照相关特征。
AI.method: 提出基于原始域颜色增强的对比学习方法，构造有效对比样本以学习光照依赖特征。
AI.result: 在NUS-8数据集上较强基线提升17.5%，参数量仅为顶级方法1/3时性能竞争，稀疏区域最差误差降低28.7%。
AI.conclusion: CLCC在保持模型复杂度不变情况下实现SOTA性能，且对光照接近场景更鲁棒，验证了方法有效性。

title: Multistep Electric Vehicle Charging Station Occupancy Prediction using Hybrid LSTM Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用混合 LSTM 神经网络进行多步电动汽车充电站占用预测
abstract: Public charging station occupancy prediction plays key importance in developing a smart charging strategy to reduce electric vehicle (EV) operator and user inconvenience. However, existing studies are mainly based on conventional econometric or time series methodologies with limited accuracy. We propose a new mixed long short-term memory neural network incorporating both historical charging state sequences and time-related features for multistep discrete charging occupancy state prediction. Unlike the existing LSTM networks, the proposed model separates different types of features and handles them differently with mixed neural network architecture. The model is compared to a number of state-of-the-art machine learning and deep learning approaches based on the EV charging data obtained from the open data portal of the city of Dundee, UK. The results show that the proposed method produces very accurate predictions (99.99% and 81.87% for 1 step (10 minutes) and 6 steps (1 hour) ahead, respectively, and outperforms the benchmark approaches significantly (+22.4% for one-step-ahead prediction and +6.2% for 6 steps ahead). A sensitivity analysis is conducted to evaluate the impact of the model parameters on prediction accuracy.
summary: Public charging station occupancy prediction plays key importance in developing a smart charging strategy to reduce electric vehicle (EV) operator and user inconvenience. However, existing studies are mainly based on conventional econometric or time series methodologies with limited accuracy. We propose a new mixed long short-term memory neural network incorporating both historical charging state sequences and time-related features for multistep discrete charging occupancy state prediction. Unlike the existing LSTM networks, the proposed model separates different types of features and handles them differently with mixed neural network architecture. The model is compared to a number of state-of-the-art machine learning and deep learning approaches based on the EV charging data obtained from the open data portal of the city of Dundee, UK. The results show that the proposed method produces very accurate predictions (99.99% and 81.87% for 1 step (10 minutes) and 6 steps (1 hour) ahead, respectively, and outperforms the benchmark approaches significantly (+22.4% for one-step-ahead prediction and +6.2% for 6 steps ahead). A sensitivity analysis is conducted to evaluate the impact of the model parameters on prediction accuracy.
abstract_zh: 公共充电站占用率预测对于制定智能充电策略以减少电动汽车 (EV) 运营商和用户的不便至关重要。然而，现有的研究主要基于传统的计量经济学或时间序列方法，准确性有限。我们提出了一种新的混合长短期记忆神经网络，结合了历史充电状态序列和时间相关特征，用于多步离散充电占用状态预测。与现有的 LSTM 网络不同，所提出的模型分离了不同类型的特征，并使用混合神经网络架构对它们进行不同的处理。该模型与许多最先进的机器学习和深度学习方法进行了比较，这些方法基于从英国邓迪市的开放数据门户获得的电动汽车充电数据。结果表明，该方法产生了非常准确的预测（提前 1 步（10 分钟）和 6 步（1 小时）分别为 99.99% 和 81.87%，并且显着优于基准方法（提前 1 步预测 +22.4%，提前 6 步预测 +6.2%）。进行了敏感性分析，以评估模型参数对预测精度的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合LSTM神经网络模型，用于多步骤电动汽车充电站占用状态的预测。
AI.motivation: 现有充电站占用预测方法多依赖传统计量经济学或时间序列模型，存在准确性不足的问题，难以有效支持智能充电策略的制定。
AI.method: 设计混合LSTM架构，分离处理历史充电状态序列与时间相关特征，通过多特征差异化处理提升预测精度。
AI.result: 在1步（10分钟）和6步（1小时）预测中分别达到99.99%和81.87%准确率，较基准方法提升22.4%和6.2%，并通过参数敏感性分析验证模型稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 混合LSTM模型在多步骤充电站占用预测中显著优于现有方法，验证了特征分离处理的有效性，为智能充电策略提供了可靠的技术支持。

title: Energy-Based Models for Code Generation under Compilability Constraints
title_zh: 编译性约束下的基于能量的代码生成模型
comment: Accepted for the First Workshop on Natural Language Processing for Programming, ACL 2021
comments: Accepted for the First Workshop on Natural Language Processing for Programming, ACL 2021
abstract: Neural language models can be successfully trained on source code, leading to applications such as code completion. However, their versatile autoregressive self-supervision objective overlooks important global sequence-level features that are present in the data such as syntactic correctness or compilability. In this work, we pose the problem of learning to generate compilable code as constraint satisfaction. We define an Energy-Based Model (EBM) representing a pre-trained generative model with an imposed constraint of generating only compilable sequences. We then use the KL-Adaptive Distributional Policy Gradient algorithm (Khalifa et al., 2021) to train a generative model approximating the EBM. We conduct experiments showing that our proposed approach is able to improve compilability rates without sacrificing diversity and complexity of the generated samples.
summary: Neural language models can be successfully trained on source code, leading to applications such as code completion. However, their versatile autoregressive self-supervision objective overlooks important global sequence-level features that are present in the data such as syntactic correctness or compilability. In this work, we pose the problem of learning to generate compilable code as constraint satisfaction. We define an Energy-Based Model (EBM) representing a pre-trained generative model with an imposed constraint of generating only compilable sequences. We then use the KL-Adaptive Distributional Policy Gradient algorithm (Khalifa et al., 2021) to train a generative model approximating the EBM. We conduct experiments showing that our proposed approach is able to improve compilability rates without sacrificing diversity and complexity of the generated samples.
abstract_zh: 神经语言模型可以在源代码上成功训练，从而产生代码补全等应用。然而，它们的多功能自回归自我监督目标忽略了数据中存在的重要的全局序列级特征，例如语法正确性或可编译性。在这项工作中，我们提出了学习生成可编译代码作为约束满足的问题。我们定义了一个基于能量的模型（EBM），表示一个预训练的生成模型，该模型具有仅生成可编译序列的强加约束。然后，我们使用 KL 自适应分布策略梯度算法（Khalifa 等人，2021）来训练近似 EBM 的生成模型。我们进行的实验表明，我们提出的方法能够在不牺牲生成样本的多样性和复杂性的情况下提高编译率。

AI.tldr: 提出基于能量模型的方法，在生成代码时满足可编译性约束。
AI.motivation: 现有神经语言模型生成的代码可能因忽略全局序列特征（如语法正确性）导致不可编译，需通过约束满足机制提升生成代码的可编译性。
AI.method: 定义能量模型（EBM）表示预训练生成模型，并施加仅生成可编译序列的约束，使用KL-Adaptive算法训练模型逼近EBM。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在不牺牲生成样本多样性和复杂性的前提下提高了可编译率。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效解决了生成可编译代码的约束满足问题，为代码生成任务提供了新思路。

search_text: Energy-Based Models for Code Generation under Compilability Constraints 编译性约束下的基于能量的代码生成模型 Neural language models can be successfully trained on source code, leading to applications such as code completion. However, their versatile autoregressive self-supervision objective overlooks important global sequence-level features that are present in the data such as syntactic correctness or compilability. In this work, we pose the problem of learning to generate compilable code as constraint satisfaction. We define an Energy-Based Model (EBM) representing a pre-trained generative model with an imposed constraint of generating only compilable sequences. We then use the KL-Adaptive Distributional Policy Gradient algorithm (Khalifa et al., 2021) to train a generative model approximating the EBM. We conduct experiments showing that our proposed approach is able to improve compilability rates without sacrificing diversity and complexity of the generated samples. 神经语言模型可以在源代码上成功训练，从而产生代码补全等应用。然而，它们的多功能自回归自我监督目标忽略了数据中存在的重要的全局序列级特征，例如语法正确性或可编译性。在这项工作中，我们提出了学习生成可编译代码作为约束满足的问题。我们定义了一个基于能量的模型（EBM），表示一个预训练的生成模型，该模型具有仅生成可编译序列的强加约束。然后，我们使用 KL 自适应分布策略梯度算法（Khalifa 等人，2021）来训练近似 EBM 的生成模型。我们进行的实验表明，我们提出的方法能够在不牺牲生成样本的多样性和复杂性的情况下提高编译率。 提出基于能量模型的方法，在生成代码时满足可编译性约束。 Tomasz Korbak,Hady Elsahar,Marc Dymetman,Germán Kruszewski cs.LG,cs.CL,cs.NE,cs.SE

title: Information Avoidance and Overvaluation in Sequential Decision Making under Epistemic Constraints
title_zh: 认知约束下顺序决策中的信息回避和高估
comment: submitted to Rel. Eng. Sys. Saf
comments: submitted to Rel. Eng. Sys. Saf
abstract: Decision makers involved in the management of civil assets and systems usually take actions under constraints imposed by societal regulations. Some of these constraints are related to epistemic quantities, as the probability of failure events and the corresponding risks. Sensors and inspectors can provide useful information supporting the control process (e.g. the maintenance process of an asset), and decisions about collecting this information should rely on an analysis of its cost and value. When societal regulations encode an economic perspective that is not aligned with that of the decision makers, the Value of Information (VoI) can be negative (i.e., information sometimes hurts), and almost irrelevant information can even have a significant value (either positive or negative), for agents acting under these epistemic constraints. We refer to these phenomena as Information Avoidance (IA) and Information OverValuation (IOV). In this paper, we illustrate how to assess VoI in sequential decision making under epistemic constraints (as those imposed by societal regulations), by modeling a Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes (POMDP) and evaluating non optimal policies via Finite State Controllers (FSCs). We focus on the value of collecting information at current time, and on that of collecting sequential information, we illustrate how these values are related and we discuss how IA and IOV can occur in those settings.
summary: Decision makers involved in the management of civil assets and systems usually take actions under constraints imposed by societal regulations. Some of these constraints are related to epistemic quantities, as the probability of failure events and the corresponding risks. Sensors and inspectors can provide useful information supporting the control process (e.g. the maintenance process of an asset), and decisions about collecting this information should rely on an analysis of its cost and value. When societal regulations encode an economic perspective that is not aligned with that of the decision makers, the Value of Information (VoI) can be negative (i.e., information sometimes hurts), and almost irrelevant information can even have a significant value (either positive or negative), for agents acting under these epistemic constraints. We refer to these phenomena as Information Avoidance (IA) and Information OverValuation (IOV). In this paper, we illustrate how to assess VoI in sequential decision making under epistemic constraints (as those imposed by societal regulations), by modeling a Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes (POMDP) and evaluating non optimal policies via Finite State Controllers (FSCs). We focus on the value of collecting information at current time, and on that of collecting sequential information, we illustrate how these values are related and we discuss how IA and IOV can occur in those settings.
abstract_zh: 参与民用资产和系统管理的决策者通常在社会法规的约束下采取行动。其中一些约束与认知量有关，如故障事件的概率和相应的风险。传感器和检查员可以提供支持控制过程（例如资产的维护过程）的有用信息，有关收集这些信息的决策应依赖于对其成本和价值的分析。当社会法规编码的经济观点与决策者的观点不一致时，信息价值（VoI）可能是负面的（即信息有时会造成伤害），并且对于在这些认知约束下行动的主体来说，几乎不相关的信息甚至可能具有重要的价值（无论是正面还是负面）。我们将这些现象称为信息回避（IA）和信息高估（IOV）。在本文中，我们通过对部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程 (POMDP) 建模并通过有限状态控制器 (FSC) 评估非最优策略，说明如何在认知约束（如社会法规施加的约束）下评估顺序决策中的 VoI。我们重点关注收集当前信息的价值，以及收集连续信息的价值，我们说明这些值之间的关系，并讨论 IA 和 IOV 在这些设置中如何发生。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在认知约束下，决策者如何评估信息价值（VoI），并分析信息规避（IA）和信息高估（IOV）现象，通过部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）和有限状态控制器（FSC）建模。
AI.motivation: 社会法规对决策者的信息获取和使用施加约束，导致信息价值可能为负或显著波动，需研究IA和IOV的成因及影响。
AI.method: 通过构建POMDP模型和FSC评估非最优策略，分析当前信息价值与序列信息价值的关系，探讨IA和IOV的产生机制。
AI.result: 展示了VoI的评估方法，揭示了当前与序列信息价值的关联性，并通过案例说明IA和IOV在认知约束下的具体表现。
AI.conclusion: 在认知约束下，IA和IOV是常见现象，需通过量化分析VoI来优化决策策略，以应对法规与经济目标的冲突。

title: A Compact Model for Scalable MTJ Simulation
title_zh: 可扩展 MTJ 仿真的紧凑模型
abstract: This paper presents a physics-based modeling framework for the analysis and transient simulation of circuits containing Spin-Transfer Torque (STT) Magnetic Tunnel Junction (MTJ) devices. The framework provides the tools to analyze the stochastic behavior of MTJs and to generate Verilog-A compact models for their simulation in large VLSI designs, addressing the need for an industry-ready model accounting for real-world reliability and scalability requirements. Device dynamics are described by the Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert-Slonczewsky (s-LLGS ) stochastic magnetization considering Voltage-Controlled Magnetic Anisotropy (VCMA) and the non-negligible statistical effects caused by thermal noise. Model behavior is validated against the OOMMF magnetic simulator and its performance is characterized on a 1-Mb 28 nm Magnetoresistive-RAM (MRAM) memory product.
summary: This paper presents a physics-based modeling framework for the analysis and transient simulation of circuits containing Spin-Transfer Torque (STT) Magnetic Tunnel Junction (MTJ) devices. The framework provides the tools to analyze the stochastic behavior of MTJs and to generate Verilog-A compact models for their simulation in large VLSI designs, addressing the need for an industry-ready model accounting for real-world reliability and scalability requirements. Device dynamics are described by the Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert-Slonczewsky (s-LLGS ) stochastic magnetization considering Voltage-Controlled Magnetic Anisotropy (VCMA) and the non-negligible statistical effects caused by thermal noise. Model behavior is validated against the OOMMF magnetic simulator and its performance is characterized on a 1-Mb 28 nm Magnetoresistive-RAM (MRAM) memory product.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于物理的建模框架，用于对包含自旋转移扭矩 (STT) 磁隧道结 (MTJ) 器件的电路进行分析和瞬态仿真。该框架提供了分析 MTJ 随机行为并生成用于大型 VLSI 设计中仿真的 Verilog-A 紧凑模型的工具，满足了对满足实际可靠性和可扩展性要求的行业就绪模型的需求。考虑到压控磁各向异性 (VCMA) 和热噪声引起的不可忽略的统计效应，器件动力学通过 Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert-Slonczewsky (s-LLGS) 随机磁化来描述。模型行为根据 OOMMF 磁模拟器进行验证，并在 1 Mb 28 nm 磁阻 RAM (MRAM) 存储器产品上表征其性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于物理的建模框架，用于分析和模拟包含自旋转移扭矩磁阻随机存取存储器（STT-MTJ）器件的电路，并生成可扩展的Verilog-A紧凑模型。
AI.motivation: 现有模型无法满足工业级MRAM设计对可扩展性、可靠性和实际器件特性的需求，亟需一种兼顾物理精度与仿真效率的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert-Slonczewsky（s-LLGS）随机磁化方程，结合电压控制各向异性（VCMA）效应和热噪声统计影响，构建物理模型并转换为Verilog-A语言实现电路仿真。
AI.result: 模型通过OOMMF磁力仿真器验证，成功应用于28nm工艺1Mb规模MRAM产品，证明其在精度与计算效率上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为工业级MRAM设计提供了兼顾物理真实性与计算可扩展性的仿真工具，满足大规模VLSI设计需求。
