motivation: 现有模型无法满足工业级MRAM设计对可扩展性、可靠性和实际器件特性的需求，亟需一种兼顾物理精度与仿真效率的解决方案。
method: 基于Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert-Slonczewsky（s-LLGS）随机磁化方程，结合电压控制各向异性（VCMA）效应和热噪声统计影响，构建物理模型并转换为Verilog-A语言实现电路仿真。
result: 模型通过OOMMF磁力仿真器验证，成功应用于28nm工艺1Mb规模MRAM产品，证明其在精度与计算效率上的有效性。
conclusion: 该框架为工业级MRAM设计提供了兼顾物理真实性与计算可扩展性的仿真工具，满足大规模VLSI设计需求。
search_text: A Compact Model for Scalable MTJ Simulation 可扩展 MTJ 仿真的紧凑模型 This paper presents a physics-based modeling framework for the analysis and transient simulation of circuits containing Spin-Transfer Torque (STT) Magnetic Tunnel Junction (MTJ) devices. The framework provides the tools to analyze the stochastic behavior of MTJs and to generate Verilog-A compact models for their simulation in large VLSI designs, addressing the need for an industry-ready model accounting for real-world reliability and scalability requirements. Device dynamics are described by the Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert-Slonczewsky (s-LLGS ) stochastic magnetization considering Voltage-Controlled Magnetic Anisotropy (VCMA) and the non-negligible statistical effects caused by thermal noise. Model behavior is validated against the OOMMF magnetic simulator and its performance is characterized on a 1-Mb 28 nm Magnetoresistive-RAM (MRAM) memory product. 本文提出了一种基于物理的建模框架，用于对包含自旋转移扭矩 (STT) 磁隧道结 (MTJ) 器件的电路进行分析和瞬态仿真。该框架提供了分析 MTJ 随机行为并生成用于大型 VLSI 设计中仿真的 Verilog-A 紧凑模型的工具，满足了对满足实际可靠性和可扩展性要求的行业就绪模型的需求。考虑到压控磁各向异性 (VCMA) 和热噪声引起的不可忽略的统计效应，器件动力学通过 Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert-Slonczewsky (s-LLGS) 随机磁化来描述。模型行为根据 OOMMF 磁模拟器进行验证，并在 1 Mb 28 nm 磁阻 RAM (MRAM) 存储器产品上表征其性能。 本文提出了一种基于物理的建模框架，用于分析和模拟包含自旋转移扭矩磁阻随机存取存储器（STT-MTJ）器件的电路，并生成可扩展的Verilog-A紧凑模型。 Fernando García-Redondo,Pranay Prabhat,Mudit Bhargava,Cyrille Dray cs.ET

title: Understanding Softmax Confidence and Uncertainty
title_zh: 了解 Softmax 置信度和不确定性
abstract: It is often remarked that neural networks fail to increase their uncertainty when predicting on data far from the training distribution. Yet naively using softmax confidence as a proxy for uncertainty achieves modest success in tasks exclusively testing for this, e.g., out-of-distribution (OOD) detection. This paper investigates this contradiction, identifying two implicit biases that do encourage softmax confidence to correlate with epistemic uncertainty: 1) Approximately optimal decision boundary structure, and 2) Filtering effects of deep networks. It describes why low-dimensional intuitions about softmax confidence are misleading. Diagnostic experiments quantify reasons softmax confidence can fail, finding that extrapolations are less to blame than overlap between training and OOD data in final-layer representations. Pre-trained/fine-tuned networks reduce this overlap.
summary: It is often remarked that neural networks fail to increase their uncertainty when predicting on data far from the training distribution. Yet naively using softmax confidence as a proxy for uncertainty achieves modest success in tasks exclusively testing for this, e.g., out-of-distribution (OOD) detection. This paper investigates this contradiction, identifying two implicit biases that do encourage softmax confidence to correlate with epistemic uncertainty: 1) Approximately optimal decision boundary structure, and 2) Filtering effects of deep networks. It describes why low-dimensional intuitions about softmax confidence are misleading. Diagnostic experiments quantify reasons softmax confidence can fail, finding that extrapolations are less to blame than overlap between training and OOD data in final-layer representations. Pre-trained/fine-tuned networks reduce this overlap.
abstract_zh: 人们经常说，神经网络在预测远离训练分布的数据时无法增加其不确定性。然而，天真地使用 softmax 置信度作为不确定性的代理，在专门测试这一点的任务中取得了一定的成功，例如分布外 (OOD) 检测。本文研究了这一矛盾，确定了两个确实鼓励 softmax 置信度与认知不确定性相关的隐含偏差：1）近似最优的决策边界结构，2）深层网络的过滤效应。它描述了为什么关于 softmax 置信度的低维直觉会产生误导。诊断实验量化了 softmax 置信度失败的原因，发现外推法比最终层表示中训练和 OOD 数据之间的重叠更容易受到指责。预先训练/微调的网络减少了这种重叠。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了softmax置信度与不确定性之间的关系，并分析其在OOD检测中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在OOD检测中表现矛盾，需理解softmax置信度为何能有效反映不确定性。
AI.method: 通过分析两个隐含偏差（决策边界结构、深度网络的过滤效应）及实验量化失败原因。
AI.result: 实验表明，训练与OOD数据在最终层表示的重叠是softmax置信度失效的主要原因，预训练网络可缓解此问题。
AI.conclusion: softmax置信度与不确定性关联受隐含偏差影响，重叠问题比外推更关键，预训练有助于缓解。

authors_text: Jens Petersen,Gregor Köhler,David Zimmerer,Fabian Isensee,Paul F. Jäger,Klaus H. Maier-Hein
title: GP-ConvCNP: Better Generalization for Convolutional Conditional Neural Processes on Time Series Data
title_zh: GP-ConvCNP：时间序列数据上卷积条件神经过程的更好泛化
abstract: Neural Processes (NPs) are a family of conditional generative models that are able to model a distribution over functions, in a way that allows them to perform predictions at test time conditioned on a number of context points. A recent addition to this family, Convolutional Conditional Neural Processes (ConvCNP), have shown remarkable improvement in performance over prior art, but we find that they sometimes struggle to generalize when applied to time series data. In particular, they are not robust to distribution shifts and fail to extrapolate observed patterns into the future. By incorporating a Gaussian Process into the model, we are able to remedy this and at the same time improve performance within distribution. As an added benefit, the Gaussian Process reintroduces the possibility to sample from the model, a key feature of other members in the NP family.
summary: Neural Processes (NPs) are a family of conditional generative models that are able to model a distribution over functions, in a way that allows them to perform predictions at test time conditioned on a number of context points. A recent addition to this family, Convolutional Conditional Neural Processes (ConvCNP), have shown remarkable improvement in performance over prior art, but we find that they sometimes struggle to generalize when applied to time series data. In particular, they are not robust to distribution shifts and fail to extrapolate observed patterns into the future. By incorporating a Gaussian Process into the model, we are able to remedy this and at the same time improve performance within distribution. As an added benefit, the Gaussian Process reintroduces the possibility to sample from the model, a key feature of other members in the NP family.
abstract_zh: 神经过程 (NP) 是一系列条件生成模型，能够对函数的分布进行建模，从而允许它们在测试时根据多个上下文点执行预测。该家族的最新成员——卷积条件神经过程（ConvCNP），与现有技术相比，在性能上表现出了显着的改进，但我们发现，当应用于时间序列数据时，它们有时很难泛化。特别是，它们对分布变化不具有鲁棒性，并且无法将观察到的模式推断到未来。通过将高斯过程合并到模型中，我们能够解决这个问题，同时提高分布的性能。作为一个额外的好处，高斯过程重新引入了从模型中采样的可能性，这是 NP 系列其他成员的一个关键特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GP-ConvCNP模型，通过引入高斯过程改进ConvCNP在时间序列数据上的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有ConvCNP模型在处理时间序列数据时存在分布偏移不鲁棒和未来模式外推失败的问题，需提升其泛化能力。
AI.method: 将高斯过程整合到ConvCNP框架中，增强模型对分布偏移的鲁棒性并恢复采样能力。
AI.result: 实验表明新方法在分布内和分布外场景均优于原ConvCNP，且成功实现未来模式外推。
AI.conclusion: GP-ConvCNP通过高斯过程有效解决了时间序列建模中的泛化难题，为NP家族提供了更强大的工具。

authors_text: Kevin D. McCay,Edmond S. L. Ho,Dimitrios Sakkos,Wai Lok Woo,Claire Marcroft,Patricia Dulson,Nicholas D. Embleton
title: Towards Explainable Abnormal Infant Movements Identification: A Body-part Based Prediction and Visualisation Framework
title_zh: 迈向可解释的异常婴儿运动识别：基于身体部位的预测和可视化框架
comment: Proceedings of the 2021 IEEE EMBS International Conference on Biomedical & Health Informatics (BHI), accepted, 2021
comments: Proceedings of the 2021 IEEE EMBS International Conference on Biomedical & Health Informatics (BHI), accepted, 2021
abstract: Providing early diagnosis of cerebral palsy (CP) is key to enhancing the developmental outcomes for those affected. Diagnostic tools such as the General Movements Assessment (GMA), have produced promising results in early diagnosis, however these manual methods can be laborious. In this paper, we propose a new framework for the automated classification of infant body movements, based upon the GMA, which unlike previous methods, also incorporates a visualization framework to aid with interpretability. Our proposed framework segments extracted features to detect the presence of Fidgety Movements (FMs) associated with the GMA spatiotemporally. These features are then used to identify the body-parts with the greatest contribution towards a classification decision and highlight the related body-part segment providing visual feedback to the user. We quantitatively compare the proposed framework's classification performance with several other methods from the literature and qualitatively evaluate the visualization's veracity. Our experimental results show that the proposed method performs more robustly than comparable techniques in this setting whilst simultaneously providing relevant visual interpretability.
summary: Providing early diagnosis of cerebral palsy (CP) is key to enhancing the developmental outcomes for those affected. Diagnostic tools such as the General Movements Assessment (GMA), have produced promising results in early diagnosis, however these manual methods can be laborious. In this paper, we propose a new framework for the automated classification of infant body movements, based upon the GMA, which unlike previous methods, also incorporates a visualization framework to aid with interpretability. Our proposed framework segments extracted features to detect the presence of Fidgety Movements (FMs) associated with the GMA spatiotemporally. These features are then used to identify the body-parts with the greatest contribution towards a classification decision and highlight the related body-part segment providing visual feedback to the user. We quantitatively compare the proposed framework's classification performance with several other methods from the literature and qualitatively evaluate the visualization's veracity. Our experimental results show that the proposed method performs more robustly than comparable techniques in this setting whilst simultaneously providing relevant visual interpretability.
abstract_zh: 提供脑瘫 (CP) 的早期诊断是改善受影响者发育结果的关键。全身运动评估 (GMA) 等诊断工具在早期诊断方面取得了可喜的成果，但这些手动方法可能很费力。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 GMA 的婴儿身体运动自动分类的新框架，与以前的方法不同，它还结合了可视化框架来帮助解释。我们提出的框架片段提取特征来检测与 GMA 时空相关的烦躁运动 (FM) 的存在。然后，使用这些特征来识别对分类决策贡献最大的身体部位，并突出显示相关的身体部位片段，为用户提供视觉反馈。我们将所提出的框架的分类性能与文献中的其他几种方法进行定量比较，并定性评估可视化的准确性。我们的实验结果表明，所提出的方法在这种情况下比同类技术表现更稳健，同时提供相关的视觉可解释性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于身体部位的预测与可视化框架，用于自动识别婴儿异常运动，以辅助脑瘫的早期诊断。
AI.motivation: 现有的脑瘫早期诊断方法（如通用运动评估）依赖人工操作，效率低且主观性强，亟需自动化且具有可解释性的工具。
AI.method: 框架通过分割时空特征检测与脑瘫相关的‘抖动运动’，识别对分类贡献最大的身体部位，并通过可视化反馈辅助用户理解决策过程。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在分类性能上优于现有技术，同时提供的可视化解释具有临床可信度。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过结合自动化分类与可视化解释，为脑瘫早期诊断提供了更高效、可解释的解决方案。

ai_content_json.method: 框架通过分割时空特征检测与脑瘫相关的‘抖动运动’，识别对分类贡献最大的身体部位，并通过可视化反馈辅助用户理解决策过程。
ai_content_json.result: 实验表明，该方法在分类性能上优于现有技术，同时提供的可视化解释具有临床可信度。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该框架通过结合自动化分类与可视化解释，为脑瘫早期诊断提供了更高效、可解释的解决方案。

search_text: Towards Explainable Abnormal Infant Movements Identification: A Body-part Based Prediction and Visualisation Framework 迈向可解释的异常婴儿运动识别：基于身体部位的预测和可视化框架 Providing early diagnosis of cerebral palsy (CP) is key to enhancing the developmental outcomes for those affected. Diagnostic tools such as the General Movements Assessment (GMA), have produced promising results in early diagnosis, however these manual methods can be laborious. In this paper, we propose a new framework for the automated classification of infant body movements, based upon the GMA, which unlike previous methods, also incorporates a visualization framework to aid with interpretability. Our proposed framework segments extracted features to detect the presence of Fidgety Movements (FMs) associated with the GMA spatiotemporally. These features are then used to identify the body-parts with the greatest contribution towards a classification decision and highlight the related body-part segment providing visual feedback to the user. We quantitatively compare the proposed framework's classification performance with several other methods from the literature and qualitatively evaluate the visualization's veracity. Our experimental results show that the proposed method performs more robustly than comparable techniques in this setting whilst simultaneously providing relevant visual interpretability. 提供脑瘫 (CP) 的早期诊断是改善受影响者发育结果的关键。全身运动评估 (GMA) 等诊断工具在早期诊断方面取得了可喜的成果，但这些手动方法可能很费力。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 GMA 的婴儿身体运动自动分类的新框架，与以前的方法不同，它还结合了可视化框架来帮助解释。我们提出的框架片段提取特征来检测与 GMA 时空相关的烦躁运动 (FM) 的存在。然后，使用这些特征来识别对分类决策贡献最大的身体部位，并突出显示相关的身体部位片段，为用户提供视觉反馈。我们将所提出的框架的分类性能与文献中的其他几种方法进行定量比较，并定性评估可视化的准确性。我们的实验结果表明，所提出的方法在这种情况下比同类技术表现更稳健，同时提供相关的视觉可解释性。 本文提出了一种基于身体部位的预测与可视化框架，用于自动识别婴儿异常运动，以辅助脑瘫的早期诊断。 Kevin D. McCay,Edmond S. L. Ho,Dimitrios Sakkos,Wai Lok Woo,Claire Marcroft,Patricia Dulson,Nicholas D. Embleton cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Kai-Chieh Liang,Lei Bi,Ashnil Kumar,Michael Fulham,Jinman Kim
title: Spatio-Temporal Dual-Stream Neural Network for Sequential Whole-Body PET Segmentation
title_zh: 用于连续全身 PET 分割的时空双流神经网络
abstract: Sequential whole-body 18F-Fluorodeoxyglucose (FDG) positron emission tomography (PET) scans are regarded as the imaging modality of choice for the assessment of treatment response in the lymphomas because they detect treatment response when there may not be changes on anatomical imaging. Any computerized analysis of lymphomas in whole-body PET requires automatic segmentation of the studies so that sites of disease can be quantitatively monitored over time. State-of-the-art PET image segmentation methods are based on convolutional neural networks (CNNs) given their ability to leverage annotated datasets to derive high-level features about the disease process. Such methods, however, focus on PET images from a single time-point and discard information from other scans or are targeted towards specific organs and cannot cater for the multiple structures in whole-body PET images. In this study, we propose a spatio-temporal 'dual-stream' neural network (ST-DSNN) to segment sequential whole-body PET scans. Our ST-DSNN learns and accumulates image features from the PET images done over time. The accumulated image features are used to enhance the organs / structures that are consistent over time to allow easier identification of sites of active lymphoma. Our results show that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art PET image segmentation methods.
summary: Sequential whole-body 18F-Fluorodeoxyglucose (FDG) positron emission tomography (PET) scans are regarded as the imaging modality of choice for the assessment of treatment response in the lymphomas because they detect treatment response when there may not be changes on anatomical imaging. Any computerized analysis of lymphomas in whole-body PET requires automatic segmentation of the studies so that sites of disease can be quantitatively monitored over time. State-of-the-art PET image segmentation methods are based on convolutional neural networks (CNNs) given their ability to leverage annotated datasets to derive high-level features about the disease process. Such methods, however, focus on PET images from a single time-point and discard information from other scans or are targeted towards specific organs and cannot cater for the multiple structures in whole-body PET images. In this study, we propose a spatio-temporal 'dual-stream' neural network (ST-DSNN) to segment sequential whole-body PET scans. Our ST-DSNN learns and accumulates image features from the PET images done over time. The accumulated image features are used to enhance the organs / structures that are consistent over time to allow easier identification of sites of active lymphoma. Our results show that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art PET image segmentation methods.
abstract_zh: 连续全身 18F-氟脱氧葡萄糖 (FDG) 正电子发射断层扫描 (PET) 扫描被认为是评估淋巴瘤治疗反应的首选成像方式，因为它们在解剖成像可能没有变化的情况下检测治疗反应。全身 PET 中淋巴瘤的任何计算机化分析都需要对研究进行自动分段，以便可以随着时间的推移对疾病部位进行定量监测。最先进的 PET 图像分割方法基于卷积神经网络 (CNN)，因为它们能够利用带注释的数据集来得出有关疾病过程的高级特征。然而，此类方法侧重于单个时间点的 PET 图像，而丢弃来自其他扫描的信息，或者针对特定器官，无法满足全身 PET 图像中的多个结构。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种时空“双流”神经网络（ST-DSNN）来分段连续全身 PET 扫描。我们的 ST-DSNN 从一段时间内完成的 PET 图像中学习并积累图像特征。累积的图像特征用于增强随时间推移保持一致的器官/结构，以便更容易识别活动性淋巴瘤的部位。我们的结果表明，我们的方法优于最先进的 PET 图像分割方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种时空双流神经网络（ST-DSNN），用于对连续全身PET扫描进行自动分割，以量化监测淋巴瘤治疗反应。
AI.motivation: 现有PET分割方法仅针对单时间点图像或特定器官，无法有效利用多时间点数据及全身多结构信息，限制了治疗反应的动态监测。
AI.method: 设计时空双流神经网络，通过空间流提取单次扫描的局部特征，时间流整合多时间点的全局动态信息，联合优化全身结构分割。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在分割精度上优于现有最先进的PET图像分割技术。
AI.conclusion: ST-DSNN通过时空特征融合有效提升了全身PET分割性能，为淋巴瘤治疗动态监测提供了可靠工具。

Any computerized analysis of lymphomas in whole-body PET requires automatic segmentation of the studies so that sites of disease can be quantitatively monitored over time. Our ST-DSNN learns and accumulates image features from the PET images done over time. The accumulated image features are used to enhance the organs / structures that are consistent over time to allow easier identification of sites of active lymphoma. authors_text: Xiangyu Liu,Hangtian Jia,Ying Wen,Yaodong Yang,Yujing Hu,Yingfeng Chen,Changjie Fan,Zhipeng Hu
title: Unifying Behavioral and Response Diversity for Open-ended Learning in Zero-sum Games
title_zh: 统一零和博弈中开放式学习的行为和反应多样性
comment: We investigate a new perspective on unifying diversity measures for open-ended learning in zero-sum games, which shapes an auto-curriculum to induce diverse yet effective behaviors
comments: We investigate a new perspective on unifying diversity measures for open-ended learning in zero-sum games, which shapes an auto-curriculum to induce diverse yet effective behaviors
abstract: Measuring and promoting policy diversity is critical for solving games with strong non-transitive dynamics where strategic cycles exist, and there is no consistent winner (e.g., Rock-Paper-Scissors). With that in mind, maintaining a pool of diverse policies via open-ended learning is an attractive solution, which can generate auto-curricula to avoid being exploited. However, in conventional open-ended learning algorithms, there are no widely accepted definitions for diversity, making it hard to construct and evaluate the diverse policies. In this work, we summarize previous concepts of diversity and work towards offering a unified measure of diversity in multi-agent open-ended learning to include all elements in Markov games, based on both Behavioral Diversity (BD) and Response Diversity (RD). At the trajectory distribution level, we re-define BD in the state-action space as the discrepancies of occupancy measures. For the reward dynamics, we propose RD to characterize diversity through the responses of policies when encountering different opponents. We also show that many current diversity measures fall in one of the categories of BD or RD but not both. With this unified diversity measure, we design the corresponding diversity-promoting objective and population effectivity when seeking the best responses in open-ended learning. We validate our methods in both relatively simple games like matrix game, non-transitive mixture model, and the complex \textit{Google Research Football} environment. The population found by our methods reveals the lowest exploitability, highest population effectivity in matrix game and non-transitive mixture model, as well as the largest goal difference when interacting with opponents of various levels in \textit{Google Research Football}.
summary: Measuring and promoting policy diversity is critical for solving games with strong non-transitive dynamics where strategic cycles exist, and there is no consistent winner (e.g., Rock-Paper-Scissors). With that in mind, maintaining a pool of diverse policies via open-ended learning is an attractive solution, which can generate auto-curricula to avoid being exploited. However, in conventional open-ended learning algorithms, there are no widely accepted definitions for diversity, making it hard to construct and evaluate the diverse policies. In this work, we summarize previous concepts of diversity and work towards offering a unified measure of diversity in multi-agent open-ended learning to include all elements in Markov games, based on both Behavioral Diversity (BD) and Response Diversity (RD). At the trajectory distribution level, we re-define BD in the state-action space as the discrepancies of occupancy measures. For the reward dynamics, we propose RD to characterize diversity through the responses of policies when encountering different opponents. We also show that many current diversity measures fall in one of the categories of BD or RD but not both. With this unified diversity measure, we design the corresponding diversity-promoting objective and population effectivity when seeking the best responses in open-ended learning. We validate our methods in both relatively simple games like matrix game, non-transitive mixture model, and the complex \textit{Google Research Football} environment. The population found by our methods reveals the lowest exploitability, highest population effectivity in matrix game and non-transitive mixture model, as well as the largest goal difference when interacting with opponents of various levels in \textit{Google Research Football}.
abstract_zh: 衡量和促进政策多样性对于解决具有强非传递性动态的博弈至关重要，其中存在战略循环，并且没有一致的赢家（例如，剪刀石头布）。考虑到这一点，通过开放式学习维持多样化政策库是一个有吸引力的解决方案，它可以生成自动课程以避免被利用。然而，在传统的开放式学习算法中，没有广泛接受的多样性定义，使得构建和评估多样性策略变得困难。在这项工作中，我们总结了以前的多样性概念，并致力于在多智能体开放式学习中提供统一的多样性衡量标准，以基于行为多样性（BD）和响应多样性（RD）包含马尔可夫博弈中的所有元素。在轨迹分布层面，我们将状态-动作空间中的 BD 重新定义为占用度量的差异。对于奖励动态，我们提出RD通过遇到不同对手时策略的反应来表征多样性。我们还表明，当前的许多多样性措施属于 BD 或 RD 类别之一，但不能同时属于两者。通过这种统一的多样性衡量标准，我们在寻求开放式学习中的最佳反应时设计了相应的多样性促进目标和群体有效性。我们在相对简单的游戏（如矩阵游戏、非传递混合模型）和复杂的 \textit{Google Research Football} 环境中验证了我们的方法。我们的方法发现的群体揭示了矩阵博弈和非传递性混合模型中最低的可利用性、最高的群体有效性，以及与 \textit{Google Research Football} 中不同级别的对手互动时的最大进球差。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过统一行为多样性（BD）和响应多样性（RD）的度量，解决零和博弈中开放学习环境下策略多样性缺乏有效评估的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统开放学习算法缺乏广泛接受的多样性定义，导致难以构建和评估多样化的策略，尤其在存在战略循环的非传递性博弈中容易被利用。
AI.method: 重新定义轨迹分布层面的行为多样性为状态-动作空间的占用度量差异，并提出响应多样性以表征策略在面对不同对手时的反应差异，结合两者形成统一多样性度量。
AI.result: 在矩阵博弈、非传递混合模型及Google Research Football环境中，所提方法表现出最低的可被利用性、最高的种群有效性以及与不同水平对手交互时最大的得分差异。
AI.conclusion: 统一的多样性度量有效提升了开放学习中策略的多样性和种群效能，为非传递性博弈提供了更优的解决方案。

method: 重新定义轨迹分布层面的行为多样性为状态-动作空间的占用度量差异，并提出响应多样性以表征策略在面对不同对手时的反应差异，结合两者形成统一多样性度量。
result: 在矩阵博弈、非传递混合模型及Google Research Football环境中，所提方法表现出最低的可被利用性、最高的种群有效性以及与不同水平对手交互时最大的得分差异。
conclusion: 统一的多样性度量有效提升了开放学习中策略的多样性和种群效能，为非传递性博弈提供了更优的解决方案。
search_text: Unifying Behavioral and Response Diversity for Open-ended Learning in Zero-sum Games 统一零和博弈中开放式学习的行为和反应多样性 Measuring and promoting policy diversity is critical for solving games with strong non-transitive dynamics where strategic cycles exist, and there is no consistent winner (e.g., Rock-Paper-Scissors). With that in mind, maintaining a pool of diverse policies via open-ended learning is an attractive solution, which can generate auto-curricula to avoid being exploited. However, in conventional open-ended learning algorithms, there are no widely accepted definitions for diversity, making it hard to construct and evaluate the diverse policies. In this work, we summarize previous concepts of diversity and work towards offering a unified measure of diversity in multi-agent open-ended learning to include all elements in Markov games, based on both Behavioral Diversity (BD) and Response Diversity (RD). At the trajectory distribution level, we re-define BD in the state-action space as the discrepancies of occupancy measures. For the reward dynamics, we propose RD to characterize diversity through the responses of policies when encountering different opponents. We also show that many current diversity measures fall in one of the categories of BD or RD but not both. With this unified diversity measure, we design the corresponding diversity-promoting objective and population effectivity when seeking the best responses in open-ended learning. We validate our methods in both relatively simple games like matrix game, non-transitive mixture model, and the complex \textit{Google Research Football} environment. The population found by our methods reveals the lowest exploitability, highest population effectivity in matrix game and non-transitive mixture model, as well as the largest goal difference when interacting with opponents of various levels in \textit{Google Research Football}. 衡量和促进政策多样性对于解决具有强非传递性动态的博弈至关重要，其中存在战略循环，并且没有一致的赢家（例如，剪刀石头布）。考虑到这一点，通过开放式学习维持多样化政策库是一个有吸引力的解决方案，它可以生成自动课程以避免被利用。然而，在传统的开放式学习算法中，没有广泛接受的多样性定义，使得构建和评估多样性策略变得困难。在这项工作中，我们总结了以前的多样性概念，并致力于在多智能体开放式学习中提供统一的多样性衡量标准，以基于行为多样性（BD）和响应多样性（RD）包含马尔可夫博弈中的所有元素。在轨迹分布层面，我们将状态-动作空间中的 BD 重新定义为占用度量的差异。对于奖励动态，我们提出RD通过遇到不同对手时策略的反应来表征多样性。我们还表明，当前的许多多样性措施属于 BD 或 RD 类别之一，但不能同时属于两者。通过这种统一的多样性衡量标准，我们在寻求开放式学习中的最佳反应时设计了相应的多样性促进目标和群体有效性。我们在相对简单的游戏（如矩阵游戏、非传递混合模型）和复杂的 \textit{Google Research Football} 环境中验证了我们的方法。我们的方法发现的群体揭示了矩阵博弈和非传递性混合模型中最低的可利用性、最高的群体有效性，以及与 \textit{Google Research Football} 中不同级别的对手互动时的最大进球差。 本文旨在通过统一行为多样性（BD）和响应多样性（RD）的度量，解决零和博弈中开放学习环境下策略多样性缺乏有效评估的问题。 Xiangyu Liu,Hangtian Jia,Ying Wen,Yaodong Yang,Yujing Hu,Yingfeng Chen,Changjie Fan,Zhipeng Hu cs.MA,cs.AI,cs.GT,cs.LG

authors_text: E. Gonzalez-Sosa,G. Robledo,D. Gonzalez-Morin,P. Perez-Garcia,A. Villegas
title: Real Time Egocentric Object Segmentation: THU-READ Labeling and Benchmarking Results
title_zh: 实时以自我为中心的对象分割：THU-READ 标签和基准测试结果
comment: Accepted for presentation at EPIC@CVPR2021 workshop
comments: Accepted for presentation at EPIC@CVPR2021 workshop
abstract: Egocentric segmentation has attracted recent interest in the computer vision community due to their potential in Mixed Reality (MR) applications. While most previous works have been focused on segmenting egocentric human body parts (mainly hands), little attention has been given to egocentric objects. Due to the lack of datasets of pixel-wise annotations of egocentric objects, in this paper we contribute with a semantic-wise labeling of a subset of 2124 images from the RGB-D THU-READ Dataset. We also report benchmarking results using Thundernet, a real-time semantic segmentation network, that could allow future integration with end-to-end MR applications.
summary: Egocentric segmentation has attracted recent interest in the computer vision community due to their potential in Mixed Reality (MR) applications. While most previous works have been focused on segmenting egocentric human body parts (mainly hands), little attention has been given to egocentric objects. Due to the lack of datasets of pixel-wise annotations of egocentric objects, in this paper we contribute with a semantic-wise labeling of a subset of 2124 images from the RGB-D THU-READ Dataset. We also report benchmarking results using Thundernet, a real-time semantic segmentation network, that could allow future integration with end-to-end MR applications.
abstract_zh: 以自我为中心的分割最近引起了计算机视觉界的兴趣，因为它们在混合现实（MR）应用中的潜力。虽然大多数以前的作品都集中于分割以自我为中心的人体部位（主要是手），但很少关注以自我为中心的物体。由于缺乏以自我为中心的对象的像素级注释数据集，在本文中，我们对 RGB-D THU-READ 数据集中的 2124 个图像的子集进行了语义级标记。我们还报告使用 Thundernet（一种实时语义分割网络）的基准测试结果，该网络可以允许未来与端到端 MR 应用程序集成。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种实时第一人称视角物体分割方法，并基于THU-READ数据集构建标注基准测试。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多聚焦于第一人称人体部位分割，缺乏针对物体的像素级标注数据集，阻碍了混合现实应用的发展。
AI.method: 从THU-READ数据集中选取2124张图像进行语义标注，并采用Thundernet实时语义分割网络进行基准测试。
AI.result: 验证了Thundernet在第一人称物体分割任务中的有效性，为端到端混合现实应用提供基础支持。
AI.conclusion: 通过构建标注数据集和基准测试，推动了第一人称物体分割领域的发展，为后续研究提供参考框架。

title: Non-Parametric Stochastic Sequential Assignment With Random Arrival Times
title_zh: 具有随机到达时间的非参数随机顺序分配
comment: Accepted to IJCAI '21, full version with Supplementary Material
comments: Accepted to IJCAI '21, full version with Supplementary Material
abstract: We consider a problem wherein jobs arrive at random times and assume random values. Upon each job arrival, the decision-maker must decide immediately whether or not to accept the job and gain the value on offer as a reward, with the constraint that they may only accept at most $n$ jobs over some reference time period. The decision-maker only has access to $M$ independent realisations of the job arrival process. We propose an algorithm, Non-Parametric Sequential Allocation (NPSA), for solving this problem. Moreover, we prove that the expected reward returned by the NPSA algorithm converges in probability to optimality as $M$ grows large. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the algorithm empirically on synthetic data and on public fraud-detection datasets, from where the motivation for this work is derived.
summary: We consider a problem wherein jobs arrive at random times and assume random values. Upon each job arrival, the decision-maker must decide immediately whether or not to accept the job and gain the value on offer as a reward, with the constraint that they may only accept at most $n$ jobs over some reference time period. The decision-maker only has access to $M$ independent realisations of the job arrival process. We propose an algorithm, Non-Parametric Sequential Allocation (NPSA), for solving this problem. Moreover, we prove that the expected reward returned by the NPSA algorithm converges in probability to optimality as $M$ grows large. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the algorithm empirically on synthetic data and on public fraud-detection datasets, from where the motivation for this work is derived.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑一个问题，其中作业在随机时间到达并假设随机值。每次工作到达后，决策者必须立即决定是否接受该工作并获得所提供的价值作为奖励，其限制是他们在某个参考时间段内最多只能接受 $n$ 工作。决策者只能访问 $M$ 独立实现的工作到达过程。我们提出了一种算法，即非参数顺序分配（NPSA）来解决这个问题。此外，我们证明，随着 $M$ 变大，NPSA 算法返回的预期奖励在概率上收敛到最优。我们在合成数据和公共欺诈检测数据集上凭经验证明了该算法的有效性，这也是这项工作的动机所在。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在随机到达时间下，决策者需在有限时间内接受最多n个任务以最大化收益的非参数随机序列分配问题。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中（如欺诈检测），任务随机到达且价值不确定，需设计无需先验分布假设的算法以应对动态决策需求。
AI.method: 提出非参数序列分配算法（NPSA），利用M个独立任务到达过程的模拟数据进行决策，无需参数化任务价值分布。
AI.result: 理论证明当M趋近于无穷大时，NPSA的期望收益以概率收敛于最优解；实验证明其在合成数据和欺诈检测数据集上表现有效。
AI.conclusion: NPSA为随机到达任务的在线决策提供了通用且渐近最优的解决方案，适用于需实时处理不确定事件的场景。

authors_text: Narjes Nikzad-Khasmakhi,Mohammad-Reza Feizi-Derakhshi,Meysam Asgari-Chenaghlu,Mohammad-Ali Balafar,Ali-Reza Feizi-Derakhshi,Taymaz Rahkar-Farshi,Majid Ramezani,Zoleikha Jahanbakhsh-Nagadeh,Elnaz Zafarani-Moattar,Mehrdad Ranjbar-Khadivi
title: Phraseformer: Multimodal Key-phrase Extraction using Transformer and Graph Embedding
title_zh: Phraseformer：使用 Transformer 和图嵌入进行多模式关键短语提取
abstract: Background: Keyword extraction is a popular research topic in the field of natural language processing. Keywords are terms that describe the most relevant information in a document. The main problem that researchers are facing is how to efficiently and accurately extract the core keywords from a document. However, previous keyword extraction approaches have utilized the text and graph features, there is the lack of models that can properly learn and combine these features in a best way. Methods: In this paper, we develop a multimodal Key-phrase extraction approach, namely Phraseformer, using transformer and graph embedding techniques. In Phraseformer, each keyword candidate is presented by a vector which is the concatenation of the text and structure learning representations. Phraseformer takes the advantages of recent researches such as BERT and ExEm to preserve both representations. Also, the Phraseformer treats the key-phrase extraction task as a sequence labeling problem solved using classification task. Results: We analyze the performance of Phraseformer on three datasets including Inspec, SemEval2010 and SemEval 2017 by F1-score. Also, we investigate the performance of different classifiers on Phraseformer method over Inspec dataset. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of Phraseformer method over the three datasets used. Additionally, the Random Forest classifier gain the highest F1-score among all classifiers. Conclusions: Due to the fact that the combination of BERT and ExEm is more meaningful and can better represent the semantic of words. Hence, Phraseformer significantly outperforms single-modality methods.

Conclusions: Due to the fact that the combination of BERT and ExEm is more meaningful and can better represent the semantic of words. Hence, Phraseformer significantly outperforms single-modality methods.
abstract_zh: 背景：关键词提取是自然语言处理领域的热门研究课题。关键字是描述文档中最相关信息的术语。如何高效、准确地从文档中提取核心关键词是研究人员面临的主要问题。然而，以前的关键词提取方法利用了文本和图形特征，缺乏能够以最佳方式正确学习和组合这些特征的模型。方法：在本文中，我们使用变压器和图嵌入技术开发了一种多模式关键短语提取方法，即 Phraseformer。在 Phraseformer 中，每个候选关键词由一个向量表示，该向量是文本和结构学习表示的串联。 Phraseformer 利用 BERT 和 ExEm 等最新研究的优点来保留这两种表示。此外，Phraseformer 将关键短语提取任务视为使用分类任务解决的序列标记问题。结果：我们通过 F1-score 分析了 Phraseformer 在 Inspec、SemEval2010 和 SemEval 2017 三个数据集上的性能。此外，我们还研究了 Inspec 数据集上不同分类器在 Phraseformer 方法上的性能。实验结果证明了 Phraseformer 方法在所使用的三个数据集上的有效性。此外，随机森林分类器在所有分类器中获得最高的 F1 分数。结论：由于BERT和ExEm的结合更有意义，可以更好地表示单词的语义。因此，Phraseformer 的性能明显优于单模态方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Phraseformer方法，结合Transformer和图嵌入技术进行多模态关键短语提取。
AI.motivation: 现有关键词提取方法未能有效融合文本特征与图结构特征，缺乏高效结合两种特征的模型。
AI.method: 通过BERT和ExEm获取文本与结构表示，拼接为候选关键词向量；将任务建模为序列标注问题，采用分类方法解决。
AI.result: 在Inspec、SemEval2010和SemEval2017三个数据集上F1分数优于对比方法，随机森林分类器表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 融合BERT与ExEm能更准确表征语义，Phraseformer在多模态特征结合上显著优于单模态方法。

search_text: Phraseformer: Multimodal Key-phrase Extraction using Transformer and Graph Embedding Phraseformer：使用 Transformer 和图嵌入进行多模式关键短语提取 Background: Keyword extraction is a popular research topic in the field of natural language processing. Keywords are terms that describe the most relevant information in a document. The main problem that researchers are facing is how to efficiently and accurately extract the core keywords from a document. However, previous keyword extraction approaches have utilized the text and graph features, there is the lack of models that can properly learn and combine these features in a best way. Methods: In this paper, we develop a multimodal Key-phrase extraction approach, namely Phraseformer, using transformer and graph embedding techniques. In Phraseformer, each keyword candidate is presented by a vector which is the concatenation of the text and structure learning representations. Phraseformer takes the advantages of recent researches such as BERT and ExEm to preserve both representations. Also, the Phraseformer treats the key-phrase extraction task as a sequence labeling problem solved using classification task. Results: We analyze the performance of Phraseformer on three datasets including Inspec, SemEval2010 and SemEval 2017 by F1-score. Also, we investigate the performance of different classifiers on Phraseformer method over Inspec dataset. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of Phraseformer method over the three datasets used. Additionally, the Random Forest classifier gain the highest F1-score among all classifiers. Conclusions: Due to the fact that the combination of BERT and ExEm is more meaningful and can better represent the semantic of words. Hence, Phraseformer significantly outperforms single-modality methods. 背景：关键词提取是自然语言处理领域的热门研究课题。关键字是描述文档中最相关信息的术语。如何高效、准确地从文档中提取核心关键词是研究人员面临的主要问题。然而，以前的关键词提取方法利用了文本和图形特征，缺乏能够以最佳方式正确学习和组合这些特征的模型。方法：在本文中，我们使用变压器和图嵌入技术开发了一种多模式关键短语提取方法，即 Phraseformer。在 Phraseformer 中，每个候选关键词由一个向量表示，该向量是文本和结构学习表示的串联。 Phraseformer 利用 BERT 和 ExEm 等最新研究的优点来保留这两种表示。此外，Phraseformer 将关键短语提取任务视为使用分类任务解决的序列标记问题。结果：我们通过 F1-score 分析了 Phraseformer 在 Inspec、SemEval2010 和 SemEval 2017 三个数据集上的性能。此外，我们还研究了 Inspec 数据集上不同分类器在 Phraseformer 方法上的性能。实验结果证明了 Phraseformer 方法在所使用的三个数据集上的有效性。此外，随机森林分类器在所有分类器中获得最高的 F1 分数。结论：由于BERT和ExEm的结合更有意义，可以更好地表示单词的语义。因此，Phraseformer 的性能明显优于单模态方法。 本文提出Phraseformer方法，结合Transformer和图嵌入技术进行多模态关键短语提取。 Narjes Nikzad-Khasmakhi,Mohammad-Reza Feizi-Derakhshi,Meysam Asgari-Chenaghlu,Mohammad-Ali Balafar,Ali-Reza Feizi-Derakhshi,Taymaz Rahkar-Farshi,Majid Ramezani,Zoleikha Jahanbakhsh-Nagadeh,Elnaz Zafarani-Moattar,Mehrdad Ranjbar-Khadivi cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Sara Meftah,Nasredine Semmar,Youssef Tamaazousti,Hassane Essafi,Fatiha Sadat
title: Neural Supervised Domain Adaptation by Augmenting Pre-trained Models with Random Units
title_zh: 通过使用随机单元增强预训练模型来实现神经监督域适应
abstract: Neural Transfer Learning (TL) is becoming ubiquitous in Natural Language Processing (NLP), thanks to its high performance on many tasks, especially in low-resourced scenarios. Notably, TL is widely used for neural domain adaptation to transfer valuable knowledge from high-resource to low-resource domains. In the standard fine-tuning scheme of TL, a model is initially pre-trained on a source domain and subsequently fine-tuned on a target domain and, therefore, source and target domains are trained using the same architecture. In this paper, we show through interpretation methods that such scheme, despite its efficiency, is suffering from a main limitation. Indeed, although capable of adapting to new domains, pre-trained neurons struggle with learning certain patterns that are specific to the target domain. Moreover, we shed light on the hidden negative transfer occurring despite the high relatedness between source and target domains, which may mitigate the final gain brought by transfer learning. To address these problems, we propose to augment the pre-trained model with normalised, weighted and randomly initialised units that foster a better adaptation while maintaining the valuable source knowledge. We show that our approach exhibits significant improvements to the standard fine-tuning scheme for neural domain adaptation from the news domain to the social media domain on four NLP tasks: part-of-speech tagging, chunking, named entity recognition and morphosyntactic tagging.
summary: Neural Transfer Learning (TL) is becoming ubiquitous in Natural Language Processing (NLP), thanks to its high performance on many tasks, especially in low-resourced scenarios. Notably, TL is widely used for neural domain adaptation to transfer valuable knowledge from high-resource to low-resource domains. In the standard fine-tuning scheme of TL, a model is initially pre-trained on a source domain and subsequently fine-tuned on a target domain and, therefore, source and target domains are trained using the same architecture. In this paper, we show through interpretation methods that such scheme, despite its efficiency, is suffering from a main limitation. Indeed, although capable of adapting to new domains, pre-trained neurons struggle with learning certain patterns that are specific to the target domain. Moreover, we shed light on the hidden negative transfer occurring despite the high relatedness between source and target domains, which may mitigate the final gain brought by transfer learning. To address these problems, we propose to augment the pre-trained model with normalised, weighted and randomly initialised units that foster a better adaptation while maintaining the valuable source knowledge. We show that our approach exhibits significant improvements to the standard fine-tuning scheme for neural domain adaptation from the news domain to the social media domain on four NLP tasks: part-of-speech tagging, chunking, named entity recognition and morphosyntactic tagging.
abstract_zh: 神经迁移学习 (TL) 在自然语言处理 (NLP) 中变得无处不在，这要归功于它在许多任务上的高性能，尤其是在资源匮乏的场景中。值得注意的是，TL 广泛用于神经领域适应，将有价值的知识从高资源领域转移到低资源领域。在 TL 的标准微调方案中，模型最初在源域上进行预训练，然后在目标域上进行微调，因此，源域和目标域使用相同的架构进行训练。在本文中，我们通过解释方法表明，尽管这种方案很有效，但仍存在主要局限性。事实上，尽管能够适应新领域，但预先训练的神经元却很难学习特定于目标领域的某些模式。此外，我们揭示了尽管源域和目标域之间存在高度相关性，但仍发生隐藏的负迁移，这可能会减轻迁移学习带来的最终收益。为了解决这些问题，我们建议使用标准化、加权和随机初始化的单元来增强预训练模型，以促进更好的适应，同时保留有价值的源知识。我们表明，我们的方法在四个 NLP 任务上对从新闻领域到社交媒体领域的神经领域适应的标准微调方案进行了显着改进：词性标记、分块、命名实体识别和形态句法标记。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过向预训练模型添加随机单元来改进神经领域自适应的方法，以解决标准微调方案在低资源领域适应中的局限性。
AI.motivation: 标准微调方案在领域自适应中存在预训练神经元难以学习目标领域特定模式的问题，并可能因负迁移现象削弱迁移学习效果。
AI.method: 在预训练模型中引入归一化、加权且随机初始化的单元，通过增强模型灵活性实现更好的领域适应，同时保留源领域知识。
AI.result: 在从新闻领域到社交媒体领域的四个NLP任务（词性标注、分块、命名实体识别和形态句法标注）中，该方法显著优于标准微调方案。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效缓解了预训练模型在领域自适应中的局限性，在保持源知识的同时提升了目标领域适应性能。

In this paper, we show through interpretation methods that such scheme, despite its efficiency, is suffering from a main limitation. Indeed, although capable of adapting to new domains, pre-trained neurons struggle with learning certain patterns that are specific to the target domain. To address these problems, we propose to augment the pre-trained model with normalised, weighted and randomly initialised units that foster a better adaptation while maintaining the valuable source knowledge. We show that our approach exhibits significant improvements to the standard fine-tuning scheme for neural domain adaptation from the news domain to the social media domain on four NLP tasks: part-of-speech tagging, chunking, named entity recognition and morphosyntactic tagging. 神经迁移学习 (TL) 在自然语言处理 (NLP) 中变得无处不在，这要归功于它在许多任务上的高性能，尤其是在资源匮乏的场景中。值得注意的是，TL 广泛用于神经领域适应，将有价值的知识从高资源领域转移到低资源领域。在 TL 的标准微调方案中，模型最初在源域上进行预训练，然后在目标域上进行微调，因此，源域和目标域使用相同的架构进行训练。在本文中，我们通过解释方法表明，尽管这种方案很有效，但仍存在主要局限性。事实上，尽管能够适应新领域，但预先训练的神经元却很难学习特定于目标领域的某些模式。此外，我们揭示了尽管源域和目标域之间存在高度相关性，但仍发生隐藏的负迁移，这可能会减轻迁移学习带来的最终收益。为了解决这些问题，我们建议使用标准化、加权和随机初始化的单元来增强预训练模型，以促进更好的适应，同时保留有价值的源知识。我们表明，我们的方法在四个 NLP 任务上对从新闻领域到社交媒体领域的神经领域适应的标准微调方案进行了显着改进：词性标记、分块、命名实体识别和形态句法标记。 本文提出一种通过向预训练模型添加随机单元来改进神经领域自适应的方法，以解决标准微调方案在低资源领域适应中的局限性。 Sara Meftah,Nasredine Semmar,Youssef Tamaazousti,Hassane Essafi,Fatiha Sadat cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Zilin Ding,Yuhang Yang,Xuan Cheng,Xiaomin Wang,Ming Liu
title: Self-supervision of Feature Transformation for Further Improving Supervised Learning
title_zh: 特征转换的自我监督进一步改进监督学习
abstract: Self-supervised learning, which benefits from automatically constructing labels through pre-designed pretext task, has recently been applied for strengthen supervised learning. Since previous self-supervised pretext tasks are based on input, they may incur huge additional training overhead. In this paper we find that features in CNNs can be also used for self-supervision. Thus we creatively design the \emph{feature-based pretext task} which requires only a small amount of additional training overhead. In our task we discard different particular regions of features, and then train the model to distinguish these different features. In order to fully apply our feature-based pretext task in supervised learning, we also propose a novel learning framework containing multi-classifiers for further improvement. Original labels will be expanded to joint labels via self-supervision of feature transformations. With more semantic information provided by our self-supervised tasks, this approach can train CNNs more effectively. Extensive experiments on various supervised learning tasks demonstrate the accuracy improvement and wide applicability of our method.
summary: Self-supervised learning, which benefits from automatically constructing labels through pre-designed pretext task, has recently been applied for strengthen supervised learning. Since previous self-supervised pretext tasks are based on input, they may incur huge additional training overhead. In this paper we find that features in CNNs can be also used for self-supervision. Thus we creatively design the \emph{feature-based pretext task} which requires only a small amount of additional training overhead. In our task we discard different particular regions of features, and then train the model to distinguish these different features. In order to fully apply our feature-based pretext task in supervised learning, we also propose a novel learning framework containing multi-classifiers for further improvement. Original labels will be expanded to joint labels via self-supervision of feature transformations. With more semantic information provided by our self-supervised tasks, this approach can train CNNs more effectively. Extensive experiments on various supervised learning tasks demonstrate the accuracy improvement and wide applicability of our method.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习受益于通过预先设计的借口任务自动构建标签，最近已被应用于强化监督学习。由于以前的自监督借口任务是基于输入的，因此可能会产生巨大的额外训练开销。在本文中，我们发现 CNN 中的特征也可以用于自我监督。因此，我们创造性地设计了\emph{基于特征的借口任务}，它只需要少量的额外训练开销。在我们的任务中，我们丢弃不同的特定特征区域，然后训练模型来区分这些不同的特征。为了在监督学习中充分应用基于特征的借口任务，我们还提出了一种包含多分类器的新颖学习框架以供进一步改进。通过特征变换的自我监督，原始标签将扩展到联合标签。通过自我监督任务提供更多语义信息，这种方法可以更有效地训练 CNN。对各种监督学习任务的广泛实验证明了我们方法的准确性提高和广泛适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于特征变换的自监督方法，通过设计特征级预训练任务来增强监督学习效果。
AI.motivation: 传统自监督学习依赖输入级预训练任务导致训练开销大，而特征空间中蕴含的语义信息未被充分挖掘。
AI.method: 设计特征区域掩码任务作为预训练目标，通过多分类器框架将原始标签扩展为联合标签，利用特征变换的自监督信号优化CNN训练。
AI.result: 在多个监督学习任务中实现准确率提升，验证了方法的有效性和广泛适用性。
AI.conclusion: 特征级自监督机制能有效补充监督信号，为提升模型性能提供新思路。

search_text: Self-supervision of Feature Transformation for Further Improving Supervised Learning 特征转换的自我监督进一步改进监督学习 Self-supervised learning, which benefits from automatically constructing labels through pre-designed pretext task, has recently been applied for strengthen supervised learning. Since previous self-supervised pretext tasks are based on input, they may incur huge additional training overhead. In this paper we find that features in CNNs can be also used for self-supervision. Thus we creatively design the \emph{feature-based pretext task} which requires only a small amount of additional training overhead. In our task we discard different particular regions of features, and then train the model to distinguish these different features. In order to fully apply our feature-based pretext task in supervised learning, we also propose a novel learning framework containing multi-classifiers for further improvement. Original labels will be expanded to joint labels via self-supervision of feature transformations. With more semantic information provided by our self-supervised tasks, this approach can train CNNs more effectively. Extensive experiments on various supervised learning tasks demonstrate the accuracy improvement and wide applicability of our method. 自监督学习受益于通过预先设计的借口任务自动构建标签，最近已被应用于强化监督学习。由于以前的自监督借口任务是基于输入的，因此可能会产生巨大的额外训练开销。在本文中，我们发现 CNN 中的特征也可以用于自我监督。因此，我们创造性地设计了\emph{基于特征的借口任务}，它只需要少量的额外训练开销。在我们的任务中，我们丢弃不同的特定特征区域，然后训练模型来区分这些不同的特征。为了在监督学习中充分应用基于特征的借口任务，我们还提出了一种包含多分类器的新颖学习框架以供进一步改进。通过特征变换的自我监督，原始标签将扩展到联合标签。通过自我监督任务提供更多语义信息，这种方法可以更有效地训练 CNN。对各种监督学习任务的广泛实验证明了我们方法的准确性提高和广泛适用性。 本文提出一种基于特征变换的自监督方法，通过设计特征级预训练任务来增强监督学习效果。 Zilin Ding,Yuhang Yang,Xuan Cheng,Xiaomin Wang,Ming Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Yuhang Yang,Zilin Ding,Xuan Cheng,Xiaomin Wang,Ming Liu
title: Self-supervised Feature Enhancement: Applying Internal Pretext Task to Supervised Learning
title_zh: 自监督特征增强：将内部借口任务应用于监督学习
abstract: Traditional self-supervised learning requires CNNs using external pretext tasks (i.e., image- or video-based tasks) to encode high-level semantic visual representations. In this paper, we show that feature transformations within CNNs can also be regarded as supervisory signals to construct the self-supervised task, called \emph{internal pretext task}. And such a task can be applied for the enhancement of supervised learning. Specifically, we first transform the internal feature maps by discarding different channels, and then define an additional internal pretext task to identify the discarded channels. CNNs are trained to predict the joint labels generated by the combination of self-supervised labels and original labels. By doing so, we let CNNs know which channels are missing while classifying in the hope to mine richer feature information. Extensive experiments show that our approach is effective on various models and datasets. And it's worth noting that we only incur negligible computational overhead. Furthermore, our approach can also be compatible with other methods to get better results.
summary: Traditional self-supervised learning requires CNNs using external pretext tasks (i.e., image- or video-based tasks) to encode high-level semantic visual representations. In this paper, we show that feature transformations within CNNs can also be regarded as supervisory signals to construct the self-supervised task, called \emph{internal pretext task}. And such a task can be applied for the enhancement of supervised learning. Specifically, we first transform the internal feature maps by discarding different channels, and then define an additional internal pretext task to identify the discarded channels. CNNs are trained to predict the joint labels generated by the combination of self-supervised labels and original labels. By doing so, we let CNNs know which channels are missing while classifying in the hope to mine richer feature information. Extensive experiments show that our approach is effective on various models and datasets. And it's worth noting that we only incur negligible computational overhead. Furthermore, our approach can also be compatible with other methods to get better results.
abstract_zh: 传统的自监督学习需要 CNN 使用外部借口任务（即基于图像或视频的任务）来编码高级语义视觉表示。在本文中，我们表明 CNN 内的特征转换也可以被视为构建自监督任务的监督信号，称为 \emph{内部借口任务}。这样的任务可以应用于监督学习的增强。具体来说，我们首先通过丢弃不同的通道来转换内部特征图，然后定义一个额外的内部借口任务来识别丢弃的通道。 CNN 被训练来预测由自监督标签和原始标签组合生成的联合标签。通过这样做，我们让 CNN 知道分类时缺少哪些通道，以期挖掘更丰富的特征信息。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在各种模型和数据集上都是有效的。值得注意的是，我们只产生了可以忽略不计的计算开销。此外，我们的方法还可以与其他方法兼容以获得更好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于内部预训练任务的自监督特征增强方法，通过利用卷积神经网络内部特征变换作为监督信号来提升监督学习效果。
AI.motivation: 传统自监督学习依赖外部预训练任务，而本文旨在探索CNN内部特征变换作为监督信号的可能性，以更高效地增强监督学习性能。
AI.method: 通过丢弃特征图的不同通道并定义内部预训练任务来识别缺失通道，结合自监督标签与原始标签联合训练CNN，挖掘更丰富的特征信息。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多种模型和数据集上均有效，计算开销极小，且可与其他方法兼容以获得更优结果。
AI.conclusion: 内部预训练任务为监督学习提供了高效且通用的特征增强方案，具有显著的实用价值。

title: Towards Deep Industrial Transfer Learning for Anomaly Detection on Time Series Data
title_zh: 用于时间序列数据异常检测的深度工业迁移学习
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, 5 tables. Accepted for publication at IEEE ETFA 2021
comments: 8 pages, 5 figures, 5 tables. Accepted for publication at IEEE ETFA 2021
abstract: Deep learning promises performant anomaly detection on time-variant datasets, but greatly suffers from low availability of suitable training datasets and frequently changing tasks. Deep transfer learning offers mitigation by letting algorithms built upon previous knowledge from different tasks or locations. In this article, a modular deep learning algorithm for anomaly detection on time series datasets is presented that allows for an easy integration of such transfer learning capabilities. It is thoroughly tested on a dataset from a discrete manufacturing process in order to prove its fundamental adequacy towards deep industrial transfer learning - the transfer of knowledge in industrial applications' special environment.
summary: Deep learning promises performant anomaly detection on time-variant datasets, but greatly suffers from low availability of suitable training datasets and frequently changing tasks. Deep transfer learning offers mitigation by letting algorithms built upon previous knowledge from different tasks or locations. In this article, a modular deep learning algorithm for anomaly detection on time series datasets is presented that allows for an easy integration of such transfer learning capabilities. It is thoroughly tested on a dataset from a discrete manufacturing process in order to prove its fundamental adequacy towards deep industrial transfer learning - the transfer of knowledge in industrial applications' special environment.
abstract_zh: 深度学习有望对时变数据集进行高性能异常检测，但由于合适的训练数据集可用性低且任务频繁变化而受到很大影响。深度迁移学习通过让算法基于来自不同任务或位置的先前知识来提供缓解措施。在本文中，提出了一种用于时间序列数据集异常检测的模块化深度学习算法，可以轻松集成此类迁移学习功能。它在离散制造过程的数据集上进行了彻底测试，以证明其对于深度工业转移学习（工业应用特殊环境中的知识转移）的基本充分性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种模块化深度学习算法，用于工业时间序列数据的异常检测，并整合迁移学习能力以应对数据不足和任务变化的问题。
AI.motivation: 工业场景中异常检测面临训练数据稀缺、任务频繁变化等挑战，传统深度学习难以适应，需借助迁移学习利用跨任务知识提升模型性能。
AI.method: 设计模块化深度学习架构，通过预训练-微调框架实现跨任务知识迁移，结合工业时间序列数据特性优化模型结构并验证迁移有效性。
AI.result: 在离散制造过程数据集上验证了方法有效性，证明该算法能在工业场景中实现知识迁移，提升异常检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 模块化迁移学习框架有效解决了工业异常检测的数据与任务适应性问题，为工业场景的深度学习应用提供了可行方案。

title: Cervical Cytology Classification Using PCA & GWO Enhanced Deep Features Selection
title_zh: 使用 PCA 和 GWO 增强深度特征选择进行宫颈细胞学分类
abstract: Cervical cancer is one of the most deadly and common diseases among women worldwide. It is completely curable if diagnosed in an early stage, but the tedious and costly detection procedure makes it unviable to conduct population-wise screening. Thus, to augment the effort of the clinicians, in this paper, we propose a fully automated framework that utilizes Deep Learning and feature selection using evolutionary optimization for cytology image classification. The proposed framework extracts Deep feature from several Convolution Neural Network models and uses a two-step feature reduction approach to ensure reduction in computation cost and faster convergence. The features extracted from the CNN models form a large feature space whose dimensionality is reduced using Principal Component Analysis while preserving 99% of the variance. A non-redundant, optimal feature subset is selected from this feature space using an evolutionary optimization algorithm, the Grey Wolf Optimizer, thus improving the classification performance. Finally, the selected feature subset is used to train an SVM classifier for generating the final predictions. The proposed framework is evaluated on three publicly available benchmark datasets: Mendeley Liquid Based Cytology (4-class) dataset, Herlev Pap Smear (7-class) dataset, and the SIPaKMeD Pap Smear (5-class) dataset achieving classification accuracies of 99.47%, 98.32% and 97.87% respectively, thus justifying the reliability of the approach. The relevant codes for the proposed approach can be found in: https://github.com/DVLP-CMATERJU/Two-Step-Feature-Enhancement
summary: Cervical cancer is one of the most deadly and common diseases among women worldwide. It is completely curable if diagnosed in an early stage, but the tedious and costly detection procedure makes it unviable to conduct population-wise screening. Thus, to augment the effort of the clinicians, in this paper, we propose a fully automated framework that utilizes Deep Learning and feature selection using evolutionary optimization for cytology image classification. The proposed framework extracts Deep feature from several Convolution Neural Network models and uses a two-step feature reduction approach to ensure reduction in computation cost and faster convergence. The features extracted from the CNN models form a large feature space whose dimensionality is reduced using Principal Component Analysis while preserving 99% of the variance. A non-redundant, optimal feature subset is selected from this feature space using an evolutionary optimization algorithm, the Grey Wolf Optimizer, thus improving the classification performance. Finally, the selected feature subset is used to train an SVM classifier for generating the final predictions. The proposed framework is evaluated on three publicly available benchmark datasets: Mendeley Liquid Based Cytology (4-class) dataset, Herlev Pap Smear (7-class) dataset, and the SIPaKMeD Pap Smear (5-class) dataset achieving classification accuracies of 99.47%, 98.32% and 97.87% respectively, thus justifying the reliability of the approach. The relevant codes for the proposed approach can be found in: https://github.com/DVLP-CMATERJU/Two-Step-Feature-Enhancement
abstract_zh: 宫颈癌是全世界女性最致命和最常见的疾病之一。如果在早期诊断出来，它是完全可以治愈的，但繁琐且昂贵的检测程序使得进行人群筛查变得不可行。因此，为了增强临床医生的工作量，在本文中，我们提出了一个完全自动化的框架，该框架利用深度学习和特征选择，使用进化优化进行细胞学图像分类。所提出的框架从多个卷积神经网络模型中提取深度特征，并使用两步特征缩减方法来确保计算成本的降低和更快的收敛。从 CNN 模型中提取的特征形成一个大的特征空间，使用主成分分析降低其维度，同时保留 99% 的方差。使用进化优化算法灰狼优化器从该特征空间中选择非冗余的最优特征子集，从而提高分类性能。最后，选择的特征子集用于训练 SVM 分类器以生成最终预测。所提出的框架在三个公开可用的基准数据集上进行了评估：Mendeley Liquid Based Cytology（4 类）数据集、Herlev Pap Smear（7 类）数据集和 SIPaKMeD Pap Smear（5 类）数据集，分类准确率分别为 99.47%、98.32% 和 97.87%，从而证明了该方法的可靠性。该方法的相关代码可以在以下位置找到：https://github.com/DVLP-CMATERJU/Two-Step-Feature-Enhancement

AI.method: 提取多个CNN模型的深度特征，通过PCA降维保留99%方差，再利用GWO算法选择最优非冗余特征子集，最终训练SVM分类器。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集（Mendeley、Herlev、SIPaKMeD）上分别达到99.47%、98.32%和97.87%的分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过两步特征优化显著提升了分类性能，验证了方法在宫颈细胞学图像分析中的可靠性。

title: Exploiting Learned Symmetries in Group Equivariant Convolutions
title_zh: 利用群等变卷积中习得的对称性
abstract: Group Equivariant Convolutions (GConvs) enable convolutional neural networks to be equivariant to various transformation groups, but at an additional parameter and compute cost. We investigate the filter parameters learned by GConvs and find certain conditions under which they become highly redundant. We show that GConvs can be efficiently decomposed into depthwise separable convolutions while preserving equivariance properties and demonstrate improved performance and data efficiency on two datasets. All code is publicly available at github.com/Attila94/SepGrouPy.
summary: Group Equivariant Convolutions (GConvs) enable convolutional neural networks to be equivariant to various transformation groups, but at an additional parameter and compute cost. We investigate the filter parameters learned by GConvs and find certain conditions under which they become highly redundant. We show that GConvs can be efficiently decomposed into depthwise separable convolutions while preserving equivariance properties and demonstrate improved performance and data efficiency on two datasets. All code is publicly available at github.com/Attila94/SepGrouPy.
abstract_zh: 组等变卷积 (GConvs) 使卷积神经网络能够与各种变换组等变，但需要额外的参数和计算成本。我们研究了 GConvs 学习到的过滤器参数，并找到了它们变得高度冗余的某些条件。我们证明 GConv 可以有效地分解为深度可分离卷积，同时保留等方差属性，并在两个数据集上展示了改进的性能和数据效率。所有代码均可在 github.com/Attila94/SepGrouPy 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过分解群等变卷积（GConvs）来减少参数冗余并提升计算效率，同时保持其等变性。
AI.motivation: 群等变卷积（GConvs）虽能增强网络对变换的等变性，但参数和计算成本较高，需寻找优化方法。
AI.method: 分析GConvs滤波器参数的冗余条件，将其分解为深度可分离卷积，并验证分解后的等变性保持。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上实现性能和数据效率提升，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过分解方法有效减少冗余并保持等变性，为高效群等变网络设计提供新思路。

authors_text: Mina Schütz,Jaqueline Boeck,Daria Liakhovets,Djordje Slijepčević,Armin Kirchknopf,Manuel Hecht,Johannes Bogensperger,Sven Schlarb,Alexander Schindler,Matthias Zeppelzauer
title: Automatic Sexism Detection with Multilingual Transformer Models
title_zh: 使用多语言 Transformer 模型自动检测性别歧视
comment: Technical Report to the AIT_FHSTP EXIST 2021 Challenge contribution (under review) http://nlp.uned.es/exist2021/
comments: Technical Report to the AIT_FHSTP EXIST 2021 Challenge contribution (under review) http://nlp.uned.es/exist2021/
abstract: Sexism has become an increasingly major problem on social networks during the last years. The first shared task on sEXism Identification in Social neTworks (EXIST) at IberLEF 2021 is an international competition in the field of Natural Language Processing (NLP) with the aim to automatically identify sexism in social media content by applying machine learning methods. Thereby sexism detection is formulated as a coarse (binary) classification problem and a fine-grained classification task that distinguishes multiple types of sexist content (e.g., dominance, stereotyping, and objectification). This paper presents the contribution of the AIT_FHSTP team at the EXIST2021 benchmark for both tasks. To solve the tasks we applied two multilingual transformer models, one based on multilingual BERT and one based on XLM-R. Our approach uses two different strategies to adapt the transformers to the detection of sexist content: first, unsupervised pre-training with additional data and second, supervised fine-tuning with additional and augmented data. For both tasks our best model is XLM-R with unsupervised pre-training on the EXIST data and additional datasets and fine-tuning on the provided dataset. The best run for the binary classification (task 1) achieves a macro F1-score of 0.7752 and scores 5th rank in the benchmark; for the multiclass classification (task 2) our best submission scores 6th rank with a macro F1-score of 0.5589.
summary: Sexism has become an increasingly major problem on social networks during the last years. The first shared task on sEXism Identification in Social neTworks (EXIST) at IberLEF 2021 is an international competition in the field of Natural Language Processing (NLP) with the aim to automatically identify sexism in social media content by applying machine learning methods. Thereby sexism detection is formulated as a coarse (binary) classification problem and a fine-grained classification task that distinguishes multiple types of sexist content (e.g., dominance, stereotyping, and objectification). This paper presents the contribution of the AIT_FHSTP team at the EXIST2021 benchmark for both tasks. To solve the tasks we applied two multilingual transformer models, one based on multilingual BERT and one based on XLM-R. Our approach uses two different strategies to adapt the transformers to the detection of sexist content: first, unsupervised pre-training with additional data and second, supervised fine-tuning with additional and augmented data. For both tasks our best model is XLM-R with unsupervised pre-training on the EXIST data and additional datasets and fine-tuning on the provided dataset. The best run for the binary classification (task 1) achieves a macro F1-score of 0.7752 and scores 5th rank in the benchmark; for the multiclass classification (task 2) our best submission scores 6th rank with a macro F1-score of 0.5589.
abstract_zh: 过去几年，性别歧视已成为社交网络上日益严重的问题。 IberLEF 2021 上的第一个关于社交网络中的性别歧视识别 (EXIST) 的共享任务是自然语言处理 (NLP) 领域的国际竞赛，旨在通过应用机器学习方法自动识别社交媒体内容中的性别歧视。因此，性别歧视检测被表述为粗略（二元）分类问题和细粒度分类任务，用于区分多种类型的性别歧视内容（例如，主导、刻板印象和客观化）。本文介绍了 AIT_FHSTP 团队在 EXIST2021 基准测试中对这两项任务的贡献。为了解决这些任务，我们应用了两种多语言 Transformer 模型，一种基于多语言 BERT，一种基于 XLM-R。我们的方法使用两种不同的策略来使 Transformer 适应性别歧视内容的检测：首先，使用附加数据进行无监督预训练，其次是使用附加数据和增强数据进行监督微调。对于这两项任务，我们最好的模型是 XLM-R，对 EXIST 数据和其他数据集进行无监督预训练，并对提供的数据集进行微调。二元分类（任务 1）的最佳运行实现了 0.7752 的宏观 F1 分数，在基准测试中排名第五；对于多类分类（任务 2），我们的最佳提交得分排名第六，宏观 F1 得分为 0.5589。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用多语言Transformer模型自动检测社交媒体中的性别歧视内容，包括二分类和细粒度分类任务。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体中性别歧视问题日益严重，需通过机器学习方法实现自动化检测以提升识别效率和多语言支持。
AI.method: 采用多语言BERT和XLM-R模型，结合无监督预训练（使用额外数据）与监督微调（使用增强数据）两种策略进行模型适配。
AI.result: 二分类任务F1值达0.7752（排名第五），多分类任务F1值为0.5589（排名第六）。
AI.conclusion: XLM-R模型结合预训练与微调策略在多语言性别歧视检测中效果最佳，为相关研究提供有效方法参考。

method: 采用多语言BERT和XLM-R模型，结合无监督预训练（使用额外数据）与监督微调（使用增强数据）两种策略进行模型适配。

conclusion: XLM-R模型结合预训练与微调策略在多语言性别歧视检测中效果最佳，为相关研究提供有效方法参考。
search_text: Automatic Sexism Detection with Multilingual Transformer Models 使用多语言 Transformer 模型自动检测性别歧视 Sexism has become an increasingly major problem on social networks during the last years. The first shared task on sEXism Identification in Social neTworks (EXIST) at IberLEF 2021 is an international competition in the field of Natural Language Processing (NLP) with the aim to automatically identify sexism in social media content by applying machine learning methods. Thereby sexism detection is formulated as a coarse (binary) classification problem and a fine-grained classification task that distinguishes multiple types of sexist content (e.g., dominance, stereotyping, and objectification). This paper presents the contribution of the AIT_FHSTP team at the EXIST2021 benchmark for both tasks. To solve the tasks we applied two multilingual transformer models, one based on multilingual BERT and one based on XLM-R. Our approach uses two different strategies to adapt the transformers to the detection of sexist content: first, unsupervised pre-training with additional data and second, supervised fine-tuning with additional and augmented data. For both tasks our best model is XLM-R with unsupervised pre-training on the EXIST data and additional datasets and fine-tuning on the provided dataset. The best run for the binary classification (task 1) achieves a macro F1-score of 0.7752 and scores 5th rank in the benchmark; for the multiclass classification (task 2) our best submission scores 6th rank with a macro F1-score of 0.5589. 过去几年，性别歧视已成为社交网络上日益严重的问题。 IberLEF 2021 上的第一个关于社交网络中的性别歧视识别 (EXIST) 的共享任务是自然语言处理 (NLP) 领域的国际竞赛，旨在通过应用机器学习方法自动识别社交媒体内容中的性别歧视。因此，性别歧视检测被表述为粗略（二元）分类问题和细粒度分类任务，用于区分多种类型的性别歧视内容（例如，主导、刻板印象和客观化）。本文介绍了 AIT_FHSTP 团队在 EXIST2021 基准测试中对这两项任务的贡献。为了解决这些任务，我们应用了两种多语言 Transformer 模型，一种基于多语言 BERT，一种基于 XLM-R。我们的方法使用两种不同的策略来使 Transformer 适应性别歧视内容的检测：首先，使用附加数据进行无监督预训练，其次是使用附加数据和增强数据进行监督微调。对于这两项任务，我们最好的模型是 XLM-R，对 EXIST 数据和其他数据集进行无监督预训练，并对提供的数据集进行微调。二元分类（任务 1）的最佳运行实现了 0.7752 的宏观 F1 分数，在基准测试中排名第五；对于多类分类（任务 2），我们的最佳提交得分排名第六，宏观 F1 得分为 0.5589。 本文提出使用多语言Transformer模型自动检测社交媒体中的性别歧视内容，包括二分类和细粒度分类任务。 Mina Schütz,Jaqueline Boeck,Daria Liakhovets,Djordje Slijepčević,Armin Kirchknopf,Manuel Hecht,Johannes Bogensperger,Sven Schlarb,Alexander Schindler,Matthias Zeppelzauer cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Engineering-Economic Evaluation of Diffractive Non-Line-Of-Sight Backhaul (e3nb): A Techno-economic Model for 3D Wireless Backhaul Assessment
title_zh: 衍射非视距回程 (e3nb) 的工程经济评估：3D 无线回程评估的技术经济模型
abstract: Developing ways to affordably deliver broadband connectivity is one of the major issues of our time. In challenging deployment locations with irregular terrain, traditional Clear-Line-Of-Sight (CLOS) wireless links can be uneconomical to deploy, as the number of required towers make infrastructure investment unviable. With new research focusing on developing wireless diffractive backhaul technologies to provide Non-Line-Of-Sight (NLOS) links, this paper evaluates the engineering-economic implications. A Three-Dimensional (3D) techno-economic assessment framework is developed, utilizing a combination of remote sensing and viewshed geospatial techniques, in order to quantify the impact of different wireless backhaul strategies. This framework is applied to assess both Clear-Line-Of-Sight and diffractive Non-Line-Of-Sight strategies for deployment in Peru, as well as the islands of Kalimantan and Papua, in Indonesia. The results find that a hybrid strategy combining the use of Clear-Line-Of-Sight and diffractive Non-Line-Of-Sight links produces a 9-45 percent cost-efficiency saving, relative to only using traditional Clear-Line-Of-Sight wireless backhaul links.
summary: Developing ways to affordably deliver broadband connectivity is one of the major issues of our time. In challenging deployment locations with irregular terrain, traditional Clear-Line-Of-Sight (CLOS) wireless links can be uneconomical to deploy, as the number of required towers make infrastructure investment unviable. With new research focusing on developing wireless diffractive backhaul technologies to provide Non-Line-Of-Sight (NLOS) links, this paper evaluates the engineering-economic implications. A Three-Dimensional (3D) techno-economic assessment framework is developed, utilizing a combination of remote sensing and viewshed geospatial techniques, in order to quantify the impact of different wireless backhaul strategies. This framework is applied to assess both Clear-Line-Of-Sight and diffractive Non-Line-Of-Sight strategies for deployment in Peru, as well as the islands of Kalimantan and Papua, in Indonesia. The results find that a hybrid strategy combining the use of Clear-Line-Of-Sight and diffractive Non-Line-Of-Sight links produces a 9-45 percent cost-efficiency saving, relative to only using traditional Clear-Line-Of-Sight wireless backhaul links.
abstract_zh: 开发以经济实惠的方式提供宽带连接的方法是我们这个时代的主要问题之一。在地形不规则且具有挑战性的部署地点，传统的清晰视距 (CLOS) 无线链路的部署可能不经济，因为所需的塔数量过多，导致基础设施投资不可行。新研究的重点是开发无线衍射回程技术以提供非视距 (NLOS) 链路，本文评估了工程经济影响。结合遥感和视域地理空间技术，开发了三维 (3D) 技术经济评估框架，以量化不同无线回程策略的影响。该框架用于评估在秘鲁以及印度尼西亚加里曼丹岛和巴布亚岛部署的清晰视距和衍射非视距策略。结果发现，与仅使用传统的清晰视距无线回程链路相比，结合使用清晰视距和衍射非视距链路的混合策略可节省 9-45% 的成本效率。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一个三维经济技术评估框架，用于评估视距（CLOS）与非视距（NLOS）无线回传策略在复杂地形区域的工程经济性。
AI.motivation: 传统视距无线链路在复杂地形中部署成本过高，需探索更经济的非视距回传技术以降低基础设施投资。
AI.method: 结合遥感技术与视域地理空间分析，构建三维经济技术模型，量化不同回传策略的成本效益。
AI.result: 混合使用CLOS与NLOS策略可较纯CLOS方案节省9-45%成本，显著提升部署经济性。
AI.conclusion: 混合回传策略能有效平衡成本与覆盖，为复杂地形区域宽带部署提供可行技术路径。

title: DGA-Net Dynamic Gaussian Attention Network for Sentence Semantic Matching
title_zh: 用于句子语义匹配的 DGA-Net 动态高斯注意力网络
abstract: Sentence semantic matching requires an agent to determine the semantic relation between two sentences, where much recent progress has been made by the advancement of representation learning techniques and inspiration of human behaviors. Among all these methods, attention mechanism plays an essential role by selecting important parts effectively. However, current attention methods either focus on all the important parts in a static way or only select one important part at one attention step dynamically, which leaves a large space for further improvement. To this end, in this paper, we design a novel Dynamic Gaussian Attention Network (DGA-Net) to combine the advantages of current static and dynamic attention methods. More specifically, we first leverage pre-trained language model to encode the input sentences and construct semantic representations from a global perspective. Then, we develop a Dynamic Gaussian Attention (DGA) to dynamically capture the important parts and corresponding local contexts from a detailed perspective. Finally, we combine the global information and detailed local information together to decide the semantic relation of sentences comprehensively and precisely. Extensive experiments on two popular sentence semantic matching tasks demonstrate that our proposed DGA-Net is effective in improving the ability of attention mechanism.
summary: Sentence semantic matching requires an agent to determine the semantic relation between two sentences, where much recent progress has been made by the advancement of representation learning techniques and inspiration of human behaviors. Among all these methods, attention mechanism plays an essential role by selecting important parts effectively. However, current attention methods either focus on all the important parts in a static way or only select one important part at one attention step dynamically, which leaves a large space for further improvement. To this end, in this paper, we design a novel Dynamic Gaussian Attention Network (DGA-Net) to combine the advantages of current static and dynamic attention methods. More specifically, we first leverage pre-trained language model to encode the input sentences and construct semantic representations from a global perspective. Then, we develop a Dynamic Gaussian Attention (DGA) to dynamically capture the important parts and corresponding local contexts from a detailed perspective. Finally, we combine the global information and detailed local information together to decide the semantic relation of sentences comprehensively and precisely. Extensive experiments on two popular sentence semantic matching tasks demonstrate that our proposed DGA-Net is effective in improving the ability of attention mechanism.
abstract_zh: 句子语义匹配需要代理来确定两个句子之间的语义关系，最近由于表示学习技术的进步和人类行为的启发而取得了很多进展。在所有这些方法中，注意力机制通过有效地选择重要部分发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，当前的注意力方法要么以静态的方式关注所有重要部分，要么在一个注意力步骤中动态地仅选择一个重要部分，这留下了很大的进一步改进的空间。为此，在本文中，我们设计了一种新颖的动态高斯注意力网络（DGA-Net）来结合当前静态和动态注意力方法的优点。更具体地说，我们首先利用预先训练的语言模型对输入句子进行编码并从全局角度构建语义表示。然后，我们开发了动态高斯注意力（DGA），从详细的角度动态捕获重要部分和相应的局部上下文。最后，将全局信息和详细的局部信息结合起来，全面、准确地判定句子的语义关系。对两个流行句子语义匹配任务的大量实验表明，我们提出的 DGA-Net 在提高注意力机制的能力方面是有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态高斯注意力网络（DGA-Net），通过结合静态与动态注意力机制的优势，提升句子语义匹配任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有注意力机制要么静态关注所有重要部分，要么动态仅选择单一重点，无法兼顾全局与局部信息，限制了语义匹配的准确性。
AI.method: 首先利用预训练语言模型获取句子全局表征，再通过动态高斯注意力机制捕捉局部关键信息与上下文，最终融合全局与局部特征判断语义关系。
AI.result: 在两个主流句子语义匹配任务上的实验表明，DGA-Net显著提升了注意力机制的效果，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DGA-Net通过整合静态与动态注意力的优势，有效捕捉句子语义的全局与局部信息，为语义匹配任务提供了更精确的解决方案。

title: Continuous-discrete multiple target tracking with out-of-sequence measurements
title_zh: 具有乱序测量的连续离散多目标跟踪
comment: Matlab files can be found at https://github.com/Agarciafernandez/MTT
comments: Matlab files can be found at https://github.com/Agarciafernandez/MTT
abstract: This paper derives the optimal Bayesian processing of an out-of-sequence (OOS) set of measurements in continuous-time for multiple target tracking. We consider a multi-target system modelled in continuous time that is discretised at the time steps when we receive the measurements, which are distributed according to the standard point target model. All information about this system at the sampled time steps is provided by the posterior density on the set of all trajectories. This density can be computed via the continuous-discrete trajectory Poisson multi-Bernoulli mixture (TPMBM) filter. When we receive an OOS measurement, the optimal Bayesian processing performs a retrodiction step that adds trajectory information at the OOS measurement time stamp followed by an update step. After the OOS measurement update, the posterior remains in TPMBM form. We also provide a computationally lighter alternative based on a trajectory Poisson multi-Bernoulli filter. The effectiveness of the two approaches to handle OOS measurements is evaluated via simulations.
summary: This paper derives the optimal Bayesian processing of an out-of-sequence (OOS) set of measurements in continuous-time for multiple target tracking. We consider a multi-target system modelled in continuous time that is discretised at the time steps when we receive the measurements, which are distributed according to the standard point target model. All information about this system at the sampled time steps is provided by the posterior density on the set of all trajectories. This density can be computed via the continuous-discrete trajectory Poisson multi-Bernoulli mixture (TPMBM) filter. When we receive an OOS measurement, the optimal Bayesian processing performs a retrodiction step that adds trajectory information at the OOS measurement time stamp followed by an update step. After the OOS measurement update, the posterior remains in TPMBM form. We also provide a computationally lighter alternative based on a trajectory Poisson multi-Bernoulli filter. The effectiveness of the two approaches to handle OOS measurements is evaluated via simulations.
abstract_zh: 本文推导了多目标跟踪的连续时间失序（OOS）测量集的最佳贝叶斯处理。我们考虑在连续时间内建模的多目标系统，当我们收到测量值时，该系统在时间步上离散化，这些测量值根据标准点目标模型分布。有关该系统在采样时间步长的所有信息均由所有轨迹集的后验密度提供。该密度可以通过连续离散轨迹泊松多伯努利混合 (TPMBM) 滤波器来计算。当我们收到 OOS 测量结果时，最佳贝叶斯处理会执行回溯步骤，在 OOS 测量时间戳处添加轨迹信息，然后执行更新步骤。 OOS 测量更新后，后验仍保持 TPMBM 形式。我们还提供了一种基于轨迹泊松多伯努利滤波器的计算更轻的替代方案。通过模拟评估这两种处理 OOS 测量方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在连续时间多目标跟踪中处理失序测量的最优贝叶斯方法，提出了基于轨迹泊松多伯努利混合滤波器的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 多目标跟踪中常遇到失序测量（OOSM）问题，传统方法难以有效处理，需开发适用于连续时间模型的最优处理框架。
AI.method: 通过连续时间系统离散化建模，结合轨迹泊松多伯努利混合（TPMBM）滤波器，设计包含回溯预测和更新步骤的OOS测量处理流程，并提出计算更轻量的轨迹泊松多伯努利滤波器变体。
AI.result: 仿真验证了两种方法在处理OOS测量时的有效性，TPMBM滤波器保持后验分布形式，轻量方法在计算效率上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 提出的贝叶斯处理框架为连续时间多目标跟踪中的OOS测量问题提供了理论保障和实用算法，兼顾精度与效率。

title: Unsupervised Automatic Speech Recognition: A Review
title_zh: 无监督自动语音识别：回顾
comment: 26 pages + 10 pages of references, 3 figures. Speech Communication (2022)
comments: 26 pages + 10 pages of references, 3 figures. Speech Communication (2022)
abstract: Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) systems can be trained to achieve remarkable performance given large amounts of manually transcribed speech, but large labeled data sets can be difficult or expensive to acquire for all languages of interest. In this paper, we review the research literature to identify models and ideas that could lead to fully unsupervised ASR, including unsupervised segmentation of the speech signal, unsupervised mapping from speech segments to text, and semi-supervised models with nominal amounts of labeled examples. The objective of the study is to identify the limitations of what can be learned from speech data alone and to understand the minimum requirements for speech recognition. Identifying these limitations would help optimize the resources and efforts in ASR development for low-resource languages.
summary: Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) systems can be trained to achieve remarkable performance given large amounts of manually transcribed speech, but large labeled data sets can be difficult or expensive to acquire for all languages of interest. In this paper, we review the research literature to identify models and ideas that could lead to fully unsupervised ASR, including unsupervised segmentation of the speech signal, unsupervised mapping from speech segments to text, and semi-supervised models with nominal amounts of labeled examples. The objective of the study is to identify the limitations of what can be learned from speech data alone and to understand the minimum requirements for speech recognition. Identifying these limitations would help optimize the resources and efforts in ASR development for low-resource languages.
abstract_zh: 自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统可以经过训练，在大量手动转录的语音的情况下实现卓越的性能，但获取所有感兴趣的语言的大型标记数据集可能很困难或昂贵。在本文中，我们回顾了研究文献，以确定可能导致完全无监督 ASR 的模型和想法，包括语音信号的无监督分割、从语音片段到文本的无监督映射，以及具有名义数量标记示例的半监督模型。该研究的目的是确定仅从语音数据中学习的局限性，并了解语音识别的最低要求。识别这些限制将有助于优化资源匮乏语言的 ASR 开发的资源和工作量。

AI.tldr: 本论文综述了无监督自动语音识别（ASR）的研究进展，旨在探索无需人工标注数据的语音识别方法。
AI.motivation: 传统ASR依赖大量人工标注数据，但获取多语言标注数据成本高且困难，尤其对低资源语言而言。
AI.method: 通过回顾文献，分析无监督语音分割、语音到文本的无监督映射及少量标注的半监督模型等方法。
AI.result: 明确了仅依赖语音数据的局限性，并识别了实现语音识别的最低要求。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为优化低资源语言ASR开发提供了理论指导，明确了资源投入方向。

title: Interaction-Grounded Learning
title_zh: 互动学习
abstract: Consider a prosthetic arm, learning to adapt to its user's control signals. We propose Interaction-Grounded Learning for this novel setting, in which a learner's goal is to interact with the environment with no grounding or explicit reward to optimize its policies. Such a problem evades common RL solutions which require an explicit reward. The learning agent observes a multidimensional context vector, takes an action, and then observes a multidimensional feedback vector. This multidimensional feedback vector has no explicit reward information. In order to succeed, the algorithm must learn how to evaluate the feedback vector to discover a latent reward signal, with which it can ground its policies without supervision. We show that in an Interaction-Grounded Learning setting, with certain natural assumptions, a learner can discover the latent reward and ground its policy for successful interaction. We provide theoretical guarantees and a proof-of-concept empirical evaluation to demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach.
summary: Consider a prosthetic arm, learning to adapt to its user's control signals. We propose Interaction-Grounded Learning for this novel setting, in which a learner's goal is to interact with the environment with no grounding or explicit reward to optimize its policies. Such a problem evades common RL solutions which require an explicit reward. The learning agent observes a multidimensional context vector, takes an action, and then observes a multidimensional feedback vector. This multidimensional feedback vector has no explicit reward information. In order to succeed, the algorithm must learn how to evaluate the feedback vector to discover a latent reward signal, with which it can ground its policies without supervision. We show that in an Interaction-Grounded Learning setting, with certain natural assumptions, a learner can discover the latent reward and ground its policy for successful interaction. We provide theoretical guarantees and a proof-of-concept empirical evaluation to demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 考虑一个假肢，它正在学习适应用户的控制信号。我们为这种新颖的环境提出了基于交互的学习，其中学习者的目标是与环境交互，没有基础或明确的奖励来优化其策略。这样的问题回避了需要明确奖励的常见强化学习解决方案。学习代理观察多维上下文向量，采取行动，然后观察多维反馈向量。这个多维反馈向量没有明确的奖励信息。为了成功，算法必须学习如何评估反馈向量以发现潜在的奖励信号，从而可以在没有监督的情况下制定其政策。我们表明，在基于交互的学习环境中，通过某些自然假设，学习者可以发现潜在的奖励并为其成功交互的策略奠定基础。我们提供理论保证和概念验证实证评估，以证明我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种交互基础学习方法，使学习者能够在没有显式奖励信号的情况下通过与环境的交互来优化策略。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习依赖显式奖励信号，但在实际应用中（如假肢控制），用户可能无法提供明确的奖励信息，因此需要新的学习框架。
AI.method: 算法通过观察多维上下文和反馈向量，自主学习评估反馈以发现潜在奖励信号，并基于此调整策略。
AI.result: 理论分析证明了方法的可行性，并通过概念验证实验展示了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 在交互基础学习设定下，学习者可自主发现潜在奖励并实现策略优化，为无监督环境交互提供了新思路。
