search_text: Interaction-Grounded Learning 互动学习 Consider a prosthetic arm, learning to adapt to its user's control signals. We propose Interaction-Grounded Learning for this novel setting, in which a learner's goal is to interact with the environment with no grounding or explicit reward to optimize its policies. Such a problem evades common RL solutions which require an explicit reward. The learning agent observes a multidimensional context vector, takes an action, and then observes a multidimensional feedback vector. This multidimensional feedback vector has no explicit reward information. In order to succeed, the algorithm must learn how to evaluate the feedback vector to discover a latent reward signal, with which it can ground its policies without supervision. We show that in an Interaction-Grounded Learning setting, with certain natural assumptions, a learner can discover the latent reward and ground its policy for successful interaction. We provide theoretical guarantees and a proof-of-concept empirical evaluation to demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach. 考虑一个假肢，它正在学习适应用户的控制信号。我们为这种新颖的环境提出了基于交互的学习，其中学习者的目标是与环境交互，没有基础或明确的奖励来优化其策略。这样的问题回避了需要明确奖励的常见强化学习解决方案。学习代理观察多维上下文向量，采取行动，然后观察多维反馈向量。这个多维反馈向量没有明确的奖励信息。为了成功，算法必须学习如何评估反馈向量以发现潜在的奖励信号，从而可以在没有监督的情况下制定其政策。我们表明，在基于交互的学习环境中，通过某些自然假设，学习者可以发现潜在的奖励并为其成功交互的策略奠定基础。我们提供理论保证和概念验证实证评估，以证明我们提出的方法的有效性。 本文提出了一种交互基础学习方法，使学习者能够在没有显式奖励信号的情况下通过与环境的交互来优化策略。 Tengyang Xie,John Langford,Paul Mineiro,Ida Momennejad cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

title: Deep Interaction between Masking and Mapping Targets for Single-Channel Speech Enhancement
title_zh: 用于单通道语音增强的掩蔽和映射目标之间的深度交互
abstract: The most recent deep neural network (DNN) models exhibit impressive denoising performance in the time-frequency (T-F) magnitude domain. However, the phase is also a critical component of the speech signal that is easily overlooked. In this paper, we propose a multi-branch dilated convolutional network (DCN) to simultaneously enhance the magnitude and phase of noisy speech. A causal and robust monaural speech enhancement system is achieved based on the multi-objective learning framework of the complex spectrum and the ideal ratio mask (IRM) targets. In the process of joint learning, the intermediate estimation of IRM targets is used as a way of generating feature attention factors to realize the information interaction between the two targets. Moreover, the proposed multi-scale dilated convolution enables the DCN model to have a more efficient temporal modeling capability. Experimental results show that compared with other state-of-the-art models, this model achieves better speech quality and intelligibility with less computation.
summary: The most recent deep neural network (DNN) models exhibit impressive denoising performance in the time-frequency (T-F) magnitude domain. However, the phase is also a critical component of the speech signal that is easily overlooked. In this paper, we propose a multi-branch dilated convolutional network (DCN) to simultaneously enhance the magnitude and phase of noisy speech. A causal and robust monaural speech enhancement system is achieved based on the multi-objective learning framework of the complex spectrum and the ideal ratio mask (IRM) targets. In the process of joint learning, the intermediate estimation of IRM targets is used as a way of generating feature attention factors to realize the information interaction between the two targets. Moreover, the proposed multi-scale dilated convolution enables the DCN model to have a more efficient temporal modeling capability. Experimental results show that compared with other state-of-the-art models, this model achieves better speech quality and intelligibility with less computation.
abstract_zh: 最新的深度神经网络 (DNN) 模型在时频 (T-F) 幅度域中表现出令人印象深刻的去噪性能。然而，相位也是语音信号中很容易被忽视的关键组成部分。在本文中，我们提出了一种多分支扩张卷积网络（DCN）来同时增强噪声语音的幅度和相位。基于复杂频谱和理想比率掩模（IRM）目标的多目标学习框架，实现了因果且鲁棒的单耳语音增强系统。在联合学习过程中，利用IRM目标的中间估计作为生成特征注意因子的方式，实现两个目标之间的信息交互。此外，所提出的多尺度扩张卷积使DCN模型具有更有效的时间建模能力。实验结果表明，与其他最先进的模型相比，该模型以更少的计算量实现了更好的语音质量和清晰度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多分支扩张卷积网络，通过同时增强语音信号的幅度和相位，实现单通道语音增强。
AI.motivation: 现有深度神经网络在时频幅度域去噪效果显著，但忽视了相位这一关键语音信号组成部分，需同时优化幅度与相位以提升语音质量。
AI.method: 设计多分支扩张卷积网络（DCN），基于复数谱和理想比率掩码（IRM）目标的多目标学习框架，通过IRM中间估计生成特征注意力因子实现目标间信息交互，并采用多尺度扩张卷积提升时序建模效率。
AI.result: 实验表明，与现有先进模型相比，该模型在语音质量和可懂度上表现更优，且计算量更小。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合优化幅度与相位并引入特征注意力机制，本文方法在单通道语音增强任务中实现了更高效、更高质量的语音恢复。

title: Planning for Novelty: Width-Based Algorithms for Common Problems in Control, Planning and Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 新颖性规划：针对控制、规划和强化学习中常见问题的基于宽度的算法
abstract: Width-based algorithms search for solutions through a general definition of state novelty. These algorithms have been shown to result in state-of-the-art performance in classical planning, and have been successfully applied to model-based and model-free settings where the dynamics of the problem are given through simulation engines. Width-based algorithms performance is understood theoretically through the notion of planning width, providing polynomial guarantees on their runtime and memory consumption. To facilitate synergies across research communities, this paper summarizes the area of width-based planning, and surveys current and future research directions.
summary: Width-based algorithms search for solutions through a general definition of state novelty. These algorithms have been shown to result in state-of-the-art performance in classical planning, and have been successfully applied to model-based and model-free settings where the dynamics of the problem are given through simulation engines. Width-based algorithms performance is understood theoretically through the notion of planning width, providing polynomial guarantees on their runtime and memory consumption. To facilitate synergies across research communities, this paper summarizes the area of width-based planning, and surveys current and future research directions.
abstract_zh: 基于宽度的算法通过状态新颖性的一般定义来搜索解决方案。这些算法已被证明可以在经典规划中实现最先进的性能，并已成功应用于基于模型和无模型的设置，其中问题的动态通过仿真引擎给出。基于宽度的算法性能在理论上可以通过规划宽度的概念来理解，从而为其运行时间和内存消耗提供多项式保证。为了促进研究团体之间的协同作用，本文总结了基于宽度的规划领域，并调查了当前和未来的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文总结了基于宽度的规划算法在控制、规划和强化学习中的应用，并探讨其理论基础与未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 为促进不同研究领域间的协同，需系统梳理基于宽度的算法在多种问题设置中的性能及理论保证。
AI.method: 通过定义状态新颖性，设计宽度基算法并结合规划宽度理论分析其运行时与内存消耗的多项式保证。
AI.result: 算法在经典规划中达到最先进水平，适用于模型驱动与模型无关场景，理论分析验证其效率与可行性。
AI.conclusion: 总结宽度基规划现状，提出跨领域应用潜力及未来研究方向，以推动算法在更复杂问题中的发展。

title: Lossless Online Rounding for Online Bipartite Matching (Despite its Impossibility)
title_zh: 在线二分匹配的无损在线舍入（尽管不可能）
abstract: For numerous online bipartite matching problems, such as edge-weighted matching and matching under two-sided vertex arrivals, the state-of-the-art fractional algorithms outperform their randomized integral counterparts. This gap is surprising, given that the bipartite fractional matching polytope is integral, and so lossless rounding is possible. This gap was explained by Devanur et al.~(SODA'13), who showed that \emph{online} lossless rounding is impossible. Despite the above, we initiate the study of lossless online rounding for online bipartite matching problems. Our key observation is that while lossless online rounding is impossible \emph{in general}, randomized algorithms induce fractional algorithms of the same competitive ratio which by definition are losslessly roundable online. This motivates the addition of constraints that decrease the ``online integrality gap'', thus allowing for lossless online rounding. We characterize a set of non-convex constraints which allow for such lossless online rounding, and better competitive ratios than yielded by deterministic algorithms. As applications of our lossless online rounding approach, we obtain two results of independent interest: (i) a doubly-exponential improvement, and a sharp threshold for the amount of randomness (or advice) needed to outperform deterministic online (vertex-weighted) bipartite matching algorithms, and (ii) an optimal semi-OCS, matching a recent result of Gao et al.~(FOCS'21) answering a question of Fahrbach et al.~(FOCS'20).
summary: For numerous online bipartite matching problems, such as edge-weighted matching and matching under two-sided vertex arrivals, the state-of-the-art fractional algorithms outperform their randomized integral counterparts. This gap is surprising, given that the bipartite fractional matching polytope is integral, and so lossless rounding is possible. This gap was explained by Devanur et al.~(SODA'13), who showed that \emph{online} lossless rounding is impossible. Despite the above, we initiate the study of lossless online rounding for online bipartite matching problems. Our key observation is that while lossless online rounding is impossible \emph{in general}, randomized algorithms induce fractional algorithms of the same competitive ratio which by definition are losslessly roundable online. This motivates the addition of constraints that decrease the ``online integrality gap'', thus allowing for lossless online rounding. We characterize a set of non-convex constraints which allow for such lossless online rounding, and better competitive ratios than yielded by deterministic algorithms. As applications of our lossless online rounding approach, we obtain two results of independent interest: (i) a doubly-exponential improvement, and a sharp threshold for the amount of randomness (or advice) needed to outperform deterministic online (vertex-weighted) bipartite matching algorithms, and (ii) an optimal semi-OCS, matching a recent result of Gao et al.~(FOCS'21) answering a question of Fahrbach et al.~(FOCS'20).
abstract_zh: 对于许多在线二分匹配问题，例如边缘加权匹配和两侧顶点到达下的匹配，最先进的分数算法优于其随机积分算法。这个差距是令人惊讶的，因为二分分数匹配多胞形是整数，因此无损舍入是可能的。 Devanur 等人~(SODA'13) 解释了这一差距，他们表明 \emph{online} 无损舍入是不可能的。尽管如此，我们还是发起了针对在线二分匹配问题的无损在线舍入的研究。我们的主要观察结果是，虽然无损在线舍入是不可能的，但随机算法会产生具有相同竞争比的分数算法，根据定义，这些算法可以在线无损舍入。这促使增加限制，减少“在线完整性差距”，从而允许无损在线舍入。我们描述了一组非凸约束，这些约束允许这种无损在线舍入，并且比确定性算法产生更好的竞争比。作为无损在线舍入方法的应用，我们获得了两个独立感兴趣的结果：（i）双指数改进，以及优于确定性在线（顶点加权）二分匹配算法所需的随机性（或建议）量的尖锐阈值，以及（ii）最佳半OCS，与Gao等人〜（FOCS'21）回答Fahrbach等人〜（FOCS'20）问题的最新结果相匹配。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在线二分图匹配问题中的无损在线取整方法，尽管此前已证明其一般不可行。
AI.motivation: 现有分数算法在在线二分图匹配问题中表现优于随机化整数算法，但在线无损取整被证明不可能。作者提出通过添加约束降低在线对偶间隙以实现无损取整。
AI.method: 通过引入非凸约束，使随机化算法生成的分数解可在线无损取整，并改进竞争比。
AI.result: 获得两个独立结果：(i) 双指数级改进及随机性阈值的精确界限，(ii) 与最新研究匹配的最优半OCS算法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在特定约束下实现无损在线取整，优于确定性算法并解决前人提出的问题。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究在线二分图匹配问题中的无损在线取整方法，尽管此前已证明其一般不可行。
ai_content.motivation: 现有分数算法在在线二分图匹配问题中表现优于随机化整数算法，但在线无损取整被证明不可能。作者提出通过添加约束降低在线对偶间隙以实现无损取整。
ai_content.method: 通过引入非凸约束，使随机化算法生成的分数解可在线无损取整，并改进竞争比。
ai_content.result: 获得两个独立结果：(i) 双指数级改进及随机性阈值的精确界限，(ii) 与最新研究匹配的最优半OCS算法。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法在特定约束下实现无损在线取整，优于确定性算法并解决前人提出的问题。

search_text: Lossless Online Rounding for Online Bipartite Matching (Despite its Impossibility) 在线二分匹配的无损在线舍入（尽管不可能） For numerous online bipartite matching problems, such as edge-weighted matching and matching under two-sided vertex arrivals, the state-of-the-art fractional algorithms outperform their randomized integral counterparts. This gap is surprising, given that the bipartite fractional matching polytope is integral, and so lossless rounding is possible. This gap was explained by Devanur et al.~(SODA'13), who showed that \emph{online} lossless rounding is impossible. Despite the above, we initiate the study of lossless online rounding for online bipartite matching problems. Our key observation is that while lossless online rounding is impossible \emph{in general}, randomized algorithms induce fractional algorithms of the same competitive ratio which by definition are losslessly roundable online. This motivates the addition of constraints that decrease the ``online integrality gap'', thus allowing for lossless online rounding. We characterize a set of non-convex constraints which allow for such lossless online rounding, and better competitive ratios than yielded by deterministic algorithms. As applications of our lossless online rounding approach, we obtain two results of independent interest: (i) a doubly-exponential improvement, and a sharp threshold for the amount of randomness (or advice) needed to outperform deterministic online (vertex-weighted) bipartite matching algorithms, and (ii) an optimal semi-OCS, matching a recent result of Gao et al.~(FOCS'21) answering a question of Fahrbach et al.~(FOCS'20). 对于许多在线二分匹配问题，例如边缘加权匹配和两侧顶点到达下的匹配，最先进的分数算法优于其随机积分算法。这个差距是令人惊讶的，因为二分分数匹配多胞形是整数，因此无损舍入是可能的。 Devanur 等人~(SODA'13) 解释了这一差距，他们表明 \emph{online} 无损舍入是不可能的。尽管如此，我们还是发起了针对在线二分匹配问题的无损在线舍入的研究。我们的主要观察结果是，虽然无损在线舍入是不可能的，但随机算法会产生具有相同竞争比的分数算法，根据定义，这些算法可以在线无损舍入。这促使增加限制，减少“在线完整性差距”，从而允许无损在线舍入。我们描述了一组非凸约束，这些约束允许这种无损在线舍入，并且比确定性算法产生更好的竞争比。作为无损在线舍入方法的应用，我们获得了两个独立感兴趣的结果：（i）双指数改进，以及优于确定性在线（顶点加权）二分匹配算法所需的随机性（或建议）量的尖锐阈值，以及（ii）最佳半OCS，与Gao等人〜（FOCS'21）回答Fahrbach等人〜（FOCS'20）问题的最新结果相匹配。 本文研究在线二分图匹配问题中的无损在线取整方法，尽管此前已证明其一般不可行。 Niv Buchbinder,Joseph,Naor,David Wajc cs.DS

title: Strongly Sublinear Algorithms for Testing Pattern Freeness
title_zh: 用于测试模式自由度的强次线性算法
comment: 28 pages, 2 figures; We thank anonymous reviewers for comments that helped us significantly improve the presentation
comments: 28 pages, 2 figures; We thank anonymous reviewers for comments that helped us significantly improve the presentation
abstract: For a permutation $π:[k] \to [k]$, a function $f:[n] \to \mathbb{R}$ contains a $π$-appearance if there exists $1 \leq i_1 < i_2 < \dots < i_k \leq n$ such that for all $s,t \in [k]$, $f(i_s) < f(i_t)$ if and only if $π(s) < π(t)$. The function is $π$-free if it has no $π$-appearances. In this paper, we investigate the problem of testing whether an input function $f$ is $π$-free or whether $f$ differs on at least $\varepsilon n$ values from every $π$-free function. This is a generalization of the well-studied monotonicity testing and was first studied by Newman, Rabinovich, Rajendraprasad and Sohler (Random Structures and Algorithms 2019). We show that for all constants $k \in \mathbb{N}$, $\varepsilon \in (0,1)$, and permutation $π:[k] \to [k]$, there is a one-sided error $\varepsilon$-testing algorithm for $π$-freeness of functions $f:[n] \to \mathbb{R}$ that makes $\tilde{O}(n^{o(1)})$ queries. We improve significantly upon the previous best upper bound $O(n^{1 - 1/(k-1)})$ by Ben-Eliezer and Canonne (SODA 2018). Our algorithm is adaptive, while the earlier best upper bound is known to be tight for nonadaptive algorithms.

abstract_zh: 对于排列 $π:[k] \to [k]$，函数 $f:[n] \to \mathbb{R}$ 包含 $π$ 外观，如果存在 $1 \leq i_1 < i_2 < \dots < i_k \leq n$ 使得对于所有 $s,t \in [k]$，$f(i_s) < f(i_t)$ 当且仅当 $π(s) < π(t)$。如果函数没有 $π$ 出现，则该函数是 $π$-free。在本文中，我们研究了测试输入函数 $f$ 是否是 $π$-free 的问题，或者 $f$ 是否与每个 $π$-free 函数的至少 $\varepsilon n$ 值不同。这是经过充分研究的单调性测试的推广，最初由 Newman、Rabinovich、Rajendraprasad 和 Sohler 研究（Random Structures and Algorithms 2019）。我们证明，对于所有常量 $k \in \mathbb{N}$、$\varepsilon \in (0,1)$ 和排列 $π:[k] \to [k]$，存在一种单方面错误 $\varepsilon$ - $π$ 测试算法 - 函数 $f:[n] \to \mathbb{R}$ 的自由度，使得 $\tilde{O}(n^{o(1)})$ 查询。我们显着改进了 Ben-Eliezer 和 Canonne 之前提出的最佳上限 $O(n^{1 - 1/(k-1)})$ (SODA 2018)。我们的算法是自适应的，而早期的最佳上限对于非自适应算法来说是严格的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何高效检测函数是否为π-自由的算法问题，提出了一种强次线性查询复杂度的测试方法。
AI.motivation: π-自由性检测是单调性测试的推广，具有理论意义和应用价值。此前最佳算法的查询复杂度较高，需改进。
AI.method: 设计了一种自适应的一边错误测试算法，通过优化查询策略显著降低复杂度。
AI.result: 对于任意常数k和ε，算法查询次数为~O(n^{o(1)})，优于之前O(n^{1−1/(k−1)})的上界。
AI.conclusion: 自适应算法能突破非自适应方法的界限，为模式自由性测试提供了更高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Burak Tağtekin,Mahiye Uluyağmur Öztürk,Mert Kutay Sezer
title: A Case Study: Using Genetic Algorithm for Job Scheduling Problem
title_zh: 案例研究：使用遗传算法解决作业调度问题
abstract: Nowadays, DevOps pipelines of huge projects are getting more and more complex. Each job in the pipeline might need different requirements including specific hardware specifications and dependencies. To achieve minimal makespan, developers always apply as much machines as possible. Consequently, others may be stalled for waiting resource released. Minimizing the makespan of each job using a few resource is a challenging problem. In this study, it is aimed to 1) automatically determine the priority of jobs to reduce the waiting time in the line, 2) automatically allocate the machine resource to each job. In this work, the problem is formulated as a multi-objective optimization problem. We use GA algorithm to automatically determine job priorities and resource demand for minimizing individual makespan and resource usage. Finally, the experimental results show that our proposed priority list generation algorithm is more effective than current priority list producing method in the aspects of makespan and allocated machine count.
summary: Nowadays, DevOps pipelines of huge projects are getting more and more complex. Each job in the pipeline might need different requirements including specific hardware specifications and dependencies. To achieve minimal makespan, developers always apply as much machines as possible. Consequently, others may be stalled for waiting resource released. Minimizing the makespan of each job using a few resource is a challenging problem. In this study, it is aimed to 1) automatically determine the priority of jobs to reduce the waiting time in the line, 2) automatically allocate the machine resource to each job. In this work, the problem is formulated as a multi-objective optimization problem. We use GA algorithm to automatically determine job priorities and resource demand for minimizing individual makespan and resource usage. Finally, the experimental results show that our proposed priority list generation algorithm is more effective than current priority list producing method in the aspects of makespan and allocated machine count.
abstract_zh: 如今，大型项目的 DevOps 管道变得越来越复杂。管道中的每个作业可能需要不同的要求，包括特定的硬件规格和依赖性。为了实现最小的完工时间，开发人员总是使用尽可能多的机器。因此，其他人可能会因为等待资源释放而停滞不前。使用少量资源最小化每项工作的完工时间是一个具有挑战性的问题。本研究的目的是：1）自动确定作业的优先级，以减少排队等待时间；2）自动为每个作业分配机器资源。在这项工作中，该问题被表述为多目标优化问题。我们使用 GA 算法自动确定作业优先级和资源需求，以最大限度地减少个人完工时间和资源使用。最后，实验结果表明，我们提出的优先级列表生成算法在完工时间和分配的机器数量方面比现有的优先级列表生成方法更有效。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在利用遗传算法（GA）解决复杂DevOps流水线中的任务调度问题，通过自动确定任务优先级和资源分配，以最小化任务完成时间（makespan）和资源消耗。
AI.motivation: 随着大型项目DevOps流水线复杂度的增加，任务间的资源竞争导致等待时间增加，传统调度方法难以同时优化任务完成时间（makespan）与资源利用率，亟需高效算法解决该问题。
AI.method: 将任务调度问题建模为多目标优化问题，采用遗传算法（GA）自动优化任务优先级列表生成与资源分配策略，以平衡最小化个体任务完成时间与整体资源消耗。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的优先级生成算法在任务完成时间（makespan）和所需机器数量指标上优于现有方法，有效提升了资源利用率与调度效率。
AI.conclusion: 本研究验证了遗传算法在复杂DevOps流水线任务调度中的有效性，为多目标优化场景下的资源分配提供了可行的解决方案。

conclusion: 本研究验证了遗传算法在复杂DevOps流水线任务调度中的有效性，为多目标优化场景下的资源分配提供了可行的解决方案。
search_text: A Case Study: Using Genetic Algorithm for Job Scheduling Problem 案例研究：使用遗传算法解决作业调度问题 Nowadays, DevOps pipelines of huge projects are getting more and more complex. Each job in the pipeline might need different requirements including specific hardware specifications and dependencies. To achieve minimal makespan, developers always apply as much machines as possible. Consequently, others may be stalled for waiting resource released. Minimizing the makespan of each job using a few resource is a challenging problem. In this study, it is aimed to 1) automatically determine the priority of jobs to reduce the waiting time in the line, 2) automatically allocate the machine resource to each job. In this work, the problem is formulated as a multi-objective optimization problem. We use GA algorithm to automatically determine job priorities and resource demand for minimizing individual makespan and resource usage. Finally, the experimental results show that our proposed priority list generation algorithm is more effective than current priority list producing method in the aspects of makespan and allocated machine count. 如今，大型项目的 DevOps 管道变得越来越复杂。管道中的每个作业可能需要不同的要求，包括特定的硬件规格和依赖性。为了实现最小的完工时间，开发人员总是使用尽可能多的机器。因此，其他人可能会因为等待资源释放而停滞不前。使用少量资源最小化每项工作的完工时间是一个具有挑战性的问题。本研究的目的是：1）自动确定作业的优先级，以减少排队等待时间；2）自动为每个作业分配机器资源。在这项工作中，该问题被表述为多目标优化问题。我们使用 GA 算法自动确定作业优先级和资源需求，以最大限度地减少个人完工时间和资源使用。最后，实验结果表明，我们提出的优先级列表生成算法在完工时间和分配的机器数量方面比现有的优先级列表生成方法更有效。 本论文旨在利用遗传算法（GA）解决复杂DevOps流水线中的任务调度问题，通过自动确定任务优先级和资源分配，以最小化任务完成时间（makespan）和资源消耗。 Burak Tağtekin,Mahiye Uluyağmur Öztürk,Mert Kutay Sezer cs.NE

authors_text: Baoyun Peng,Min Liu,Zhaoning Zhang,Kai Xu,Dongsheng Li
title: Deep Tiny Network for Recognition-Oriented Face Image Quality Assessment
title_zh: 用于面向识别的人脸图像质量评估的深层微型网络
abstract: Face recognition has made significant progress in recent years due to deep convolutional neural networks (CNN). In many face recognition (FR) scenarios, face images are acquired from a sequence with huge intra-variations. These intra-variations, which are mainly affected by the low-quality face images, cause instability of recognition performance. Previous works have focused on ad-hoc methods to select frames from a video or use face image quality assessment (FIQA) methods, which consider only a particular or combination of several distortions. In this work, we present an efficient non-reference image quality assessment for FR that directly links image quality assessment (IQA) and FR. More specifically, we propose a new measurement to evaluate image quality without any reference. Based on the proposed quality measurement, we propose a deep Tiny Face Quality network (tinyFQnet) to learn a quality prediction function from data. We evaluate the proposed method for different powerful FR models on two classical video-based (or template-based) benchmark: IJB-B and YTF. Extensive experiments show that, although the tinyFQnet is much smaller than the others, the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art quality assessment methods in terms of effectiveness and efficiency.
summary: Face recognition has made significant progress in recent years due to deep convolutional neural networks (CNN). In many face recognition (FR) scenarios, face images are acquired from a sequence with huge intra-variations. These intra-variations, which are mainly affected by the low-quality face images, cause instability of recognition performance. Previous works have focused on ad-hoc methods to select frames from a video or use face image quality assessment (FIQA) methods, which consider only a particular or combination of several distortions. In this work, we present an efficient non-reference image quality assessment for FR that directly links image quality assessment (IQA) and FR. More specifically, we propose a new measurement to evaluate image quality without any reference. Based on the proposed quality measurement, we propose a deep Tiny Face Quality network (tinyFQnet) to learn a quality prediction function from data. We evaluate the proposed method for different powerful FR models on two classical video-based (or template-based) benchmark: IJB-B and YTF. Extensive experiments show that, although the tinyFQnet is much smaller than the others, the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art quality assessment methods in terms of effectiveness and efficiency.
abstract_zh: 近年来，由于深度卷积神经网络（CNN），人脸识别取得了重大进展。在许多人脸识别（FR）场景中，人脸图像是从具有巨大内部变化的序列中获取的。这些内部变化主要受到低质量人脸图像的影响，导致识别性能不稳定。以前的工作主要集中在从视频中选择帧的临时方法或使用面部图像质量评估（FIQA）方法，这些方法仅考虑特定的失真或几种失真的组合。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种有效的 FR 非参考图像质量评估，直接将图像质量评估 (IQA) 和 FR 联系起来。更具体地说，我们提出了一种新的测量方法来评估图像质量，无需任何参考。基于所提出的质量测量，我们提出了一个深度 Tiny Face Quality 网络（tinyFQnet）来从数据中学习质量预测函数。我们在两个经典的基于视频（或基于模板）的基准测试：IJB-B 和 YTF 上针对不同强大的 FR 模型评估了所提出的方法。大量实验表明，尽管tinyFQnet比其他方法小得多，但所提出的方法在有效性和效率方面优于最先进的质量评估方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的无参考人脸识别图像质量评估方法，通过构建轻量级深度网络（tinyFQnet）直接关联图像质量评估与人脸识别任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理低质量人脸图像导致的识别性能不稳定性时，依赖人工设计的帧选择策略或仅考虑特定失真类型的图像质量评估方法，难以适应复杂场景下的质量评估需求。
AI.method: 提出基于深度学习的无参考质量评估框架，设计新的质量度量指标，并构建轻量级tinyFQnet网络学习质量预测函数，通过端到端训练实现质量评估与人脸识别任务的直接关联。
AI.result: 在IJB-B和YTF两个经典基准测试中，tinyFQnet在保持网络规模仅为其他方法几分之一的情况下，相较现有最先进方法在评估效果和计算效率上均取得显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为面向人脸识别的图像质量评估提供了高效紧凑的解决方案，在保证评估精度的同时显著降低了计算开销，具有重要的实际应用价值。

authors_text: Xiao Wang,Jin Tang,Bin Luo,Yaowei Wang,Yonghong Tian,Feng Wu
title: Tracking by Joint Local and Global Search: A Target-aware Attention based Approach
title_zh: 通过联合本地和全局搜索进行跟踪：一种基于目标感知注意力的方法
abstract: Tracking-by-detection is a very popular framework for single object tracking which attempts to search the target object within a local search window for each frame. Although such local search mechanism works well on simple videos, however, it makes the trackers sensitive to extremely challenging scenarios, such as heavy occlusion and fast motion. In this paper, we propose a novel and general target-aware attention mechanism (termed TANet) and integrate it with tracking-by-detection framework to conduct joint local and global search for robust tracking. Specifically, we extract the features of target object patch and continuous video frames, then we concatenate and feed them into a decoder network to generate target-aware global attention maps. More importantly, we resort to adversarial training for better attention prediction. The appearance and motion discriminator networks are designed to ensure its consistency in spatial and temporal views. In the tracking procedure, we integrate the target-aware attention with multiple trackers by exploring candidate search regions for robust tracking. Extensive experiments on both short-term and long-term tracking benchmark datasets all validated the effectiveness of our algorithm. The project page of this paper can be found at \url{https://sites.google.com/view/globalattentiontracking/home/extend}.
summary: Tracking-by-detection is a very popular framework for single object tracking which attempts to search the target object within a local search window for each frame. Although such local search mechanism works well on simple videos, however, it makes the trackers sensitive to extremely challenging scenarios, such as heavy occlusion and fast motion. In this paper, we propose a novel and general target-aware attention mechanism (termed TANet) and integrate it with tracking-by-detection framework to conduct joint local and global search for robust tracking. Specifically, we extract the features of target object patch and continuous video frames, then we concatenate and feed them into a decoder network to generate target-aware global attention maps. More importantly, we resort to adversarial training for better attention prediction. The appearance and motion discriminator networks are designed to ensure its consistency in spatial and temporal views. In the tracking procedure, we integrate the target-aware attention with multiple trackers by exploring candidate search regions for robust tracking. Extensive experiments on both short-term and long-term tracking benchmark datasets all validated the effectiveness of our algorithm. The project page of this paper can be found at \url{https://sites.google.com/view/globalattentiontracking/home/extend}.
abstract_zh: 检测跟踪是一种非常流行的单对象跟踪框架，它尝试在每帧的本地搜索窗口内搜索目标对象。尽管这种本地搜索机制在简单视频上效果很好，但是，它使跟踪器对极具挑战性的场景敏感，例如严重遮挡和快速运动。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖且通用的目标感知注意机制（称为 TANet），并将其与检测跟踪框架相结合，以进行联合局部和全局搜索以实现鲁棒跟踪。具体来说，我们提取目标对象块和连续视频帧的特征，然后将它们连接起来并将其输入解码器网络以生成目标感知的全局注意图。更重要的是，我们采用对抗性训练来更好地预测注意力。外观和运动鉴别器网络的设计是为了确保其在空间和时间视图上的一致性。在跟踪过程中，我们通过探索候选搜索区域以实现稳健跟踪，将目标感知注意力与多个跟踪器集成。对短期和长期跟踪基准数据集的大量实验都验证了我们算法的有效性。本文的项目页面可以在 \url{https://sites.google.com/view/globalattentiontracking/home/extend} 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于目标感知注意力机制（TANet）的跟踪方法，通过结合局部和全局搜索来提高单目标跟踪的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统的基于检测的跟踪方法在简单视频中表现良好，但在面对遮挡和快速运动等复杂场景时容易失效，因此需要一种更鲁棒的跟踪方法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种目标感知注意力机制（TANet），通过提取目标区域和连续视频帧的特征，并利用解码网络生成全局注意力图。同时，采用对抗训练来提高注意力预测的准确性，并通过设计外观和运动判别网络确保其在空间和时间上的一致性。
AI.result: 在多个短期和长期跟踪基准数据集上的实验验证了该算法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: TANet方法通过结合局部和全局搜索，提高了跟踪的鲁棒性，并在多个数据集上取得了良好的效果。

The appearance and motion discriminator networks are designed to ensure its consistency in spatial and temporal views. In the tracking procedure, we integrate the target-aware attention with multiple trackers by exploring candidate search regions for robust tracking. Extensive experiments on both short-term and long-term tracking benchmark datasets all validated the effectiveness of our algorithm. The project page of this paper can be found at \url{https://sites.google.com/view/globalattentiontracking/home/extend}. 检测跟踪是一种非常流行的单对象跟踪框架，它尝试在每帧的本地搜索窗口内搜索目标对象。尽管这种本地搜索机制在简单视频上效果很好，但是，它使跟踪器对极具挑战性的场景敏感，例如严重遮挡和快速运动。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖且通用的目标感知注意机制（称为 TANet），并将其与检测跟踪框架相结合，以进行联合局部和全局搜索以实现鲁棒跟踪。具体来说，我们提取目标对象块和连续视频帧的特征，然后将它们连接起来并将其输入解码器网络以生成目标感知的全局注意图。更重要的是，我们采用对抗性训练来更好地预测注意力。外观和运动鉴别器网络的设计是为了确保其在空间和时间视图上的一致性。在跟踪过程中，我们通过探索候选搜索区域以实现稳健跟踪，将目标感知注意力与多个跟踪器集成。对短期和长期跟踪基准数据集的大量实验都验证了我们算法的有效性。本文的项目页面可以在 \url{https://sites.google.com/view/globalattentiontracking/home/extend} 找到。 本文提出一种基于目标感知注意力机制（TANet）的跟踪方法，通过结合局部和全局搜索来提高单目标跟踪的鲁棒性。 Xiao Wang,Jin Tang,Bin Luo,Yaowei Wang,Yonghong Tian,Feng Wu cs.CV,cs.LG

title: RealTranS: End-to-End Simultaneous Speech Translation with Convolutional Weighted-Shrinking Transformer
title_zh: RealTranS：使用卷积加权收缩变压器的端到端同步语音翻译
abstract: End-to-end simultaneous speech translation (SST), which directly translates speech in one language into text in another language in real-time, is useful in many scenarios but has not been fully investigated. In this work, we propose RealTranS, an end-to-end model for SST. To bridge the modality gap between speech and text, RealTranS gradually downsamples the input speech with interleaved convolution and unidirectional Transformer layers for acoustic modeling, and then maps speech features into text space with a weighted-shrinking operation and a semantic encoder. Besides, to improve the model performance in simultaneous scenarios, we propose a blank penalty to enhance the shrinking quality and a Wait-K-Stride-N strategy to allow local reranking during decoding. Experiments on public and widely-used datasets show that RealTranS with the Wait-K-Stride-N strategy outperforms prior end-to-end models as well as cascaded models in diverse latency settings.
summary: End-to-end simultaneous speech translation (SST), which directly translates speech in one language into text in another language in real-time, is useful in many scenarios but has not been fully investigated. In this work, we propose RealTranS, an end-to-end model for SST. To bridge the modality gap between speech and text, RealTranS gradually downsamples the input speech with interleaved convolution and unidirectional Transformer layers for acoustic modeling, and then maps speech features into text space with a weighted-shrinking operation and a semantic encoder. Besides, to improve the model performance in simultaneous scenarios, we propose a blank penalty to enhance the shrinking quality and a Wait-K-Stride-N strategy to allow local reranking during decoding. Experiments on public and widely-used datasets show that RealTranS with the Wait-K-Stride-N strategy outperforms prior end-to-end models as well as cascaded models in diverse latency settings.
abstract_zh: 端到端同步语音翻译（SST）可直接将一种语言的语音实时翻译为另一种语言的文本，在许多场景中都很有用，但尚未得到充分研究。在这项工作中，我们提出了 RealTranS，一种 SST 的端到端模型。为了弥合语音和文本之间的模态差距，RealTranS 使用交错卷积和单向 Transformer 层逐渐对输入语音进行下采样以进行声学建模，然后通过加权收缩操作和语义编码器将语音特征映射到文本空间。此外，为了提高同时场景下的模型性能，我们提出了空白惩罚来提高收缩质量，并提出了 Wait-K-Stride-N 策略以允许在解码期间进行本地重新排序。对公共和广泛使用的数据集的实验表明，采用 Wait-K-Stride-N 策略的 RealTranS 在不同延迟设置下的性能优于先前的端到端模型以及级联模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RealTranS模型，实现端到端的实时语音到文本的同步翻译。
AI.motivation: 现有同步语音翻译方法在实时性与翻译质量之间存在不足，需探索更高效的端到端解决方案。
AI.method: 结合卷积层与单向Transformer进行声学建模，通过加权收缩操作和语义编码器映射语音特征；引入空白惩罚机制与Wait-K-Stride-N策略优化解码过程。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上，RealTranS在多种延迟设置下均优于现有端到端模型及级联模型。
AI.conclusion: RealTranS通过模块化设计与解码策略创新，有效提升了同步语音翻译的实时性与准确性。

authors_text: Sina Mohseni,Haotao Wang,Zhiding Yu,Chaowei Xiao,Zhangyang Wang,Jay Yadawa
title: Taxonomy of Machine Learning Safety: A Survey and Primer
title_zh: 机器学习安全分类：调查和入门
abstract: The open-world deployment of Machine Learning (ML) algorithms in safety-critical applications such as autonomous vehicles needs to address a variety of ML vulnerabilities such as interpretability, verifiability, and performance limitations. Research explores different approaches to improve ML dependability by proposing new models and training techniques to reduce generalization error, achieve domain adaptation, and detect outlier examples and adversarial attacks. However, there is a missing connection between ongoing ML research and well-established safety principles. In this paper, we present a structured and comprehensive review of ML techniques to improve the dependability of ML algorithms in uncontrolled open-world settings. From this review, we propose the Taxonomy of ML Safety that maps state-of-the-art ML techniques to key engineering safety strategies. Our taxonomy of ML safety presents a safety-oriented categorization of ML techniques to provide guidance for improving dependability of the ML design and development. The proposed taxonomy can serve as a safety checklist to aid designers in improving coverage and diversity of safety strategies employed in any given ML system.
summary: The open-world deployment of Machine Learning (ML) algorithms in safety-critical applications such as autonomous vehicles needs to address a variety of ML vulnerabilities such as interpretability, verifiability, and performance limitations. Research explores different approaches to improve ML dependability by proposing new models and training techniques to reduce generalization error, achieve domain adaptation, and detect outlier examples and adversarial attacks. However, there is a missing connection between ongoing ML research and well-established safety principles. In this paper, we present a structured and comprehensive review of ML techniques to improve the dependability of ML algorithms in uncontrolled open-world settings. From this review, we propose the Taxonomy of ML Safety that maps state-of-the-art ML techniques to key engineering safety strategies. Our taxonomy of ML safety presents a safety-oriented categorization of ML techniques to provide guidance for improving dependability of the ML design and development. The proposed taxonomy can serve as a safety checklist to aid designers in improving coverage and diversity of safety strategies employed in any given ML system.
abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 算法在自动驾驶汽车等安全关键应用中的开放世界部署需要解决各种 ML 漏洞，例如可解释性、可验证性和性能限制。研究通过提出新模型和训练技术来探索提高机器学习可靠性的不同方法，以减少泛化误差、实现领域适应以及检测异常示例和对抗性攻击。然而，正在进行的机器学习研究与既定的安全原则之间缺乏联系。在本文中，我们对机器学习技术进行了结构化和全面的回顾，以提高机器学习算法在不受控制的开放世界环境中的可靠性。根据这次审查，我们提出了 ML 安全分类法，将最先进的 ML 技术映射到关键的工程安全策略。我们的 ML 安全分类提出了以安全为导向的 ML 技术分类，为提高 ML 设计和开发的可靠性提供指导。拟议的分类法可以作为安全检查表，帮助设计人员提高任何给定机器学习系统中采用的安全策略的覆盖范围和多样性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过系统综述和分类机器学习技术，提出一个机器学习安全分类法，以提升开放世界中机器学习算法的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 当前机器学习在安全关键领域应用时面临可解释性、可验证性等漏洞，且现有研究与成熟安全原则缺乏有效衔接。
AI.method: 通过结构化综述最新机器学习技术，将其映射到关键工程安全策略，构建面向安全的机器学习技术分类体系。
AI.result: 提出机器学习安全分类法作为安全检查清单，指导设计者提升机器学习系统的安全策略覆盖范围和多样性。
AI.conclusion: 该分类法为改进机器学习设计与开发中的安全性提供了系统性框架，有助于增强开放世界场景下的算法可靠性。

title: Fast Computational Ghost Imaging using Unpaired Deep Learning and a Constrained Generative Adversarial Network
title_zh: 使用不成对的深度学习和约束生成对抗网络进行快速计算鬼成像
abstract: The unpaired training can be the only option available for fast deep learning-based ghost imaging, where obtaining a high signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) image copy of each low SNR ghost image could be practically time-consuming and challenging. This paper explores the capabilities of deep learning to leverage computational ghost imaging when there is a lack of paired training images. The deep learning approach proposed here enables fast ghost imaging through reconstruction of high SNR images from faint and hastily shot ghost images using a constrained Wasserstein generative adversarial network. In the proposed approach, the objective function is regularized to enforce the generation of faithful and relevant high SNR images to the ghost copies. This regularization measures the distance between reconstructed images and the faint ghost images in a low-noise manifold generated by a shadow network. The performance of the constrained network is shown to be particularly important for ghost images with low SNR. The proposed pipeline is able to reconstruct high-quality images from the ghost images with SNR values not necessarily equal to the SNR of the training set.
summary: The unpaired training can be the only option available for fast deep learning-based ghost imaging, where obtaining a high signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) image copy of each low SNR ghost image could be practically time-consuming and challenging. This paper explores the capabilities of deep learning to leverage computational ghost imaging when there is a lack of paired training images. The deep learning approach proposed here enables fast ghost imaging through reconstruction of high SNR images from faint and hastily shot ghost images using a constrained Wasserstein generative adversarial network. In the proposed approach, the objective function is regularized to enforce the generation of faithful and relevant high SNR images to the ghost copies. This regularization measures the distance between reconstructed images and the faint ghost images in a low-noise manifold generated by a shadow network. The performance of the constrained network is shown to be particularly important for ghost images with low SNR. The proposed pipeline is able to reconstruct high-quality images from the ghost images with SNR values not necessarily equal to the SNR of the training set.
abstract_zh: 不成对的训练可能是基于深度学习的快速鬼影成像的唯一选择，其中获得每个低信噪比鬼影图像的高信噪比（SNR）图像副本实际上可能非常耗时且具有挑战性。本文探讨了深度学习在缺乏配对训练图像时利用计算鬼影成像的能力。这里提出的深度学习方法通​​过使用受限的 Wasserstein 生成对抗网络从微弱和仓促拍摄的鬼影图像重建高 SNR 图像，实现快速鬼影成像。在所提出的方法中，目标函数被正则化，以强制生成与副本副本忠实且相关的高信噪比图像。这种正则化测量重建图像与阴影网络生成的低噪声流形中的微弱重影图像之间的距离。约束网络的性能对于低信噪比的重影图像尤其重要。所提出的管道能够从重影图像中重建高质量图像，其信噪比值不一定等于训练集的信噪比。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于无配对深度学习和约束生成对抗网络的快速计算鬼成像方法，用于从低信噪比（SNR）鬼图像中重建高质量图像。
AI.motivation: 传统鬼成像需要高SNR的配对图像进行训练，但实际中获取高SNR图像耗时且困难，因此需要一种无需配对数据的快速重建方法。
AI.method: 采用约束Wasserstein生成对抗网络（cWGAN），通过正则化目标函数并结合阴影网络生成的低噪声流形，衡量重建图像与原始鬼图像的距离以优化生成效果。
AI.result: 该方法能在测试图像SNR与训练集不一致的情况下仍有效重建高质量图像，尤其在低SNR鬼图像中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法验证了无配对深度学习在鬼成像中的可行性，为低SNR场景下的快速图像重建提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: Fast Computational Ghost Imaging using Unpaired Deep Learning and a Constrained Generative Adversarial Network 使用不成对的深度学习和约束生成对抗网络进行快速计算鬼成像 The unpaired training can be the only option available for fast deep learning-based ghost imaging, where obtaining a high signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) image copy of each low SNR ghost image could be practically time-consuming and challenging. This paper explores the capabilities of deep learning to leverage computational ghost imaging when there is a lack of paired training images. The deep learning approach proposed here enables fast ghost imaging through reconstruction of high SNR images from faint and hastily shot ghost images using a constrained Wasserstein generative adversarial network. In the proposed approach, the objective function is regularized to enforce the generation of faithful and relevant high SNR images to the ghost copies. This regularization measures the distance between reconstructed images and the faint ghost images in a low-noise manifold generated by a shadow network. The performance of the constrained network is shown to be particularly important for ghost images with low SNR. The proposed pipeline is able to reconstruct high-quality images from the ghost images with SNR values not necessarily equal to the SNR of the training set. 不成对的训练可能是基于深度学习的快速鬼影成像的唯一选择，其中获得每个低信噪比鬼影图像的高信噪比（SNR）图像副本实际上可能非常耗时且具有挑战性。本文探讨了深度学习在缺乏配对训练图像时利用计算鬼影成像的能力。这里提出的深度学习方法通​​过使用受限的 Wasserstein 生成对抗网络从微弱和仓促拍摄的鬼影图像重建高 SNR 图像，实现快速鬼影成像。在所提出的方法中，目标函数被正则化，以强制生成与副本副本忠实且相关的高信噪比图像。这种正则化测量重建图像与阴影网络生成的低噪声流形中的微弱重影图像之间的距离。约束网络的性能对于低信噪比的重影图像尤其重要。所提出的管道能够从重影图像中重建高质量图像，其信噪比值不一定等于训练集的信噪比。 本文提出一种基于无配对深度学习和约束生成对抗网络的快速计算鬼成像方法，用于从低信噪比（SNR）鬼图像中重建高质量图像。 Fatemeh Alishahi,Amirhossein Mohajerin-Ariaei eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Sreenivas Gollapudi,Guru Guruganesh,Kostas Kollias,Pasin Manurangsi,Renato Paes Leme,Jon Schneider
title: Contextual Recommendations and Low-Regret Cutting-Plane Algorithms
title_zh: 上下文建议和低遗憾的切面算法
abstract: We consider the following variant of contextual linear bandits motivated by routing applications in navigational engines and recommendation systems. We wish to learn a hidden $d$-dimensional value $w^*$. Every round, we are presented with a subset $\mathcal{X}_t \subseteq \mathbb{R}^d$ of possible actions. If we choose (i.e. recommend to the user) action $x_t$, we obtain utility $\langle x_t, w^* \rangle$ but only learn the identity of the best action $\arg\max_{x \in \mathcal{X}_t} \langle x, w^* \rangle$. We design algorithms for this problem which achieve regret $O(d\log T)$ and $\exp(O(d \log d))$. To accomplish this, we design novel cutting-plane algorithms with low "regret" -- the total distance between the true point $w^*$ and the hyperplanes the separation oracle returns. We also consider the variant where we are allowed to provide a list of several recommendations. In this variant, we give an algorithm with $O(d^2 \log d)$ regret and list size $\mathrm{poly}(d)$. Finally, we construct nearly tight algorithms for a weaker variant of this problem where the learner only learns the identity of an action that is better than the recommendation. Our results rely on new algorithmic techniques in convex geometry (including a variant of Steiner's formula for the centroid of a convex set) which may be of independent interest.

To accomplish this, we design novel cutting-plane algorithms with low "regret" -- the total distance between the true point $w^*$ and the hyperplanes the separation oracle returns. We also consider the variant where we are allowed to provide a list of several recommendations. In this variant, we give an algorithm with $O(d^2 \log d)$ regret and list size $\mathrm{poly}(d)$. AI.tldr: 本文研究了上下文推荐场景下的低遗憾切割平面算法，旨在通过学习隐藏参数优化推荐策略。
AI.motivation: 受导航引擎和推荐系统中路由问题的启发，解决动态环境中如何通过有限反馈学习最优推荐策略的挑战。
AI.method: 设计新型切割平面算法，结合凸几何技术（如Steiner公式变体），通过分离超平面逐步逼近隐藏参数w*。
AI.result: 实现O(d log T)和exp(O(d log d))的遗憾界，支持列表推荐的O(d² log d)遗憾，以及弱化问题的近似算法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的新算法在理论层面取得进展，凸几何技术可能具有独立应用价值。

To accomplish this, we design novel cutting-plane algorithms with low "regret" -- the total distance between the true point $w^*$ and the hyperplanes the separation oracle returns.
